name: A O
bio: A O is an infamous New World pirate and captain of the A O Pirates. He and his crew were subordinates to Whitebeard.

name: Abdullah
bio: Abdullah is a criminal and a former bounty hunter who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi, along with his partner Jeet. He is an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc.

name: Absalom
occupation: Reporter Soldier Zombies and General Zombies Commander
bio: Absalom of the Graveyard was the commander of the Soldier Zombies and General Zombies of Thriller Bark prior to its collapse. He was one of the Mysterious Four of the Thriller Bark Pirates and one of the major antagonists of the Thriller Bark Saga.

name: Acilia
bio: Acilia is a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum who participated in a tournament for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Adele
bio: Adele is a spotted knifejaw mermaid and one of the Mermaid Cafe Dancers.

name: Adio Suerte
bio: Adio Suerte is the last publicly known descendant of the ancient tribe who lived on the fallen sky island Waford. He is the main antagonist of One Piece Odyssey.

name: Aegir
bio: Aegir is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph.

name: Ageha Woman
bio: Ageha Woman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates.

name: Aggie 68
bio: Aggie 68 is a member of the Spade Pirates.

name: Agotogi
bio: Agotogi was the leader of the Agotogi Sand Merchants, a gang of thugs who tried to kidnap Vivi about 11 years before the princess's return to Arabasta.

name: Agsilly
bio: Agsilly is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Agyo
bio: Agyo is a fighting lion and a gladiator competing at the Corrida Colosseum for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Ahho Desunen IX
bio: Ahho Desunen IX is a noble from the Goa Kingdom and the father of Ahho Zurako.

name: Ahho Zurako
bio: Ahho Zurako is a noble from the Goa Kingdom and the daughter of Ahho Desunen IX.

name: Ahiru
bio: Ahiru is the deputy commander of the East Army in the Revolutionary Army and the assistant of Belo Betty.

name: Ain
occupation: Second-in-command of the Neo Marines Marine Officer (former)
bio: Ain is the second-in-command and vice-admiral of the Neo Marines and a former member of the Marines. She is a major antagonist of One Piece Film: Z.

name: Aisa
bio: Aisa is a young Shandia girl who used to sneak onto Upper Yard frequently to collect Vearth. She is Isa's daughter.

name: Akehende
bio: Akehende is a Marine Rear Admiral.

name: Akudai Kanzaburo
bio: Akudai Kanzaburo is an arms dealer who lives in the Flower Capital of Wano Country.

name: Akumai
bio: Akumai was a Billions agent who followed Mr. 2 Bon Kurei everywhere before he was captured by Hina when Mr.

name: Aladine
occupation: Pirate ; Doctor ; First Mate ; Soldier (former); Slave (former)
bio: Aladine is a goatsbeard brotula merman. He was originally a Ryugu Kingdom soldier who was then enslaved, but then became a pirate as the doctor and later first mate of the Sun Pirates.

name: Albion
bio: "Gashed" Albion is one of the rookie pirates who joined the Fake Straw Hat Crew. He has a bounty of 92,000,000.

name: Alice
bio: Alice is the current secretary of the Galley-La Company in Water 7.

name: Ally
bio: Ally is a little girl who was being held captive in the Biscuits Room, on Punk Hazard. She was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates.

name: Alpacaman
bio: Alpacaman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mines of the Udon Region of Wano Country.

name: Alpha
bio: Alpha is a member of the CP8 branch of Cipher Pol. She is the daughter of Laskey and the younger sister of CP0 agent Kalifa.

name: Alvida
bio: "Iron Mace" Alvida is the former captain of the Alvida Pirates, and the first enemy pirate Monkey D. Luffy encountered in his own pirate career. After her defeat by Luffy, she met and allied with Buggy to form the Buggy and Alvida Alliance, and for a time became the acting captain during Buggy's entanglements in Impel Down and the Summit War of Marineford.

name: Amadob
bio: Amadob is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Amazon
bio: Amazon is an elderly resident of Skypiea who was previously the inspector of the Heaven's Gate. She let people into Skypiea even if they could not pay her extol toll, but purposely failed to tell those who did not pay about the consequences for entering the city.

name: An Zengaiina
bio: An Zengaiina is a prisoner on Level 2 of Impel Down.

name: Anba
bio: Anba is a man living in the Wano Country and a supporter of the Kouzuki Family.

name: Andre
bio: Andre is a New World pirate captain who was once a member of the Whitebeard Pirates, before forming his own crew subordinate to Whitebeard. He is the twin brother of the Marine officer Candre.

name: Ange
bio: Ange is a giant from Elbaph. She works as a language teacher at the Walrus School, as an assistant for Jaguar D. Saul and as a librarian of the Owl Library.

name: Anjo
bio: Anjo is a pirate admirer who witnessed Gol D. Roger's execution.

name: Ankoro
bio: Ankoro is a gigantic anglerfish formerly under the command of captain Vander Decken IX, residing in the Underworld of the Sea, seven thousand meters underneath the ocean surface. Wadatsumi seems to regard Ankoro as a pet, as apparently Ankoro was told "not to eat ships " before.

name: Antonio
bio: Antonio is the owner of " Antonio's Graman " in Sabaody Archipelago.

name: Aphelandra
bio: Aphelandra is a member of the tribe of Kuja living on the island of Amazon Lily. During the timeskip, she became a member of the Kuja Pirates.

name: Aramaki
bio: Aramaki, better known by his alias Ryokugyu, is an Admiral in the Marines. A former policeman from the Taya Kingdom, he was part of the World Military Draft that filled the two Admiral vacancies (along with Fujitora ), caused by Kuzan's resignation and Sakazuki's promotion.

name: Aremo Ganmi
bio: Aremo Ganmi is a spectator at the Corrida Colosseum. She lives in Primula, a town in the west of Dressrosa.

name: Arlong
occupation: Pirate Captain ; Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
bio: Arlong the Saw is a sawshark fish-man. He was the captain of the all fish-man crew (excluding Nami ), the Arlong Pirates, a former member of the Sun Pirates, and the older half-brother of Madam Shyarly.

name: Arthur
bio: Arthur is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Aruyutayan V
bio: Aruyutayan V was the king of the Lvneel Kingdom roughly 400 years ago when Mont Blanc Noland discovered Shandora.

name: Asahija
bio: Asahija is a Marine Chief Petty Officer whose shadow was once stolen by Gecko Moria.

name: Asashichi
bio: Asashichi is a resident of the Flower Capital who ran a soba shop with his wife.

name: Ashura Doji
occupation: Bandit ; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family; Yakuza Boss (former); Samurai
bio: Ashura Doji was a bandit, samurai from Wano Country and a retainer of the Kouzuki Family, serving as one of Kouzuki Oden's Nine Red Scabbards. After Oden's death, he returned to being a criminal under the name Shutenmaru, assuming leadership of the Mt.

name: Asla
bio: Asla, known as the "Horse of Fortune", was the royal steed of Elbaph. It passed away 63 years ago, believed to have been slain by Loki, shortly after the prince's birth.

name: Aswa
bio: Aswa is Koza's mother and Toto's wife.

name: Atagoyama
bio: Atagoyama is a sumo wrestler in Wano Country's Bakura Town.

name: Atlas
bio: Atlas, also designated as Punk-05 ( PUNK-05, Panku-Faibu? ), is one of the six satellites of Dr.

name: Atmos
bio: "Water Buffalo" Atmos is the former 13th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Attach
bio: Attach, commonly nicknamed Attachan, is a photojournalist employed by "Big News" Morgans for the World Economy News Paper. Having previously headed the Marines' Photography Department, he supplied images of many prominent outlaws—including most of the Straw Hat Pirates —for the Marines' wanted posters, but was eventually dismissed for his frequent blunders.

name: Avalo Pizarro
occupation: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Fourth Ship); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former); King (former)
bio: Avalo Pizarro, also known as the "Corrupt King", is one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates, serving as the captain of the fourth ship of the fleet. Prior to his life of crime, he was once a king of a North Blue kingdom that eventually overthrew him for his despotic ways.

name: Azuki
bio: Azuki is an old woman who lives in Ebisu Town.

name: Babanuki
occupation: Shinuchi ; Warden of the Prisoner Mine
bio: Babanuki is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates who serves as the warden of the Prisoner Mine in Udon, a region of Wano Country. After the prison takeover, Babanuki was tamed by Tama.

name: Babe
bio: "Catcher-Killing" Babe, better known by his alias Mr. 4, is a former officer agent of the Baroque Works and partner of Miss Merry Christmas.

name: Baburu
bio: Baburu is the grandmother of the late Gaburu. She is a major supporting character in the Caribou's Kehihihihi in the New World cover story.

name: Baby 5
bio: Baby 5 is a pirate and the wife of Sai, the Happo Navy's 13th leader. She is a former servant and assassin of the Donquixote Pirates, serving as an officer in the Pica Army.

name: Baccarat
bio: Baccarat is a concierge on Gran Tesoro and an executive member of Gild Tesoro's crew. She appears in One Piece Film: Gold.

name: Bacura
bio: Bacura is a black panther owned by the Kuja Pirates under Boa Hancock. She is said to be the executioner of the Kuja tribe, and has been serving the tribe for generations.

name: Baggaley
bio: Baggaley is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Ban Dedessinée
bio: Ban Dedessinée is the queen of the Frauce Kingdom in the East Blue and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Banchi
bio: Banchi is a giant "all-terrain" turtle used by Baroque Works —particularly Miss All-Sunday —for transportation. He is classified as a Type A creature, "Big Friendly".

name: Banchina
bio: Banchina was Usopp's mother and Yasopp's wife. She died of a sickness in Syrup Village when Usopp was still young.

name: Bankuro
bio: Bankuro was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Banshee
bio: Banshee is a mermaid and was the only female member of the Spade Pirates.

name: Banzaburo
occupation: Retainer of the Kouzuki Family; Food taster
bio: Banzaburo was a samurai of Wano Country who worked as a servant to the Kouzuki Family until their fall 20 years ago.

name: Bao Huang
bio: Bao Huang is a Shinuchi in the Beasts Pirates, being part of the crew's surveillance division, the " Marys ". She appears to have the duty of keeping and presenting daily schedules for the crew and their captain Kaidou.

name: Barbel
bio: Barbel is a catfish fish-man and former member of the Rocks Pirates.

name: Bariete
bio: Bariete is a monkey mink who is a member of the Recon Squad, and the one in charge of guarding the gates of the Mokomo Dukedom.

name: Barrel
bio: The Tsumegeri Guards were four of the most powerful soldiers in the Arabasta Kingdom. They drank the Hero Water and attempted to take down Crocodile, but failed and died from the water's side effects shortly after Crocodile refused to even fight them to give them an honorable death.

name: Barry
bio: Barry is a member of the Spade Pirates.

name: Bartholomew Kuma
occupation: Army Commander of the Revolutionary Army; Slave (former); Warlord of the Sea (former); King of Sorbet Kingdom (former); Pastor (former)
bio: Bartholomew Kuma is a former Warlord of the Sea, the former king of the Sorbet Kingdom, and most notably an officer, as well as founding member of the Revolutionary Army with a bounty of 296,000,000. He is also the adoptive father of Jewelry Bonney, daughter of his late friend and fellow revolutionary Ginny.

name: Bartolomeo
occupation: Captain of the Second Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Pirate Captain ; Mafia Leader (former)
bio: Bartolomeo the Cannibal is a Super Rookie, the captain of the Barto Club and the captain of the second ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet. Formerly a mob boss from the East Blue, Bartolomeo was inspired to become a pirate after witnessing Monkey D. Luffy's failed execution in Loguetown.

name: Basil Hawkins
bio: Basil Hawkins is an infamous pirate from North Blue known as the "Magician" and the captain of the Hawkins Pirates. He is one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation ".

name: Basilisk
bio: The Basilisk is the second-in-command of Impel Down's Level 2: Beast Hell, under the Sphinx. It is a snake born from a chicken as a result of a rare mutation.

name: Baskerville
birth: Bas: March 30th And: March 31st Kerville: April 1st
blood_type: Bas: X, And: XF, Kerville: F
bio: Three-Headed Baskerville is the Chief Justice of Enies Lobby, in service of the World Government. Ostensibly a three-headed man, "he" is actually three men— Bas, And, and Kerville —who are such close friends that they prefer acting as one body.

name: Bastille
bio: "Shark Cutter" Bastille is a Marine Vice Admiral who took part in the Summit War of Marineford. He later appeared in Dressrosa under the command of Admiral Fujitora.

name: Batchee
bio: Batchee is a fly that Fullbody put in his soup to try to humiliate Sanji.

name: Batman
bio: Batman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates. Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist of the Wano Country Arc.

name: Battaman
bio: Battaman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates.

name: Baxcon
bio: Baxcon is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared in the Riku Royal Army Headquarters beneath the Flower Field.

name: Beak Remark
bio: Beak Remark is a fishmonger and fisherman who runs on a store on Grove 42 of Sabaody Archipelago.

name: Beegirl
bio: Beegirl is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates.

name: Beer VI
bio: Beer VI is the king of the Roshwan Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Beetleman
bio: Beetleman is a Gifter of the Beasts Pirates.

name: Bekori
bio: Bekori is the former king of the Sorbet Kingdom.

name: Bell-mère
bio: Bell-mère was a former Marine, the owner of a mikan farm in Cocoyasi Village, and the adoptive mother of Nami and Nojiko. She raised the two girls in her hometown for approximately nine years until she was murdered by Arlong.

name: Belladonna
bio: Belladonna is one of the Kuja of Amazon Lily, and the doctor of the island.

name: Bellamy
bio: Bellamy "the Hyena" is a dyer and retired pirate hailing from the North Blue. Originally captain of the Bellamy Pirates, he was renowned in Mock Town as the "Big-Time Rookie" until his humiliating defeat by Monkey D. Luffy.

name: Bellett
bio: Bellett was the prince of an unnamed kingdom who became a pirate and was consequently imprisoned in Impel Down, and whose gender was unwillingly inverted.

name: Belo Betty
occupation: East Army Commander of the Revolutionary Army
bio: Belo Betty is the commander of the East Army in the Revolutionary Army. She succeeded the previous commander, Ginny, eight years after her death.

name: Benn Beckman
bio: Benn Beckman is the first mate of the Red Hair Pirates.

name: Bent
bio: Bent is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph.

name: Bentham
occupation: Queen of Newkama Land ; Officer Agent (former); Prisoner of the Great Prison
bio: Bentham of the Wild, alias Mr. 2 Bon Kurei, is a newkama and former Baroque Works officer agent.

name: Bepo
bio: Bepo is a polar bear mink and the navigator of the Heart Pirates. He is the younger brother of the late Nox Pirate Zepo.

name: Bian
occupation: Leader of Pink Bee Squad; Pirate
bio: Bian is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who serves as the leader of the Pink Bee Squad and a member of the Tontatta Pirates.

name: Biblo
bio: Biblo is a very old, giant owl and the chief librarian of the Owl Library, overseeing everything inside and keeping its books giant-sized.

name: Big Pan
bio: Big Pan is the largest former member of the Foxy Pirates and a combatant of the Groggy Monsters. He is a wotan, being half loach fish-man and half giant.

name: Bimine
bio: Bimine is the mayor of Pucci, "The Gourmet Town". He was first mentioned when the town of Pucci was brought up by Kalifa.

name: Bingo
bio: Bingo is a former priest and cooper who currently lives in Ebisu Town in Wano Country. He formerly lived in the Flower Capital before losing all his money and being exiled.

name: Binz
bio: Binz is an officer of the Neo Marines and a former member of the Marines. He is a major antagonist of One Piece Film: Z.

name: Birdy
bio: Birdy is a Sea King. It is one of the six Sea Kings that speak to Shirahoshi when she fully manifests the power of Poseidon.

name: Bishamon
bio: Bishamon is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates. He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country, Kurozumi Orochi.

name: Bishonure-Onna
bio: Bishonure-Onna is a Gifter of the Beasts Pirates who works under Black Maria.

name: Bisley
bio: Bisley is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates and part of the Armored Division led by Sasaki. During the Raid on Onigashima, he was tamed by the power of the Kibi Kibi no Mi and joined the side of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance.

name: Biyo
bio: Biyo is a child who was held captive on Punk Hazard by Caesar Clown. He was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates.

name: Bizarre
bio: Bizarre is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Bjorn
bio: Bjorn is the younger brother of Road and a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph.

name: Black Maria
bio: Black Maria is one of the Tobiroppo, the strongest six Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates. She owns her own brothel on Onigashima near Kaidou's castle.

name: Blackback
bio: Blackback, also known by his initials BB, is a gorilla mink and a Guardian of the Whale Forest.

name: Blade
bio: Blade is a giant from Elbaph who works as math teacher at the Walrus School.

name: Blakey
bio: Blakey is a longnose lancetfish fish-man and a drummer in a swing jazz orchestra from Fish-Man Island.

name: Blamenco
bio: Blamenco is the former 6th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Blenheim
bio: Blenheim is the former 9th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Blondie
bio: Blondie is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Blue Fan
bio: Blue Fan is a member of the Kuja Pirates.

name: Blue Gilly
bio: Blue Gilly is a martial artist from the Longleg Tribe. He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Bluegrass
bio: Bluegrass is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine that took part in the Egghead Incident. She serves as a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc.

name: Bluejam
bio: Bluejam was the captain of the Bluejam Pirates, and an infamous pirate of the East Blue. He was the main antagonist of the Post-War Arc during Luffy's flashback sequence.

name: Blueno
bio: Blueno is an agent of CP0. Before the time skip, he was previously an agent of CP9; operating undercover as the bartender of a bar in Water 7.

name: Blumarine
bio: Blumarine was the shipwright of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Boa Hancock
occupation: Captain of the Kuja Pirates; Empress of Amazon Lily ; Warlord of the Sea (former); Slave (former)
bio: "Pirate Empress" Boa Hancock is the current captain of the Kuja Pirates and was the only female Warlord of the Sea before the organization's disbandment. She is the current empress of Amazon Lily, also known as the "Snake Princess".

name: Boa Marigold
bio: Boa Marigold is the younger sister of Boa Hancock, the ruler of Amazon Lily. She is also one of the second-in commands of the Kuja Pirates and the younger sister of Boa Sandersonia.

name: Boa Sandersonia
bio: Boa Sandersonia is the younger sister of Boa Hancock, the ruler of Amazon Lily. She is also one of the second-in commands of the Kuja Pirates and the older sister of Boa Marigold.

name: Bobbin
bio: "Sweeper" Bobbin is a bishop-ranked combatant of the Big Mom Pirates. Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Whole Cake Island Arc.

name: Bobby Funk
bio: Bobby Funk is an assassin from the Mogaro Kingdom and Kelly Funk's younger brother. He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Bobomba
bio: Bobomba is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom and the younger brother of Bomba.

name: Bogard
bio: Bogard is a Marine Headquarters Marine officer and the right hand man of Vice Admiral Monkey D. Garp.

name: Bomba
occupation: Vice Chief ( 副長 , Fukuchō ? ) ; Pirate
bio: Bomba is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom. He is one of the two vice chiefs of the Tonta Corps along with Rampo, under Gancho and Leo, and serves under Leo in the Tontatta Pirates.

name: Bongo
bio: Bongo is a former lumber dealer who currently lives in Ebisu Town in Wano Country. He formerly lived in the Flower Capital, but was exiled after being swindled by Komurasaki.

name: Bonk Punch
bio: Bonk Punch is one of the Senior Officers and musicians of the Red Hair Pirates.

name: Boo
occupation: First Mate of the Happo Navy; Martial Artist (VIZ: Fighter)
bio: Boo is a member of the Chinjao Family and the vice-leader of the Happo Navy. He is a martial artist who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Boodle
bio: Boodle is the mayor of Orange Town. He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Orange Town Arc.

name: Boogie
bio: Boogie is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Borsalino
bio: Borsalino, more commonly known by his alias Kizaru, is an Admiral in the Marines. After Kuzan resigned from the Marines and Sakazuki was promoted to Fleet Admiral, Kizaru is now the only remaining Admiral from the previous trio.

name: Braham
bio: Braham is one of the Shandia warriors who fought to take back Upper Yard from Enel. After the timeskip, he joined the God's Guards under Wyper.

name: Brannew
bio: Commodore Brannew is a Marine officer stationed at Marine Headquarters who assigns bounties to criminals. He was first introduced as a lieutenant commander during the Loguetown Arc, but was promoted to commodore during the timeskip.

name: Brew
bio: Brew is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Briscola
bio: Briscola is a Shinuchi in the Beasts Pirates. During the raid on Onigashima, he was tamed by the power of the Kibi Kibi no Mi and joined the side of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance.

name: Brocca
bio: Brocca is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Brogy
bio: Brogy the Red Ogre is a giant from Elbaph and one of the two captains of the Giant Warrior Pirates alongside Dorry. Once an active and infamous threat in the seas long ago, Brogy became embroiled in a personal duel over a trivial dispute with his best friend and co-captain Dorry.

name: Brontosaurus
bio: Brontosaurus was a dinosaur who lived on Little Garden.

name: Brook
occupation: Musician ; Swordsman ; Senior Officer ; Pirate Captain (acting, former); Battle Convoy leader (former); World-Famous Rock Star (former)
bio: "Soul King" Brook is the musician of the Straw Hat Pirates, one of their two swordsmen, and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet. He is the ninth member of the crew and the eighth to join, doing so at the end of the Thriller Bark Arc.

name: Bubblegum
bio: Bubblegum is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Buche
bio: Buche is a member of the WCI 31, serving as the head chef of the first kitchen.

name: Buchi
bio: Buchi is an officer of the Black Cat Pirates. Along with his partner Sham, he is also the protector of the crew's ship, the Bezan Black, and together they are known as the Nyaban Brothers.

name: Buckingham Stussy
occupation: Pirate (former); Scientist (former, self-proclaimed); Science Robber ( 科学強盗 , Kagaku Gōtō ? )
bio: Miss Buckingham Stussy, also known by her alias Miss Buckin, is a former member of both the Rocks Pirates and the illegal science institute MADS. She is the self-proclaimed lover of the deceased Emperor Edward Newgate and the mother of Edward Weevil, a former Warlord of the Sea.

name: Buffalo
bio: Buffalo is a combatant and an assassin of the Donquixote Pirates and an officer of the Pica Army. His real name is yet to be revealed, as "Buffalo" is a codename given to him upon joining the Donquixote Pirates.

name: Buggy
occupation: Pirate Captain ; Emperor ; Figurehead President of Cross Guild; Chairman of Buggy's Delivery (former); Warlord of the Sea (former); Apprentice (former); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
bio: Buggy the Star Clown is the nominal president of Cross Guild, and one of the current Four Emperors dominating the New World. Initially a Roger Pirates apprentice alongside Shanks, Buggy succeeded his disbanded mentors as a career pirate in the East Blue, in time becoming captain of the Buggy Pirates.

name: Buhichuck
bio: Buhichuck was the boss of the " Surprise Zombies " in the dining room.

name: Building Snake
bio: Building Snake is one of the Senior Officers and the navigator of the Red Hair Pirates.

name: Bulldog
bio: Bulldog is the son of Conney and the king of the Sorbet Kingdom. He held the throne one generation before Bekori’s reign, and reclaimed his position after Bekori's successor Bartholomew Kuma became a fugitive.

name: Bunbuku
bio: Bunbuku is a teapot owned by Tenguyama Hitetsu that was given life by "eating" the Inu Inu no Mi, Model: Tanuki.

name: Bungo
bio: Bungo is an arsonist in Wano Country who currently lives in Ebisu Town. He formerly lived in the Flower Capital, but was exiled after being swindled by Komurasaki.

name: Bunny Joe
bio: Bunny Joe is a member of the Revolutionary Army and the leader of the group tasked with freeing the slaves on Tequila Wolf, including Nico Robin.

name: Bushon
bio: Bushon is one of the Sea Train organizers in Water 7, along with Stevie.

name: Busshiri
bio: Busshiri was one of the archaeologists of Ohara.

name: Byron
bio: Byron is one of the slaves who was sold at the Human Auctioning House and was the first in the queue for sale. He is a pirate and musician.

name: CB Gallant
bio: CB Gallant was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Cabaji
occupation: Pirate ; Chief of Staff ; Acrobat; Swordsman
bio: Cabaji the Acrobat is the Buggy Pirates chief of staff, as well as an acrobat swordsman. He was a member of Buggy's Delivery, and is currently a member of Cross Guild.

name: Caesar Clown
bio: Caesar Clown, who was referred to as " Master " by his subordinates, is a scientist, the leading expert on chemical weapons of mass destruction, and one of the co-founders of NEO MADS. Caesar is a former colleague of Vegapunk, having worked with him both in MADS and later the World Government research facility on Punk Hazard, an island that Caesar went on to devastate with a toxic gas explosion, earning him a bounty of 300,000,000.

name: Caimanlady
bio: Caimanlady is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates, being part of the surveillance division called the " Marys ".

name: Camel
bio: Camel is Kuzan's former super penguin traveling companion.

name: Camie
occupation: Fashion designing apprentice Takoyaki seller Waitress at Mermaid Cafe
bio: Camie is a kissing gourami mermaid that first appeared in Hatchan's Sea-Floor Stroll cover story. She first appeared in the main series after being spat out of a large sea boar that was saved by Hatchan, along with her starfish pet and master, Pappag.

name: Cancer
bio: Cancer is a Marine vice admiral.

name: Candre
bio: Candre is Andre's twin brother and an officer within the Marines.

name: Cands
bio: Cands is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard. He only appears in the manga.

name: Candy
bio: Candy is the captain of the Candy Pirates.

name: Capone Bege
bio: Capone "Gang" Bege is a mafia don-turned- pirate and the captain of the Fire Tank Pirates. He is also one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation ".

name: Capone Pez
bio: Capone "Gang" Pez is the infant son of Capone Bege and Charlotte Chiffon, as well as the grandson of Charlotte Linlin and Pound.

name: Capote
bio: Capote is a billfish fish-man and a former combatant of the Foxy Pirates. Due to his actions, he is a major antagonist during the Long Ring Long Land Arc.

name: Caribou
bio: "Wet-Haired Caribou" is an infamous rookie pirate who was at the Sabaody Archipelago around the time of the Straw Hat Pirates ' reunion. He has earned a bounty of 210,000,000, making him part of the new generation of rookie pirates with bounties over 100,000,000.

name: Carina
bio: "Phantom Thief" Carina is a character who appears in Heart of Gold and One Piece Film: Gold. She is a thief who formerly worked as a songstress in Gran Tesoro, plotting to steal its riches.

name: Carmel
occupation: Child Trafficker; Caretaker of Sheep's House
bio: Mother Carmel was a child trafficker dealing in orphans, that operated in the Underworld several decades ago, under the code name of "Mountain Witch". Running an orphanage known as the " Sheep's House ", her seemingly benevolent nature caused her to be known as the "Holy Mother".

name: Carne
bio: Carne is one of the main cooks at the Baratie, currently serving as the restaurant's head charcutier.

name: Carrot
occupation: Ruler of Mokomo Dukedom; Musketeer (former); Kingsbird (former)
bio: Carrot is a rabbit mink, the current ruler of the Mokomo Dukedom, and a former member of the Kingsbirds and Inuarashi Musketeer Squad. She was trained by Pedro, whose will she carries on.

name: Catacombo
bio: Rear Admiral Catacombo is a Marine officer who led a team to capture the Straw Hat Pirates. Non-canonically, he is the Base Commander of the GR 66 Marine Base on the Sabaody Archipelago.

name: Catarina Devon
occupation: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Sixth Ship); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
bio: Catarina Devon, known as the "Crescent Moon Hunter", is one of Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates, serving as captain of the sixth ship of the fleet. She is regarded as the worst female pirate in history and was one of the most dangerous criminals ever to be imprisoned within Impel Down until she was freed and recruited by Marshall D. Teach.

name: Caucasusman
bio: Caucasusman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates ' Armored Division. During the Raid on Onigashima, he was tamed by the power of the Kibi Kibi no Mi and joined the side of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance.

name: Cavendish
occupation: Captain of the First Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Pirate Captain ; Prince of the Bourgeois Kingdom (former)
bio: Cavendish of the White Horse, also known as the " Pirate Prince ", is a famous Super Rookie and the captain of the Beautiful Pirates. He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Cerberus
bio: Cerberus is Figarland Shamrock's sword, which has been animated by a Mythical Zoan-type Devil Fruit, allowing it to take the form of a monstrous, three-headed dog.

name: Cezar
bio: Cezar is the recently-crowned king of the Ilisia Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Chabo
bio: Chabo is a young boy from Gosa Village. He works for Nojiko on her mikan farm.

name: Chaka
bio: Chaka the Jackal is one of two head guards in the Arabasta kingdom who serves under Igaram, alongside Pell. Chaka was the acting captain of the royal guard in Igaram's absence.

name: Chao
bio: Chao is a dwarf from the Tontatta Kingdom who was enslaved in the SMILE Factory.

name: Chap
bio: Chap is the king of the Deul Kingdom in the North Blue and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Chappe
bio: "Rope-Tugging" Chappe is an ex-prisoner and former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard, having served as one of Caesar Clown’s henchmen. He was first seen fighting against the Marines of G-5 on Punk Hazard.

name: Charlotte Amande
bio: "Demon Lady" Charlotte Amande is the third daughter and seventh child of the Charlotte Family, the second quadruplet sister to Mondée, Hachée, and Effilée, and a snakeneck - human hybrid. She also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Nuts, governing over Nuts Island.

name: Charlotte Anana
bio: Charlotte Anana is the 39th daughter of the Charlotte Family, as well as the 85th and youngest overall child, and is a member of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Angel
bio: Charlotte Angel is the seventh daughter and 17th child of the Charlotte Family and the younger triplet sister of Cracker and Custard. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Anglais
bio: Charlotte Anglais is the 42nd son and 78th child of the Charlotte Family and a member of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Basans
bio: Charlotte Basans is the 23rd son and 39th child of the Charlotte Family and the younger twin brother of Saint-Marc. He also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Basskarte
bio: Charlotte Basskarte is the 13th son and 22nd child of the Charlotte Family and the middle triplet brother of Nusstorte and Dosmarche. He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Bavarois
bio: Charlotte Bavarois is the 26th son and 45th child of the Charlotte Family, as well as an officer of the Big Mom Pirates. He is the younger twin brother of Snack.

name: Charlotte Brownie
bio: Charlotte Brownie is the 32nd son and 58th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates. He joined Charlotte Oven's army to intercept the Straw Hat Pirates on Cacao Island.

name: Charlotte Broyé
bio: Charlotte Broyé is the ninth daughter and 20th child of the Charlotte Family and the younger twin sister of Brûlée. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Meringue, governing over Milenge Island.

name: Charlotte Brûlée
bio: Charlotte Brûlée is the eighth daughter and 19th child of the Charlotte Family and the older twin sister of Broyé. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Cabaletta
bio: Charlotte Cabaletta is the eighth son and the 13th child of the Charlotte Family and the fourth quintuplet brother of Opera, Counter, Cadenza, and Gala. He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Cadenza
bio: Charlotte Cadenza is the seventh son and the twelfth child of the Charlotte Family and the third quintuplet brother of Opera, Counter, Cabaletta, and Gala. He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Chiboust
bio: Charlotte Chiboust is the 30th son and 51st child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates. He also serves as Totto Land's Minister of Mix, governing over Sanshoku Island.

name: Charlotte Chiffon
bio: Charlotte Chiffon is the 22nd daughter and the 52nd child of the Charlotte Family and Totto Land's former Minister of Puff having governed over Funwari Island until her defection. She is Capone Bege's wife and the mother of Capone Pez, as well as a member of Bege's Fire Tank Pirates.

name: Charlotte Cinnamon
bio: Charlotte Cinnamon is the 16th daughter and 37th child of the Charlotte Family, the younger triplet sister of Smoothie and Citron, and a longleg - human hybrid. She also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Citron
bio: Charlotte Citron is the 15th daughter and 36th child of the Charlotte Family, the middle triplet sister of Smoothie and Cinnamon, and a longleg - human hybrid. She also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Eggs, governing over Kimi Island.

name: Charlotte Compo
bio: Charlotte Compo is the 17th son and 28th child of the Charlotte Family and the older twin brother of Laurin. He also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Pie, governing over Piepie Island.

name: Charlotte Compote
bio: Charlotte Compote is the eldest daughter and second child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates. She also serves as Totto Land's Minister of Fruits, governing over Fruits Island.

name: Charlotte Cornstarch
bio: Charlotte Cornstarch is the 11th daughter and 27th child of the Charlotte Family and the younger triplet sister of Moscato and Mash. She also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Love, governing over Loving Island.

name: Charlotte Counter
bio: Charlotte Counter is the sixth son and the 11th child of the Charlotte Family and the second quintuplet brother of Opera, Cadenza, Cabaletta, and Gala. He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Cracker
bio: "Thousand Arms" Charlotte Cracker is the tenth son and 15th child of the Charlotte Family and the oldest triplet brother of Custard and Angel. He is also one of the Three Sweet Commanders of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Biscuits, governing Biscuits Island.

name: Charlotte Custard
bio: Charlotte Custard is the sixth daughter and 16th child of the Charlotte Family and the middle triplet sister of Cracker and Angel. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Dacquoise
bio: Charlotte Dacquoise is the 24th son and 41st child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates. He also serves as Totto Land's Minister of Jam, governing over Jam Island.

name: Charlotte Daifuku
bio: Charlotte Daifuku is the third son and fourth child of the Charlotte Family and the middle triplet brother of Katakuri and Oven. He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Beans, governing over Poripori Island.

name: Charlotte De-Chat
bio: Charlotte De-Chat is the 44th son and the 81st child of the Charlotte Family. He is a hybrid between a human and a fish-man.

name: Charlotte Decuplets
bio: The Charlotte Decuplets are the 36-40th sons and 30-34th daughters of the Charlotte Family, making up the 65-74th children in the family, and are all officers of the Big Mom Pirates. They are the largest group of Big Mom's children born in a single birth.

name: Charlotte Dosmarche
bio: Charlotte Dosmarche is the 14th son and 23rd child of the Charlotte Family and the younger triplet brother of Nusstorte and Basskarte. He also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Tea, governing over Black Island.

name: Charlotte Dragée
bio: Charlotte Dolce and Charlotte Dragée are the 45th and 46th sons and the 83rd and 84th children of the Charlotte Family, being the two youngest sons of Charlotte Linlin, and are members of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Effilée
bio: Charlotte Effilée is the fifth daughter and ninth child of the Charlotte Family, the youngest quadruplet sister of Mondée, Amande, and Hachée, and a snakeneck - human hybrid. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Flampe
occupation: Pirate Officer ; Minister of Honey; Special Attack Unit Captain; Katakuri Fan Club President
bio: Charlotte Flampe is the 36th daughter and 77th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates, serving as the Captain of the Special Attack Unit. She is also Totto Land's Minister of Honey, governing over Rokumitsu Island, and the President of the Katakuri Fan Club.

name: Charlotte Galette
bio: Charlotte Galette is the 18th daughter and the 42nd child of the Charlotte Family and the older twin sister of Poire. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Butter, governing over Margarine Island.

name: Charlotte Hachée
bio: Charlotte Hachée is the fourth daughter and eighth child of the Charlotte Family, the third quadruplet sister to Mondée, Amande, and Effilée, and a snakeneck - human hybrid. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte High-Fat
bio: Charlotte High-Fat is the 20th son and 33rd child of the Charlotte Family and the older twin brother of Tablet. He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Joconde
bio: Charlotte Joconde is the 27th daughter and 59th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates. She was also a member of Charlotte Oven's army to intercept the Straw Hat Pirates on Cacao Island.

name: Charlotte Joscarpone
bio: Charlotte Joscarpone is the 29th daughter and 63rd child of the Charlotte Family, the younger twin sister of Charlotte Mascarpone, and a Snakeneck - human hybrid. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Kanten
bio: Charlotte Kanten is the 27th son and 48th child of the Charlotte Family and the eldest triplet brother of Kato and Montb. He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Agar, governing over Jelly Island.

name: Charlotte Katakuri
bio: Charlotte Katakuri is the second son and third child of the Charlotte Family and the elder triplet brother of Daifuku and Oven. He is also one of the Three Sweet Commanders of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Flour, governing over Komugi Island.

name: Charlotte Kato
bio: Charlotte Kato is the 28th son and 49th child of the Charlotte Family and the middle triplet brother of Kanten and Montb. He also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Seeds, governing over Tanega Island.

name: Charlotte Laurin
bio: Charlotte Laurin is the 18th son and 29th child of the Charlotte Family and the younger twin brother of Compo. He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Linlin
occupation: Pirate Captain ; Emperor (former); Queen of Totto Land
bio: Charlotte Linlin, better known as "Big Mom", is the captain of the Big Mom Pirates and was formerly one of the Four Emperors ruling over the New World, as the only female member of the group. She is the queen of the archipelago nation Totto Land, a place she seeks to form into a utopia where all the world's races can live together in peace without discrimination or segregation.

name: Charlotte Maple
bio: Charlotte Maple is the 26th daughter and 57th child of the Charlotte Family, the youngest quadruplet sister of Mobile, Marble, and Myukuru, and a Longarm - human hybrid. She also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Marble
bio: Charlotte Marble is the 24th daughter and 55th child of the Charlotte Family, the second quadruplet sister of Mobile, Myukuru, and Maple, and a Longarm - human hybrid. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Marnier
bio: Charlotte Marnier is the 13th daughter and 32nd child of the Charlotte Family and the younger twin sister of Mozart. She also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Yeast, governing over Kibo Island.

name: Charlotte Mascarpone
bio: Charlotte Mascarpone is the 34th son and 62nd child of the Charlotte Family, the older twin brother of Joscarpone, and a Snakeneck - human hybrid. He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Tableware, governing over Cutlery Island.

name: Charlotte Mash
bio: Charlotte Mash is the tenth daughter and 26th child of the Charlotte Family and the middle triplet sister of Moscato and Cornstarch. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Melise
bio: Charlotte Melise is the 17th daughter and 40th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Mobile
bio: Charlotte Mobile is the 31st son and 54th child of the Charlotte Family, the elder quadruplet brother of Marble, Myukuru, and Maple, and a Longarm - human hybrid. He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Tasting, governing over Futoru Island.

name: Charlotte Mondée
bio: Charlotte Mondée is the second daughter and sixth child of the Charlotte Family, the eldest quadruplet sister of Amande, Hachée, and Effilée, and a snakeneck - human hybrid. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Mont-d'Or
bio: "Scribe" Charlotte Mont-d'Or is the 19th son and 30th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates. He also serves as Totto Land's Minister of Cheese, governing over Cheese Island.

name: Charlotte Montb
bio: Charlotte Montb is the 29th son and 50th child of the Charlotte Family and the youngest triplet brother of Kanten and Kato. He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Moscato
bio: Charlotte Moscato is the 16th son and 25th child of the Charlotte Family and the eldest triplet brother of Mash and Cornstarch. He also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Gelato, governing over Ice Island.

name: Charlotte Mozart
bio: Charlotte Mozart is the 12th daughter and 31st child of the Charlotte Family and the elder twin sister of Marnier. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Myukuru
bio: Charlotte Myukuru is the 25th daughter and 56th child of the Charlotte Family, the third quadruplet sister of Mobile, Marble, and Maple, and a longarm - human hybrid. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Noisette
bio: Charlotte Noisette is the 15th son and 24th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates. He also serves as Totto Land's Minister of Finance, governing over Kinko Island.

name: Charlotte Normande
bio: Charlotte Normande is the 38th daughter and the 82nd child of the Charlotte Family. She is a dosundada, a hybrid between a human and a dwarf.

name: Charlotte Nougat
bio: Charlotte Nougat is the 41st son and 75th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates. He was a member of Charlotte Oven's army to ambush Monkey D. Luffy on Cacao Island.

name: Charlotte Nusstorte
bio: Charlotte Nusstorte is the 12th son and 21st child of the Charlotte Family and the eldest triplet brother of Basskarte and Dosmarche. He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Transport, governing over Package Island.

name: Charlotte Opera
occupation: Pirate Officer ; Minister of Whipped Cream
bio: Charlotte Opera is the fifth son and the tenth child of the Charlotte Family and is the eldest quintuplet brother of Counter, Cadenza, Cabaletta, and Gala. He also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and served as Totto Land's Minister of Whipped Cream, governing over Noko Island.

name: Charlotte Oven
occupation: Pirate Officer ; Minister of Browned Food
bio: Charlotte Oven is the fourth son and fifth child of the Charlotte Family and the younger triplet brother of Katakuri and Daifuku. He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Browned Food, governing over Yakigashi Island.

name: Charlotte Panna
bio: Charlotte Panna is the 28th daughter and 61st child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates. She was a member of Charlotte Oven's army to ambush Monkey D. Luffy on Cacao Island.

name: Charlotte Perospero
bio: Charlotte Perospero is the eldest child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates. He also serves as Totto Land's Minister of Candy, governing over Candy Island.

name: Charlotte Poire
bio: Charlotte Poire is the 19th daughter and the 43rd child of the Charlotte Family, the younger twin sister of Galette, and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Praline
bio: Charlotte Praline is a half - human and half- hammerhead shark mermaid, the 21st daughter and 47th child of the Charlotte Family, and the younger twin sister of Prim. She was also Totto Land's former Minister of Design, having governed over Unique Island until her defection.

name: Charlotte Prim
bio: Charlotte Prim is the 20th daughter and 46th child of the Charlotte Family, the older twin sister of Praline, and an octopus mermaid - human hybrid. She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Charlotte Pudding
bio: Charlotte Pudding is the 35th daughter and the 76th child of the Charlotte Family, an officer of the Big Mom Pirates, and a hybrid between a human and a member of the Three-Eye Tribe. She also works as a chocolatier and the owner of cafe "Caramel" on Cacao Island, as the candidate for the vacant position of Minister of Chocolate.

name: Charlotte Raisin
bio: Charlotte Raisin is the 33rd son and 60th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates. He was a member of Big Mom's enraged army sent to fight Monkey D. Luffy, and later joined Charlotte Oven's army to ambush Luffy on Cacao Island.

name: Charlotte Saint-Marc
bio: Charlotte Saint-Marc is the 22nd son and the 38th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates. He also serves as Totto Land's Minister of Essence, governing over Flavor Island.

name: Charlotte Smoothie
bio: Charlotte Smoothie is the 14th daughter and 35th child of the Charlotte Family, the older triplet sister of Citron and Cinnamon, and a longleg - human hybrid. She serves as one of the Three Sweet Commanders of the Big Mom Pirates and as Totto Land's Minister of Juice, governing over 100% Island.

name: Charlotte Snack
occupation: Pirate Officer; Minister of Fries; Sweet Commander (former)
bio: Charlotte Snack is the 25th son and 44th child of the Charlotte Family and the older twin brother of Bavarois. He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Fries, governing over Potato Island.

name: Charlotte Tablet
bio: Charlotte Tablet is the 21st son and 34th child of the Charlotte Family and the younger twin brother of High-Fat. He also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land's Minister of Toppings, governing over Topping Island.

name: Charlotte Wafers
bio: Charlotte Wafers is the 37th daughter and the 79th child of the Charlotte Family.

name: Charlotte Wiro
bio: Charlotte Wiro is the 43rd son and the 80th child of the Charlotte Family. He is a Human - Snakeneck hybrid.

name: Charlotte Yuen
bio: Charlotte Yuen is the 35th son and 64th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates. He was a member of Charlotte Oven's army to ambush Monkey D. Luffy on Cacao Island.

name: Charlotte Zuccotto
bio: Charlotte Zuccotto is the 11th son and the 18th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates. He also serves as Totto Land's Minister of Alcohol, governing over Liqueur Island.

name: Chess
occupation: Evil Chief of Staff (Chief of Staff); Pirate
bio: Chess is a former evil chief of staff serving under Wapol. After the attack of Blackbeard, he became a pirate alongside his king, until their subsequent return to Drum Island.

name: Chesskippa
bio: Chesskippa the Hanger-on is a pirate captain from Robin's past.

name: Chessmarimo
bio: Chessmarimo is a fusion of Chess and Kuromarimo, created by Wapol's Baku Baku Factory.

name: Chew
bio: Chew is a smelt-whiting fish-man and an officer of the Arlong Pirates. He is also a former member of the Sun Pirates.

name: Chichilisia
bio: Chichilisia is the leader of the Niho Navy and the father of Uholisia.

name: Chicken
bio: Chicken is the wife of Gyoru and a fishmonger of Foosha Village.

name: Chicory
bio: Chicory is a dwarf from the Tontatta Kingdom and a member of the Tontatta Pirates.

name: Chihaya
bio: Chihaya is a child who lives in the Flower Capital and attended Sarahebi's classes during Kaidou's reign.

name: Chimney
occupation: Sunday stationmaster of the Shift Station
bio: Chimney is the granddaughter of Sea Train conductor Kokoro, her only mermaid grandparent, making Chimney 1/4 mermaid. She is the owner of a rabbit named Gonbe (whom Chimney thinks is a cat).

name: Chinjao
occupation: 12th Leader of the Happo Navy (retired); Pirate (former)
bio: Chinjao, formerly known as "Don Chinjao" and "Chinjao the Drill", is a former pirate, the leader of the Chinjao Family, and the retired 12th leader of the Happo Navy. He also joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Chiya
bio: Chiya was the Shandia Pantri that lived over 400 years ago, who died of Tree Fever.

name: Cho
bio: "Moonflower" O-Cho is a yakuza boss who was in charge of the Ringo region in Wano Country. She was imprisoned in Udon by the Beasts Pirates, but was freed when Luffy took over the prison.

name: Chochinman
bio: Chochinman is a Gifter of the Beasts Pirates and a member of the Marys, the crew's surveillance division.

name: Chocho
bio: O-Chocho is a woman who lives in Okobore Town in Wano Country.

name: Choco Police
bio: Choco Police is a police officer in charge of watching over Chocolat Town on Cacao Island.

name: Choi
bio: Choi is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Chokyumei-no Chosuke
bio: Chokyumei-no Chosuke is a young boy from the Hakumai region of the Wano Country. He is the brother of Jugemu Jugemuko.

name: Chome
bio: Chome is a kunoichi and a member of the Beasts Pirates. She previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country, Kurozumi Orochi.

name: Chouchou
bio: Chouchou is a dog from Orange Town, famed for his unceasing vigil over the pet-food shop founded by his deceased owner. He is classified as a Type B creature, "Small Friendly".

name: Chuchun
bio: Chuchun is a Super Sparrow ridden by Itomimizu. He and Itomimizu witnessed all the Davy Back Fight games between the Foxy Pirates and the Straw Hat Pirates.

name: Chuji
bio: Chuji is the pet rat of the geisha Some.

name: Clapp
bio: Clapp was the father of Bartholomew Kuma and a member of the Buccaneers race. His family lived in the Sorbet Kingdom until they were all captured and made slaves in Mary Geoise.

name: Clione
bio: Clione is a member of the Heart Pirates.

name: Clover
occupation: Professor and archaeologist of the Tree of Knowledge ; Explorer (former)
bio: Clou D. Clover, commonly known as Professor Clover, was the director of the Ohara Library, and a leading authority on archaeology. He was a professor and archaeologist who studied Poneglyphs with his fellow colleagues in the Tree of Knowledge.

name: Coburn
bio: Coburn was the leader of the Shandia tribe from 400 years ago.

name: Cocox
origin: East Blue ( Island of Rare Animals )
bio: Cocox is an animal who lives on the Island of Rare Animals. Like all the animals on the island, he is protected by Gaimon.

name: Colon
bio: Colon is a resident of Elbaph and the half- human, half- giant son of Scopper Gaban and Ripley. He is the self-proclaimed captain of the "Colon Pirates".

name: Colscon
bio: Colscon is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Columbus
bio: Columbus is a member of the Yonta Maria Grand Fleet.

name: Comil
occupation: Vice Admiral ; Base Commander of G-2
bio: Vice Admiral Comil is the commander of Marine Base G-2. He first appeared in Portgas D. Ace's cover story, and later took part in the Summit War of Marineford.

name: Compo
bio: Compo is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Concelot
bio: Concelot is a fox mink and one of the Three Inuarashi Musketeers leading the squad.

name: Conis
bio: Conis is a citizen of Skypiea who befriended Monkey D. Luffy and his crew after their arrival. She is Pagaya's daughter and owner of a cloud fox named Su.

name: Conney
occupation: Queen dowager of the Sorbet Kingdom
bio: Conney is the queen dowager of the Sorbet Kingdom as the mother of King Bulldog.

name: Corgi
bio: Corgi is a World Government official who took part in the mission to acquire the blueprints of Pluton and escort the prisoners Nico Robin and Cutty Flam to Enies Lobby. He acted as the leader of the forces in the Sea Train, answering directly to the CP9 agents.

name: Coribou
bio: "Blood-Splatterer" Coribou is a captain of the Caribou Pirates, along with his big brother Caribou. He is famous for killing Marines and was at the Sabaody Archipelago around the time of the Straw Hat Pirates ' reunion.

name: Cornelia
bio: Cornelia is a member of the Spade Pirates.

name: Cosette
bio: Cosette is the head chef employed in the Germa Kingdom's royal household.

name: Cosmo
bio: Sergeant Cosmo is one of the automata created on Karakuri Island by Dr. Tsukimi.

name: Cosmos
bio: Cosmos is a member of the Kuja Pirates.

name: Cotton
bio: Cotton is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared in the Riku Royal Army Headquarters beneath the Flower Field.

name: Couran
bio: Couran is the king of the Cameron Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Crocodile
occupation: Pirate ; Cross Guild Officer ; Baroque Works President (former); Proprietor of Rain Dinners (former); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
bio: "Desert King" Sir Crocodile is a former Warlord of the Sea and former president—under the codename "Mr. 0" —of the mysterious crime syndicate Baroque Works.

name: Crocus
bio: Crocus is a doctor and the caretaker of the whale Laboon as well as the overseer of the Twin Cape Lighthouse, which guides all ships using Reverse Mountain to enter the Grand Line. Though a lighthouse keeper for most of his life, Crocus spent three years serving as a doctor on Gol D. Roger's crew.

name: Curiel
bio: Curiel is the former 10th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Curly Dadan
occupation: Mountain Bandit Boss ; Caretaker of Monkey D. Luffy , Portgas D. Ace , and Sabo (former)
bio: Curly Dadan is a mountain bandit and the boss of the Dadan Family who lives on Mt. Colubo near Foosha Village.

name: Dachoman
bio: Dachoman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates.

name: Daddy Dee
bio: Daddy Dee is one of the houseparents, alongside Mummy Mee, of a World Government-affiliated orphanage situated on the Conomi Islands.

name: Dagama
bio: Dagama is the tactician of the Prodence Kingdom. He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Dago
bio: Dago is one of the Franky Family's Kairiki Destroyers.

name: Daidalos
bio: Daidalos was a giant squid that was close friends with Ikaros Much.

name: Daifugo
occupation: Shinuchi ; Vice Warden of the Prisoner Mine
bio: Daifugo is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates who served as a vice warden of the Prisoner Mine in the Udon region of Wano Country until his defeat during the prison uprising. After being tamed by Kurozumi Tama, he became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance.

name: Daigin
bio: Daigin is a Marine Commodore who led the team that went to Impel Down to capture the intruder, Monkey D. Luffy.

name: Daikoku
bio: Daikoku is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates. He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country, Kurozumi Orochi.

name: Daikon
bio: Daikon is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared on Green Bit.

name: Daisy
bio: Daisy is a member of the Kuja Pirates.

name: Dalmatian
bio: Vice Admiral Dalmatian is one of the many Marine vice admirals to have participated in the Summit War of Marineford.

name: Dalton
occupation: King of the Sakura Kingdom ; Captain of the Civilian Guard (former); Captain of Security of the Drum Kingdom (former);
bio: Dalton is the elected king of the Sakura Kingdom (successor to the Drum Kingdom). He was formerly the captain of security of the Drum Kingdom under King Wapol.

name: Damask
bio: Damask is a pyromaniac who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Daruma
bio: Daruma is a cookie-cutter shark fish-man‎ and an officer of the New Fish-Man‎ Pirates before their downfall and disbandment. Due to his actions and role, he is considered to be a major antagonist in the Fish-Man Island Arc.

name: Dashiteyaro
bio: Dashiteyaro is a retainer of the Kurozumi Family and a prison guard who lives in the Flower Capital of Wano Country.

name: Daz Bonez
occupation: Pirate ; Assassin ; Officer Agent (former); Bounty Hunter (former)
bio: "The Killer" Daz Bonez, alias Mr. 1, is a former bounty hunter and the former highest-ranked male Officer Agent of Baroque Works.

name: Decalvan Brothers
bio: The Decalvan Brothers are two infamous New World pirate captains who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Deigoro
bio: Deigoro is a man living in the Wano Country's Flower Capital.

name: Delacuaji
bio: Delacuaji is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Dellinger
bio: Dellinger is a combatant and an officer of the Donquixote Pirates ' Diamante Army who is a hybrid between a human and a fighting fish fish-man. Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist during the Dressrosa Arc.

name: Demalo Black
bio: "Three-Tongued" Demalo Black is the former captain of the Fake Straw Hat Crew. He impersonated Monkey D. Luffy to benefit from his reputation, but was later arrested by Sentomaru.

name: Demoni Aiyo
bio: Demoni Aiyo is a hairstylist who lives in Dressrosa.

name: Den
occupation: Shipwright ; Sea Forest Researcher; Coating Mechanic
bio: Den is Tom's younger brother. He is a bering wolffish merman.

name: Denjiro
occupation: Daimyo ; Samurai ; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family (former); Yakuza Boss (former); Money Changer (former); Thief (former)
bio: Denjiro is a samurai from Wano Country and one of the Nine Red Scabbards who served as Kouzuki Oden's retainers. He currently serves as the daimyo of Kibi.

name: Devil Dias
bio: Devil Dias is a pirate and the former captain of the Acumate Pirates, but was captured and sold as a slave to the family of World Noble Saint Rosward.

name: Diamante
occupation: Pirate Executive Officer; Colosseum Proprietor (former); Swordsman
bio: Diamante is one of the top three officers of the Donquixote Pirates. He occupies the Diamond seat of the Donquixote Family and is the leader of the crew's Diamante Army subdivision.

name: Dice
bio: Dice is an underground champion in death matches who is an executive member of Gild Tesoro's crew and works on Gran Tesoro as the dealer. He appears in One Piece Film: Gold.

name: Didit
bio: Didit is a noble living in the Goa Kingdom on Dawn Island. She is the wife of Outlook III, the biological mother of Sabo, and the adoptive mother of Sterry.

name: Diesel
bio: Diesel is a Longarm and a member of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Diez Barrels
bio: Diez Barrels was a Marine officer who defected to become a pirate. Thirteen years ago, he was the captain of the Barrels Pirates while operating in the North Blue until he was killed by Donquixote Doflamingo during an attempt to sell the Ope Ope no Mi to the Marines.

name: Dirt Boss
bio: The Dirt Boss is a giant mole awoken by Gedatsu during his work for Goro in his cover story.

name: Disc J
bio: Disc J is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Disco
bio: Disco is the owner of the now-bankrupt Human Auctioning House at Grove 1 in Sabaody Archipelago.

name: Dive
bio: Dive is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Dobby Ibadonbo
bio: Dobby Ibadonbo is a man imprisoned in Level 6 of Impel Down.

name: Doberman
bio: Vice Admiral Doberman is a veteran Marine officer. He was one of the five Vice Admirals who led the Buster Call against Enies Lobby, and also took part in the Summit War of Marineford.

name: Dobon
occupation: Shinuchi ; Vice Warden of the Prisoner Mine
bio: Dobon is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates who served as a vice warden of the Prisoner Mine in the Udon region of Wano Country.

name: Doc Q
occupation: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Ninth Ship); Doctor
bio: Doc Q, known as "Death God", is the doctor, and one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates, serving as the captain of the ninth ship of the fleet. Because of his chronically sick body, he is almost always seen riding his horse, Stronger (who is just as sick as he is), to get around.

name: Dogra
bio: Dogra is a member of Dadan's bandits that are active on Mt. Colubo on Dawn Island.

name: Dogya
bio: Dogya is a member of the Spade Pirates.

name: Doll
bio: Doll is a Marine Vice Admiral and Commander of the G-14 Marine Base. She is one of the nine Vice Admirals that took part in the Egghead Incident.

name: Doma
bio: "Bohemian Knight" Doma is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Domino
bio: Domino is the Head Jailer of Impel Down serving under Warden Hannyabal.

name: Domo-kun
bio: Domo-kun and Nnke-kun are aliens planning to conquer the Earth. They are the first joke characters created by Oda.

name: Donannoyo
bio: Donannoyo is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region of Wano Country.

name: Donovan
bio: Donovan was one of the fifty mechanics of the Foxy Pirates. He left the crew sometime during the Timeskip.

name: Donquino
bio: Donquino was the helmsman of the Roger Pirates.

name: Donquixote Doflamingo
occupation: Pirate Captain ; Prisoner of the Great Prison; Underworld Broker ; King of Dressrosa (former); World Noble (former)
bio: Donquixote Doflamingo, nicknamed "Heavenly Yaksha", is the captain of the Donquixote Pirates. Before his imprisonment, he was a member of the Seven Warlords of the Sea with a frozen bounty of 340,000,000, as well as the most influential underworld broker under the codename "Joker".

name: Donquixote Homing
bio: Saint Donquixote Homing was a former World Noble of the Donquixote Family, one of the 20 royal families that founded the World Government. Homing withdrew from his position and left Mary Geoise in order to live a normal life with his wife and two sons, Doflamingo and Rosinante.

name: Donquixote Mjosgard
bio: Saint Donquixote Mjosgard was a World Noble and member of the Donquixote Family, one of the 20 royal families that founded the World Government. After an attempt to recapture his freed fish-man slaves went awry, Mjosgard met Queen Otohime of Fish-Man Island's Ryugu Kingdom and became their ally and a supporter of their efforts to integrate with humans, opposing the extreme racism typically associated with the World Nobles' normal ideology.

name: Donquixote Rosinante
occupation: Marine Commander ; Pirate Elite Officer (undercover); World Noble (former)
bio: Donquixote Rosinante was a former World Noble of the Donquixote Family descent, being the second son of Donquixote Homing and the younger brother of Donquixote Doflamingo. After his family lost their status as Celestial Dragons and became pariahs, Rosinante was discovered by Sengoku and enlisted into the Marines, eventually reaching the rank of Commander.

name: Donquixote Shivercalero
bio: Saint Donquixote Shivercalero is a World Noble from the Donquixote Family and the father of the late Donquixote Mjosgard.

name: Doran
bio: Doran is a child who was captured and kept in the Biscuits Room on Punk Hazard. He was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates.

name: Doringo
bio: Doringo was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Dorry
bio: Dorry the Blue Ogre is a giant from Elbaph and one of the two captains of the Giant Warrior Pirates alongside Brogy. Once an active and infamous threat in the seas long ago, Dorry became embroiled in a personal duel over a trivial dispute with his best friend and co-captain Brogy.

name: Dosun
bio: Dosun is a hammerhead shark fish-man and was one of the officers of the New Fish-Man Pirates. Due to his actions and role, he is considered to be a major antagonist in the Fish-Man Island Arc.

name: Dotaku
bio: Dotaku is a samurai who resides in Wano Country.

name: Doubt Brothers
bio: The Doubt Brothers are Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates.

name: Douglas Bullet
bio: Douglas Bullet, known as the Demon Heir, is the main antagonist of One Piece: Stampede. After serving as a child soldier in his homeland of Galzburg, he joined the Roger Pirates and was later imprisoned in Impel Down for over 20 years.

name: Dr. Fishbonen
bio: Dr. Fishbonen is a Marine naval surgeon stationed at Marineford.

name: Dracule Mihawk
occupation: Pirate ; Cross Guild Officer ; Warlord of the Sea (former)
bio: Dracule "Hawk Eyes" Mihawk is a world-famous pirate currently recognized as the strongest swordsman in the world. Known as the "Marine Hunter" in his early career, Mihawk stood as one of the Seven Warlords of the Sea (the first to be revealed and formally introduced) until the group's dissolution, and was for a time the sole human resident of Kuraigana Island.

name: Dragon Number Thirteen
bio: Dragon Number Thirteen was a dragon created by Vegapunk to guard Punk Hazard. He carried out this duty even after Vegapunk and the World Government's departure until he was killed by Roronoa Zoro four years later.

name: Dragon Number Twenty-One
bio: Dragon Number Twenty-One is a dragon created by Vegapunk which resides on Punk Hazard. It was designed to be smaller than Vegapunk's first successful dragon, Dragon Number Thirteen, giving it more quickness.

name: Drip
bio: Drip was a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew who was posing as the real Sanji. When the crew switched to posing as the Kid Pirates, Drip impersonated Killer.

name: Drophy
bio: "Town-Collapser" Drophy, better known by her alias Miss Merry Christmas, is a former officer agent partnered with Mr. 4.

name: Drug Peclo
bio: Drug Peclo, also known as the Major Undertaker, is an emperor of the Underworld.

name: Ducky Bree
bio: Ducky Bree is a member of the Spade Pirates.

name: Duval
occupation: Leader of the Rosy Life Riders (formerly the Flying Fish Riders); Slave trader (former); Mafia
bio: Duval is the leader of the Rosy Life Riders (originally the Flying Fish Riders), active around the Sabaody Archipelago and Fish-Man Island. Initially an enemy of the Straw Hat Pirates due to a personal grudge against Sanji, he has since become their ally.

name: Eddy
bio: Eddy was the navigator of the Bellamy Pirates.

name: Edison
bio: Edison, also designated as Punk-03 ( PUNK-03, Panku-Surī? ), is one of the six satellites of Dr.

name: Edward Newgate
bio: Edward Newgate, more commonly known as "Whitebeard", was a legendary pirate and the captain of the Whitebeard Pirates. Widely known as the "Strongest Man in the World", he was considered the "Man Closest to One Piece " after Gol D. Roger's death.

name: Edward Weevil
bio: Edward Weevil, or " Whitebeard Jr. ", is a pirate and self-proclaimed son of the late Edward "Whitebeard" Newgate.

name: Egana
bio: Egana is Margarita's employer.

name: Eggplant Soldier
bio: Eggplant Soldier is a soldier of the Big Mom Pirates, serving as a guard at the Whole Cake Chateau. He was Sanji's helper during his stay at the castle before his planned wedding to Charlotte Pudding.

name: Eikon
bio: Eikon is a dwarf from the Tontatta Kingdom and a member of the Tontatta Pirates.

name: Elizabello II
bio: "The Fighting King" Elizabello II is the king of the Prodence Kingdom. He is also a fighter who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Elmy
bio: Elmy is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Emma
bio: Emma is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Emporio Ivankov
occupation: G Army Commander of the Revolutionary Army; Queen of the Kamabakka Kingdom; Queen of Newkama Land (former); Slave (former)
bio: Emporio Ivankov, or Iva for short, is the queen of the Kamabakka Kingdom, known as "Okama King" and a "Miracle Person". He is one of the Revolutionary Army's founding members, as well as the commander of the G Army, which covers the Grand Line.

name: Enel
bio: Enel is the former tyrannical " God " of Skypiea. Once an inhabitant of Birka, Enel destroyed his homeland through the powers of the Goro Goro no Mi and led a small army of loyalists to take over Skypiea.

name: Enishida
bio: Enishida is a member of the Kuja and one of Boa Hancock's attendants in her castle. She is a lady's maid.

name: Epoida
bio: Epoida is an infamous New World pirate captain who was once a member of the Whitebeard Pirates, before forming his own crew subordinate to Whitebeard.

name: Erik
bio: Erik is an Arabasta Kingdom citizen and a former member of the Rebel Army led by Koza. He is from Suiren, a town that had been completely dried out.

name: Erio
bio: Erio was a member of the Roger Pirates who acted as their information broker until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Eris
bio: Eris was the mother of Marshall D. Teach and the wife of Rocks D. Xebec, a member of the Davy Family.

name: Esta
bio: Esta is a citizen of Dressrosa.

name: Estrid
bio: Estrid was the mother of Loki, as well as the former arranged wife to king Harald, making her Elbaph's latest queen. She was also the daughter of a pureblooded and ancient influential lineage, akin to nobility.

name: Ethanbaron V. Nusjuro
occupation: Co-Head of the World Government (Public) ; Warrior God of Finance ( 財務武神 , Zaimu Bushin ? , English versions: "Godhead of Finance")
bio: Saint Ethanbaron V. Nusjuro is a World Noble and one of the Five Elders who publicly head the World Government, holding the title of Warrior God of Finance. Due to his actions and role, he is one of the secondary antagonists of the Egghead Arc.

name: Ettara Chaunkai
bio: Ettara Chaunkai is a citizen of Dressrosa.

name: Eustass Kid
bio: Eustass "Captain" Kid is a notorious pirate from the South Blue and the captain of the Kid Pirates. He is one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation ".

name: Fake Chopper
bio: Nora Gitsune is a fox who filled the role of the " pet " for the Fake Straw Hat Crew, who did not know that the real Chopper is the crew's doctor and is given human-traits by the Hito Hito no Mi.

name: Fake Nami
bio: Chocolat is a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew who masqueraded as Nami.

name: Fake Robin
bio: Cocoa was a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew who impersonated Nico Robin.

name: Fake Sogeking
bio: Mounblutain was a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew who masqueraded as Sogeking.

name: Farafra
bio: Farafra was a member of the Rebel Army led by Koza. He lost his right arm and right shoulder while protecting Koza during an enemy attack.

name: Farul
bio: Farul is Cavendish's pet horse and a member of the Beautiful Pirates.

name: Faust
bio: Faust is a cat mink from North Blue and a member of the Hawkins Pirates, serving as the crew's magician.

name: Fen Bock
bio: Fen Bock of the Gourd is an ex-prisoner and former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard, having served as one of Caesar Clown’s henchmen. He is a satyr.

name: Figarland Garling
occupation: Co-Head of the World Government (Public) ; Warrior God of Science and Defense ( 科学防衛武神 , Kagaku Bōei Bushin ? , VIZ: "Godhead of Science & Defense") ; Supreme Commander of Knights of God; Commander of Knights of God (former), World Noble
bio: Saint Figarland Garling is one of the Five Elders who publicly head the World Government, holding the title Warrior God of Science and Defense; prior to this, he held the position of Supreme Commander of the Knights of God. A World Noble who hails from the Figarland Family, Garling is the biological father of Knights commander Shamrock, as well as the pirate Shanks of the Four Emperors.

name: Figarland Shamrock
bio: Saint Figarland Shamrock is a World Noble and the commander of the Knights of God. Born in God Valley, he is the son of Saint Figarland Garling, one of the Five Elders of the World Government, as well as the older twin brother of Shanks, one of the Four Emperors.

name: Fillonce
bio: Fillonce is an amethyst anthias mermaid and one of the Mermaid Cafe Dancers.

name: Finamore
bio: Finamore is a member of the Spade Pirates.

name: Fishbonen
bio: Dr. Fishbonen is a Marine naval surgeon stationed at Marineford.

name: Fisher Tiger
occupation: Adventurer ; Pirate ; Captain ; De-facto Leader of Fish-Man District (former); Slave (former)
bio: Fisher Tiger, known as the Adventurer, was a sea bream fish-man and the founder and original captain of the Sun Pirates. A well-known explorer, Tiger became a slave for the World Nobles at some point in his adventures.

name: Flapper
bio: Flapper is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared on Green Bit, when he stopped Leo from taking Robin's clothes and belongings. He participated in Operation SOP and became a temporary victim of Sugar's Hobi Hobi no Mi.

name: Footbianco
bio: Footbianco is one of the Franky Family's Kairiki Destroyers.

name: Forest Boss
bio: The Forest Boss is a mandrill that was first introduced in Gedatsu's cover story.

name: Fossa
bio: Fossa is the former 15th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Fourtricks
bio: Fourtricks is a Shinuchi in the Beasts Pirates.

name: Foxy
bio: Foxy the Silver Fox is the captain of the Foxy Pirates, and the main antagonist of the Long Ring Long Land Arc. In the anime, he is a recurring enemy—and occasional ally—of the Straw Hat Pirates, with major roles in the anime-original Foxy's Return Arc, Spa Island Arc, one installment of the Boss Luffy Historical Special, and the Adventure of Nebulandia special.

name: Francois
bio: Francois is a former prisoner of Impel Down and resident of Newkama Land in Level 5.5.

name: Franky
occupation: Shipwright ; Senior Officer ; Dismantler; Underworld boss (former); Bounty Hunter (former)
bio: "Iron Man" Franky is the shipwright of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet. He is the crew's eighth member and the seventh to join, doing so at the end of the Post-Enies Lobby Arc.

name: Fuga
bio: Fuga is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates, representing the number "two".

name: Fugar
bio: "Memorial Blade" Fugar is the bandmaster of the Social Club, a subordinate pirate crew of the Red Hair Pirates.

name: Fugetsu Omusubi
bio: Fugetsu Omusubi was a samurai who, as a member of the Fugetsu Family, served as the daimyo of the Kibi region until he was imprisoned and killed by Kaidou 20 years ago.

name: Fujin
bio: Fujin is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates. He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country, Kurozumi Orochi.

name: Fukaboshi
bio: Fukaboshi is a shark merman and the eldest son of the royal Neptune Family on Fish-Man Island. After he, his father and his brothers were liberated by the Straw Hat Pirates, he allied himself with them against Hody Jones and his crew.

name: Fukurokuju
occupation: Ninja ; Captain of the Orochi Oniwabanshu (former)
bio: Fukurokuju is a ninja and the previous captain of the Orochi Oniwabanshu before they joined the Beasts Pirates following Orochi's deposition. Though he pledged his team's support to Kaidou, Fukurokuju remained loyal to the surviving Orochi and helped him attempt to get revenge.

name: Fukurou
bio: Fukurou the Silent is an agent of CP0 and was previously an agent of CP9. He was one of the major antagonists during the Enies Lobby Arc.

name: Fullbody
occupation: Marine Lieutenant Commander ; Marine Seaman Recruit (promoted) , Marine Lieutenant (demoted)
bio: "Double Ironfist" Fullbody is a Marine lieutenant commander serving under Rear Admiral Hina. He was a Marine Headquarters lieutenant at the start of the series, but was demoted to seaman recruit as a condition when he helped the former Black Cat pirate, Jango, get acquitted for his past crimes (in the anime, it was after getting into a fight with Sanji on the Baratie ).

name: Funkfreed
