bio: Funkfreed is Spandam's sword, which has been animated by the Zou Zou no Mi, becoming an Elephant Sword. As such, he also serves as a pet and unofficial bodyguard for Spandam, compensating his master's physical slightness.

name: Furika
bio: Furika is a citizen of Dressrosa.

name: Furrari
bio: Furrari is the king of the Nagagutsu Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely. He is the father of Tritobu.

name: Fuza
bio: Fuza is the giant Three-length Bird of the Skypiean Priest Shura, who rode on it to get around to the different places throughout Skypiea.

name: Gab
bio: "Howling" Gab is one of the Senior Officers of the Red Hair Pirates.

name: Gaburu
bio: Commander Gaburu was a revolutionist commander who led a militia group on an unknown island. His resemblance to Caribou caused misunderstandings in the cover story Caribou's Kehihihihi in the New World.

name: Gaimon
occupation: Guardian of the Island of Rare Animals Pirate (former)
bio: Gaimon is a former pirate who currently lives inside a treasure chest on the Island of Rare Animals.

name: Galaxy
bio: General Galaxy is one of the automata created on Karakuri Island by Dr. Tsukimi.

name: Galdino
occupation: Pirate ; Officer Agent (former); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
bio: "Loan Shark" Galdino, alias Mr. 3, is a former officer agent of Baroque Works, partnered with "Miss Goldenweek" Marianne.

name: Gally
bio: "Crescent-Moon" Gally is the captain of the Gally Pirates, currently active in the East Blue. He is notable as a character that predates One Piece proper, serving as the main antagonist of the first Romance Dawn prototype.

name: Gama Pyonnosuke
bio: Gama Pyonnosuke is a toad that sat atop Usopp's head during his stay in Wano Country.

name: Gambia
bio: Gambia the Missionary is the staff officer of the Barto Club. He was also a gladiator competing at the Corrida Colosseum for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Gambo
bio: Gambo is the deputy commander of the South Army in the Revolutionary Army and the assistant of Lindbergh.

name: Gan Fall
bio: Gan Fall is the current God of Skypiea. A venerable figure who served in that role for decades, he was overthrown by Enel and cast out of power for six years.

name: Gancho
bio: Gancho is the king, also called "Tonta-Chief", of the Tontatta Kingdom. He is the father of Mansherry.

name: Gangaru
bio: Gangaru is a samurai and member of the Beasts Pirates. He was formerly a member of the Mimawarigumi serving Kurozumi Orochi until Orochi's seeming death.

name: Ganryu
bio: Ganryu was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Gantonio
bio: Gantonio is a member of the Giant Warrior Pirates. He serves as a minor antagonist in the Elbaph Arc after being converted into a demon.

name: Ganzui
bio: Ganzui was a member of the Rocks Pirates. A smuggler by trade, he lost a Davy Back Fight and subsequently joined Rocks in his pursuits.

name: Garudan
bio: Garudan is a samurai and member of the Beasts Pirates. He was formerly a member of the Mimawarigumi serving Kurozumi Orochi until Orochi's seeming death.

name: Gatherine
bio: Gatherine is a cafeteria worker at Enies Lobby.

name: Gattenshochinosukeo
bio: Gattenshochinosukeo is a shipwright from the Wano Country who assisted Franky in repairing the rebel's ships.

name: Gatz
bio: Gatz is the announcer at the Corrida Colosseum.

name: Gazelleman
bio: Gazelleman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates. After being tamed by Tama, he became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance.

name: Gecko Moria
occupation: Pirate Captain ; Warlord of the Sea (former)
bio: Gecko Moria is the captain of the Thriller Bark Pirates and a former member of the Seven Warlords of the Sea who resides on Thriller Bark, the largest ship in the world. His bounty is 320,000,000, which was frozen until he lost his Warlord position.

name: Gedatsu
occupation: Priest of Enel (former), Head Clerk of Hot Springs Resort
bio: "Sky Boss" Gedatsu was one of Enel's priests who punished criminals with the Ordeal of Swamp during Enel's reign. He is a major antagonist during the Skypiea Arc, and later the central character from Gedatsu's Accidental Blue-Sea Life Cover Page Serial.

name: Gem
bio: Gem of the Border, better known by his alias Mr. 5, was formerly the lowest-ranked officer agent in Baroque Works along with his partner, Miss Valentine.

name: Genbo
bio: Genbo is one of the Shandia warriors who fought to take back Upper Yard from Enel. After the timeskip, he joined the God's Guards under Wyper.

name: Genrin
bio: Genrin is an old man who lives in Ebisu Town.

name: Genzo
bio: Genzo is the sheriff of Cocoyasi Village, and an unofficial but long-serving parental figure to Nami and Nojiko. He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Arlong Park Arc.

name: George Mach
bio: George Mach is a former member of the Foxy Pirates. He fought Mountain Ricky before the third round of the Davy Back Fight.

name: Gerd
bio: Gerd is a giant from Elbaph and the doctor of the New Giant Warrior Pirates. She was formerly an S-Class ranked mercenary for Buggy's Delivery.

name: Gerotini
bio: "Ball Fingers" Gerotini is the captain of the Puddle Pirates, a pirate crew subordinate to the Red Hair Pirates.

name: Giberson
occupation: Warehouseman ( 倉庫業老舗 , Sōkogyō Shinise ? , English versions: "Warehouse Kingpin") ; Emperor of the Underworld
bio: Giberson, known as "The Concealer", is a veteran warehouseman and one of the emperors of the Underworld.

name: Gig
bio: Gig is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Gild Tesoro
bio: Gild Tesoro, also known as the "Golden Emperor", was the owner and proprietor of Gran Tesoro, the largest entertainment city-ship in the world. Formerly a slave of the World Nobles, Tesoro became a global kingpin with dealings with the World Government and the Underworld infamously known as the "Monster of the New World" and one of the wealthiest people in the world.

name: Gill Bastar
bio: Gill Bastar was the main character of the one shot Wanted!. He has an extremely high bounty gained from killing many people in self defense.

name: Gimlet
bio: Gimlet was the infant son of Senor Pink and Russian.

name: Gin
bio: Gin the "Man-Demon" is a pirate and the Combat Commander of the Krieg Pirates. He is initially introduced as a mere combatant of Krieg before his actual rank and abilities are made clear.

name: Gina
bio: Gina was the female carpenter of the Foxy Pirates. She left the crew sometime during the Timeskip.

name: Ginko
bio: Ginko is a little girl who was held captive on Punk Hazard. She was one of the children Momonosuke met when he came to the island.

name: Ginnosuke
bio: Ginnosuke is a child who lives in the Flower Capital and attended Sarahebi's classes during Kaidou's reign.

name: Ginny
occupation: East Army Captain of the Revolutionary Army, Slave (former)
bio: Ginny was the former East Army commander of the Revolutionary Army, having joined the group alongside Bartholomew Kuma 22 years ago, back when they were known as the Freedom Fighters. She is the late mother of Jewelry Bonney.

name: Ginrummy
bio: Ginrummy is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates.

name: Giolla
bio: Giolla is an officer of the Donquixote Pirates ' Trebol Army. Due to her actions and role, she is a supporting antagonist during the Dressrosa Arc.

name: Gion
bio: Gion, better known by her alias Momousagi, is a Marine vice admiral.

name: Giovanni
bio: Giovanni is a zebra mink and one of the Three Inuarashi Musketeers leading the squad.

name: Giro Chintaro
bio: Giro Chintaro is a samurai from Wano Country who was appointed as the kaishakunin for Zorojuro's seppuku ritual.

name: Gismonda
bio: Gismonda is a masked agent of CP0.

name: Gladius
bio: Gladius is an officer of the Donquixote Pirates ' Pica Army. Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist during the Dressrosa Arc.

name: Gloriosa
occupation: Empress of Amazon Lily (former); Pirate Captain (former)
bio: Gloriosa, more commonly known as " Elder Nyon ", is an advisor of sorts to the current empress of the Kuja tribe, Boa Hancock. Gloriosa is a former empress and captain of the Kuja Pirates from three generations prior to Hancock.

name: Glove
bio: Commander Glove is a Marine commander that participated in the Buster Call on Enies Lobby.

name: Glutbunny
bio: Glutbunny, also known as the Ear God, was a giant rabbit that lived in the Land of Gods and was revered by its residents. It was killed by Luffy and eaten by the Straw Hat Pirates ' Monster Trio.

name: Gode
bio: Sage Gode is one of the three Birkan clergymen who lived on Skypiea and served Enel.

name: Goki
bio: Goki is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates, representing the number "five". Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc.

name: Gol D. Roger
bio: Gol D. Roger, more commonly known as Gold Roger, was a legendary pirate who, as captain of the Roger Pirates, held the title of Pirate King and possessed the legendary treasure known as the One Piece. He was also the lover of Portgas D. Rouge and the biological father of Portgas D. Ace.

name: Goldberg
bio: Goldberg is a giant from Elbaph who is the cook of the New Giant Warrior Pirates and was formerly an S-Class ranked mercenary for Buggy's Delivery. He is a major ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Elbaph Arc.

name: Goldfish Princess
bio: The Goldfish Princess is a character in the Hatchan's Sea-Floor Stroll cover story.

name: Gomorrah
bio: Gomorrah is one of the two gigantic King Bulls owned by the Franky Family, the other being Sodom.

name: Gonbe
bio: Gonbe is Chimney's pet rabbit, though she firmly believes him to be a cat.

name: Goo
bio: Captain Goo is a pirate captain who, along with his crew, had their shadows stolen by Gecko Moria.

name: Googly-Eyed
bio: Googly-Eyed is a Sea King. It is one of the six Sea Kings that speak to Shirahoshi when she fully manifests the power of Poseidon.

name: Gorilla
bio: Captain Gorilla is a Marine officer who was sent to investigate the Nightmare of Baldimore accidentally caused by Franky.

name: Gorishiro
bio: Gorishiro is a gorilla that is attached to Mizerka's body due to her consumption of a gorilla SMILE.

name: Goro
bio: Goro is Toto's younger brother and Koza's paternal uncle. He appeared in Gedatsu's cover story.

name: Gorobe
bio: Gorobe is a citizen of Okobore Town in the Kuri region of Wano Country.

name: Gotti
bio: "Hit Man" Gotti is an assassin, a combatant in the Fire Tank Pirates, and the husband of Charlotte Lola. Along with his crew, he is a temporary ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Whole Cake Island Arc.

name: Grabar
bio: Grabar is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared on Green Bit. She is Leo's grandmother.

name: Gram
bio: Gram was one of the archaeologists of Ohara.

name: Great Michael
bio: Great Michael is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Guernika
bio: Guernika was a masked agent of CP0. While in Wano Country for negotiations with Shogun Kurozumi Orochi, Guernika played a relevant role in the Raid on Onigashima.

name: Guillotine
bio: Guillotine is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine that took part in the Egghead Incident. He serves as a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc.

name: Gurutaro
bio: Gurutaro is a samurai who was part of the Mimawarigumi 41 years ago. He was also a retainer of the Kouzuki Family.

name: Gyaro
bio: Gyaro is a member of the Macro Pirates. He is a pop-eyed goldfish fish-man.

name: Gyogyo
bio: Gyogyo is a member of the Bonney Pirates. He was once a resident of the Sorbet Kingdom, having been a friend of Bartholomew Kuma and Ginny since childhood.

name: Gyoro, Nin, and Bao
bio: Gyoro, Nin, and Bao were a trio of oddly shaped Soldier Zombies that were first seen reporting to Moria about the Straw Hats ' arrival.

name: Gyoru
bio: Gyoru is a fishmonger in Foosha Village and the husband of Chicken. Luffy bought fish from him when he was a kid.

name: Gyro
bio: Crab-Hand Gyro is the captain of the Gyro Pirates from South Blue that was on its way to the New World before an unfortunate meeting with the New Fish-Man Pirates.

name: Hack
bio: Hack was one of the archaeologists of Ohara.

name: Hajrudin
occupation: Captain of the Sixth Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Pirate Captain ; Mercenary (former); Prince (Illegitimate)
bio: Hajrudin is a giant warrior described as being from the "new generation" of Elbaph. He is the illegitimate son of the late King Harald and his original lover Ida, as well as the older half-brother of Prince Loki.

name: Hakowan
bio: Hakowan is Wapol's pet dog, acquired after Wapol was permanently deposed from Drum Island.

name: Hakugan
bio: Hakugan is the helmsman of the Heart Pirates.

name: Ham Burger
bio: Ham Burger is the king of the Ballywood Kingdom, acting as chairman of the most recent Levely.

name: Hamburg
bio: Hamburg is a combatant of the Foxy Pirates and the leader of the Groggy Monsters. Alongside Porche, he is one of Foxy's last remaining crewmates.

name: Hamlet
bio: Hamlet is a Shinuchi in the Beasts Pirates. During the raid on Onigashima, he was tamed by the power of the Kibi Kibi no Mi and joined the side of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance.

name: Hammond
bio: Hammond is a Daggertooth pike conger fish-Man and a member of the now disbanded New Fish-Man Pirates. He serves as a supporting antagonist in the Fish-Man Island Arc.

name: Han
bio: Han-ko is a child from Ebisu Town.

name: Hana
bio: O-Hana is a citizen of Wano Country, residing in the Flower Capital.

name: Hangan
bio: Hangan is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Hanger
bio: Hanger is an employee at Robecca Hanberg, a clothing store in Loguetown. Nami tried on all of his best clothes, but did not buy any.

name: Hanji
bio: Hanji is a former prisoner of Udon's Prisoner Mine.

name: Hannyabal
bio: Hannyabal is the warden of Impel Down. Formerly the Vice Warden, he was promoted to Magellan's position following the mass breakout.

name: Hanzo
bio: Hanzo is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates. He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country, Kurozumi Orochi.

name: Happa Yamao
bio: Happa Yamao is a civilian of Water 7 whom Usopp bought wood and supplies from in order to repair the Going Merry. He is an old bandit turned carpenter who moved to Water 7 from the "Gourmet City", Pucci.

name: Happygun
bio: Happygun is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Hara
bio: Hara is a resident who lives in the Flower Capital of Wano Country.

name: Harald
occupation: King of the Warland Kingdom; Knight of God; Devoted Blade of God (former)
bio: Harald was the most recent king of Elbaph and a member of the Knights of God. He is the father of Hajrudin and Loki, born respectively from Ida, his original lover, and Estrid, his official spouse.

name: Haredas
bio: Haredas is an old man who lives in Weatheria. He was Nami's tutor in weather-manipulation during the timeskip.

name: Hareji
bio: Hareji is a former prisoner of Udon's prisoner mines. In the past, he was a resident of the Flower Capital.

name: Haritsu Kendiyo
bio: Haritsu Kendiyo is a pirate captain whose crew was captured by the Kid Pirates as they tried to escape back to Paradise from the New World.

name: Haruta
bio: Haruta is the former 12th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Hasami
bio: Hasami is a giant desert crab from Sandy Island, and a friend of Matsuge the camel. Originally an inhabitant of the deserts near Rainbase, he currently works as an employee of Ukkari Hot-Spring Island.

name: Hatcha
bio: Hatcha is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates, representing the number "eight". Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc.

name: Hatchan
bio: Hatchan, nicknamed " Hachi ", is an octopus fish-man who was an officer of the Arlong Pirates before their defeat, and a member of the Sun Pirates before that. After the rest of the Arlong Pirates were arrested, Hatchan was the sole member to escape, and went on many adventures which ended in him opening a floating takoyaki restaurant and meeting up again with the Straw Hat Pirates.

name: Hatsume
bio: Hatsume is a samurai and member of the Beasts Pirates. She was formerly a member of the Mimawarigumi serving Kurozumi Orochi until Orochi's seeming death.

name: Hattori
bio: Hattori is Rob Lucci's pet pigeon, and initially acted as the target of his ventriloquism.

name: Hawkman
bio: Hawkman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates.

name: Heat
bio: Heat is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Helmeppo
occupation: Lieutenant Commander ; Chief Petty Officer (promoted); Chore Boy (promoted)
bio: Lieutenant Commander Helmeppo is a Marine officer and the son of ex-Marine Captain "Axe-Hand" Morgan. Once a civilian who shamelessly exploited his father's status, he (together with Koby ) underwent extensive training under Vice Admiral Garp to become a full-fledged serviceman, currently holding the rank of lieutenant commander.

name: Heppoko
bio: Heppoko is a member of the Alvida Pirates and the triplet brother of Peppoko and Poppoko.

name: Hera
bio: Hera the Thundercloud is a thundercloud homie created by Big Mom at Wano Country as a replacement for Zeus. She is a special kind of homie, having received a soul fragment from Big Mom herself, and serves as one of her personal weapons, alongside Prometheus and Napoleon.

name: Heracles
bio: Heracles is a strange warrior that used to reside in the Greenstone forest in the Boin Archipelago. He trained Usopp in the use of Pop Greens for two years.

name: Herb
bio: Herb was a Shandia from 400 years ago. She was Kalgara's wife and Mousse's mother.

name: Hewitt
bio: Hewitt was the chef of the Bellamy Pirates.

name: Hibari
bio: Hibari is a Marine Commander and a member of SWORD.

name: Hidayu
bio: Hidayu is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family. After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards, he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima.

name: Higuma
bio: Higuma was a bandit and the leader of the Higuma Bandits, active in the mountains of Dawn Island. He was the first antagonist to be introduced in the series, and the first of three in the Romance Dawn Arc (third of three in the anime).

name: Hihimaru
bio: Hihimaru is a baboon that was formerly a guard for the Beasts Pirates before being tamed by Tama.

name: Hikkomitsukumai
bio: Hikkomitsukumai is a retainer of the Kurozumi Family and a prison guard who lives in the Flower Capital of Wano Country.

name: Hildon
bio: Hildon was a Wild Zombie that resembled a stitched-up vampire. He appeared to act as a messenger in-between the members of Thriller Bark's Mysterious Four, reporting to them noteworthy events that were happening throughout the island ship before it fell.

name: Hilmungardr
bio: Hilmungardr is a giant serpent that lives in the Land of Gods.

name: Himuro
bio: Himuro is a samurai and a member of the Beasts Pirates. He was previously a member of the Mimawarigumi, which served as the police force of the shogun of Wano Country, Kurozumi Orochi.

name: Hina
bio: "Black Cage" Hina is a Marine Rear Admiral and a former classmate of Vice Admiral Smoker. She currently leads the Black Cage Corps, a unit (containing Jango and Fullbody among others) tasked with patrolling the seas around the Arabasta Kingdom.

name: Hip
bio: Hip is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Hippan Natte
bio: Hippan Natte is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region.

name: Hippie
bio: Hippie the Skull Curry is the captain of the Endurance Curry Pirates.

name: Hiramera
bio: Hiramera is an olive flounder mermaid and one of the top five Mermaid Cafe Dancers.

name: Hiriluk
bio: Dr. Hiriluk was a quack doctor from Drum Island, as well as Tony Tony Chopper's father figure.

name: Hiro Gomon
bio: Hiro Gomon is a member of the Endurance Curry Pirates.

name: Hiroshi
bio: Hiroshi is a resident of Bakura Town in Wano Country who runs a restaurant alongside Wakasa; the two of them own a tanuki named Saikoro which the sumo wrestler Urashima forced to be cooked and served to him.

name: Hitsugisukan
bio: Duke Hitsugisukan is a sheep mink and the former ruler of the Mokomo Dukedom before Inuarashi and Nekomamushi.

name: Ho
bio: Dr. Ho is the palace medic of Arabasta's royal family.

name: Hocha
bio: Hocha was one of the archaeologists of Ohara.

name: Hocker
bio: Hocker was the owner of the Pet Food Shop in Orange Town and the owner of Chouchou.

name: Hody Jones
bio: Hody Jones is a great white shark fish-man, the captain of the New Fish-Man Pirates before their downfall, and a former soldier of the Neptune Army. He is an admirer and militant believer of Arlong's ideals, and the main antagonist of the Fish-Man Island Arc.

name: Hoe
bio: Hoe is the pet whale of King Neptune who uses him as a means of transportation. The only word he can say is his own name.

name: Hogback
bio: Doctor Hogback is the world-renowned "Genius Surgeon" who joined the Thriller Bark Pirates under the employment of Gecko Moria and assisted him in creating his undead army. He was one of the crew's Mysterious Four and the secondary antagonist of the Thriller Bark Saga.

name: Hoisassa
bio: Hoisassa is a retainer of the Kurozumi Family.

name: Holed'em
bio: Holed'em is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates, who resides in Bakura Town. He is the son of Norinosuke, a Wano Country citizen.

name: Holy
bio: Holy is a dog raised and trained by Ohm. In addition to being Ohm's pet, he is a skilled martial artist in his own right.

name: Hongo
bio: Hongo is the one of the Senior Officers and the doctor of the Red Hair Pirates.

name: Honner
bio: Dr. Honner was the doctor aboard Mont Blanc Noland's expedition fleet 400 years ago.

name: Hop
bio: Hop is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Horseman
bio: Horseman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates and an attendant of Bao Huang.

name: Hotei
occupation: Samurai ; Pirate ; Captain of the Mimawarigumi (former)
bio: Hotei is the former captain of the Mimawarigumi, a samurai police force in Wano Country that served the shogun Kurozumi Orochi until he was deposed by Kaidou. Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc.

name: Hotori and Kotori
bio: Hotori and Kotori are the younger triplet brothers of Satori. They are lieutenants of the Divine Soldiers, an army of 50 warriors under the command of Yama, their leader, and Enel.

name: Hototogisu
bio: Hototogisu is a Marine Vice Admiral and a subordinate of Vice Admiral Tsuru.

name: Hound
bio: Hound is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine that took part in the Egghead Incident. He serves as a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc.

name: House
bio: House is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Hublot
bio: Hublot is a member of the Spade Pirates.

name: Humphrey
bio: Humphrey is a bartender at Sabaody Archipelago.

name: Hustle
bio: Hustle is a member of the Krieg Pirates and a combat instructor.

name: Hyougoro
bio: Hyougoro of the Flower is the former yakuza boss of the Flower Capital and the most famous yakuza in Wano Country during the Kouzuki Family's reign. During Kurozumi Orochi's reign, he was imprisoned in Udon's prisoner mines until he was freed by Monkey D. Luffy.

name: Hyoutauros
bio: Hyoutauros is a former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard, having served as one of Caesar Clown’s henchmen. He is a jaguar centaur.

name: Hyouzou
occupation: Mercenary ; Pirate ; Assassin ; Pirate Officer ; Swordsman
bio: Hyouzou is a poisonous blue-ringed octopus merman. Prior to his imprisonment, he was a mercenary and working as the New Fish-Man Pirates ' assassin, and later became one of the officers.

name: Ibiributsu
bio: Ibiributsu is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region of Wano Country. He is in charge of exchanging meal tickets for kibi dango.

name: Ibusu
bio: Ibusu is a supposed pirate captain who affiliates and trades with the Donquixote Pirates. As his ship is later discovered to be a trading vessel for the Doerena Kingdom, it is unknown if he is truly a pirate captain.

name: Iceburg
occupation: President of the Galley-La Company ; Mayor of Water 7
bio: Iceburg is the president of the Galley-La Company and the mayor of Water 7. He was formerly one of Tom's Workers, being one of Tom's two apprentices alongside Franky.

name: Ida
bio: Ida was a giantess hailing from Samuwanai Island in the South Blue who once worked at a circus in the Bunt Kingdom. She ran a notorious bar alongside Mato in Elbaph.

name: Ideaman
bio: Ideaman is a member of Krieg Pirates. He is the Staff Officer of Planning.

name: Ideo
occupation: Captain of the Fourth Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Pirate Captain ; Boxer
bio: "Destruction Cannon" Ideo is an XXX-rank boxer and a member of the Longarm Tribe, as well as the captain of the Ideo Pirates and of the fourth ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet. He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi, where he met three other gladiators with whom he would form the then-XXX Gym Martial Arts Alliance, as well as Monkey D. Luffy, to whom he eventually pledged his loyalty.

name: Igaram
occupation: Captain of the Royal Guard; Frontier Agent (former); Bounty Hunter (former); Mayor of Whisky Peak (undercover, former)
bio: Igaram is the captain of the Arabasta royal guard (captain of Arabasta security in the English dub). He aided Nefertari Vivi in infiltrating Baroque Works as a Frontier Agent and took on the codename Mr.

name: Ikaros Much
bio: Ikaros Much is a giant squid fish-man and was an officer of the New Fish-Man Pirates before their downfall and disbandment. Due to his actions and role, he is considered to be a major antagonist in the Fish-Man Island Arc.

name: Ikkaku
bio: Ikkaku is a member of the Heart Pirates.

name: Inazuma
occupation: Revolutionary; Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
bio: Inazuma is a newkama and the deputy commander of the G Army in the Revolutionary Army, serving under Emporio Ivankov as his right hand man/woman.

name: Inbi
bio: Inbi is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates, representing the number "one".

name: Inhel
bio: Inhel is a dwarf from the Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared in the Riku Royal Army Headquarters beneath the Flower Field.

name: Inoichibannosuke
bio: Inoichibannosuke is a firefighter who works for the fire department Igumi, which he claims is the best in Wano Country.

name: Inuarashi
occupation: Daimyo ; Ruler of the Mokomo Dukedom (former); Commander of the Musketeers; Retainer; Samurai ; Pirate Apprentice (former)
bio: Duke Inuarashi is a canine mink. He was one of the two rulers of the Mokomo Dukedom, dubbed the " Ruler of Day ", holding the position from 6:00 AM to 6:00 PM.

name: Inukai
bio: Inukai is a Wano Country official.

name: Inuppe
bio: Inuppe was a Wild Zombie on Thriller Bark in the service of Gecko Moria. He was animated with Sanji's shadow and eventually assigned to guard Hogback.

name: Ipponmatsu
bio: Ipponmatsu is the owner of an arms shop in Loguetown and Ipponume's husband. He was the former owner of both Sandai Kitetsu and Yubashiri.

name: Ipponume
bio: Ipponume is Ipponmatsu's wife.

name: Iron Giant
bio: Emet, also known as the Iron Giant, is a robot created around the time of the Void Century who was a friend of Joy Boy. Since that time it has been mostly de-powered, only reactivating in two known instances.

name: Isa
bio: Isa is a Shandia woman and Aisa's mother.

name: Iscat
bio: Iscat is a giant cat previously locked in the Land of Gods ' diorama, where it ruled Bigstein Castle. It is the Sun God's pet.

name: Ishigo Shitemanna
bio: Ishigo Shitemanna is an appraiser in Water 7.

name: Ishilly
bio: Ishilly is a striped beakfish mermaid and one of the top five Mermaid Cafe Dancers.

name: Island Eater
bio: Island Eater was a giant goldfish that inhabited the sea near Little Garden. He was said to be the main reason ships leaving the island never reached their destination.

name: Islewan
bio: Islewan is an infamous New World pirate captain who was once a member of the Whitebeard Pirates, before forming his own crew subordinate to Whitebeard.

name: Issho
bio: Issho, better known by his alias Fujitora, is an Admiral in the Marines. Once the captain of a guard force in the former Aoi Kingdom, he was conscripted through a World Military Draft during the two-year timeskip, being appointed to fill one of the Admiral vacancies caused by Kuzan's resignation and Sakazuki's promotion alongside his co-worker Ryokugyu.

name: Itomimizu
bio: Itomimizu is the former Foxy Pirates ' game official and serves as the announcer and commentator of the Davy Back Fight events. He rides on a very large bird named Chuchun.

name: Iwatobi
bio: Iwatobi is the king of the Whiteland Kingdom in the North Blue and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Iyan'eno Chinode
bio: Iyan'eno Chinode is a writer for the fashion column "Streetcorner Collection" in the World Economy News Paper.

name: Izou
occupation: 16th Division Commander (former); Samurai ; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family
bio: Izou was the former 16th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates and prior to this, a retainer of the Wano Country daimyo Kouzuki Oden. He was the older brother of fellow retainer Kikunojo.

name: Jabari
bio: Jabari is a CP6 agent.

name: Jabra
bio: Jabra is an agent of CP0. He was previously an agent of CP9, being the third strongest of this agency.

name: Jack
occupation: All-Star ; Captain of the Mammoth ; De Facto Ruler of Kuri (former)
bio: Jack the Drought is a giant grouper fish-man, an All-Star of the Beasts Pirates as one of Kaidou's three closest confidants, and captain of the Mammoth, prior to its destruction. He was formerly the ruler of Kuri region in Wano Country.

name: Jacksonbanner
bio: Jacksonbanner was the musician of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Jaguar
bio: Jaguar is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Jaguar D. Saul
bio: Jaguar D. Saul is a giant and former Vice Admiral who deserted the Marines and happened to wash ashore on Ohara. During the Buster Call that destroyed Ohara 22 years ago, he risked his life to protect a young Nico Robin and ended up frozen by fellow former Vice Admiral Kuzan.

name: Jaki
bio: Jaki is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates, representing the number "four". Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc.

name: Jalmack
bio: Saint Jalmack is a World Noble who visited the Goa Kingdom twelve years ago. He acts as a minor antagonist during the Post-War Arc, as he was the one responsible for causing Sabo's long-term amnesia.

name: Jango
occupation: Marine Lieutenant Commander ; Marine Seaman Recruit (promoted); Pirate (former); Captain (former), First Mate (former), Dancer (former)
bio: The subject of this article is sometimes called Django. Jango the Turncoat is a hypnotist and Marine lieutenant commander serving under Rear Admiral Hina.

name: Jarul
bio: "Mountain Beard" Jarul is a giant and former co-captain of the Giant Warrior Pirates, alongside Jorul. Along with Jorul, he is known as a hero of the giants, and after Jorul's death, Jarul is currently the oldest giant in the world.

name: Jaygarcia Saturn
occupation: Co-Head of the World Government (Public) ; Warrior God of Science and Defense ( 科学防衛武神 , Kagaku Bōei Bushin ? , English versions: "Godhead of Science & Defense") ; Scientist
bio: Saint Jaygarcia Saturn was a World Noble who served as one of the Five Elders publicly heading the World Government. A scientist by trade, he held the title Warrior God of Science and Defense during his tenure.

name: Jean Ango
bio: Jean Ango, also known as Jean the Bandit, is a bounty hunter. He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Jean Bart
bio: Jean Bart is a pirate who was originally introduced as Saint Rosward's slave, being part of his Pirate Captain Collection. He currently serves under Trafalgar Law as a member of the Heart Pirates after being freed from the World Noble.

name: Jean Goen
bio: Jean Goen is a prisoner on Level 1 of Impel Down.

name: Jean Noueilles
occupation: Pirate ; Sea Urchin Armor Spine Squad Commander
bio: Jean Noueilles, also known as Captain Porcupinefish, is a porcupinefish fish-man and a member of the now disbanded New Fish-Man Pirates. He was the commander of the Sea Urchin Armor Spine Squad.

name: Jeep
bio: Jeep is the king of the South Fire Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely. He is also the father of Wheel.

name: Jeet
bio: Jeet is a criminal and a former bounty hunter who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi, along with his partner, Abdullah. He is an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc.

name: Jerry
bio: Jerry is a Cipher Pol agent of CP6. He was found as head of security of the Puffing Tom's seventh passenger car, which Sanji invaded to rescue Nico Robin.

name: Jesus Burgess
occupation: Titanic Captain (Captain of the First Ship); Helmsman
bio: Jesus Burgess, better known as the "Champion", is the helmsman and one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates, serving as the captain of the first ship of the fleet. Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Jaya Arc, a supporting antagonist in the Impel Down, Marineford, and Dressrosa Arcs, a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc, and a major antagonist in the Final Saga.

name: Jewelry Bonney
bio: Jewelry Bonney, also known as the "Big Eater", is a pirate from the South Blue and the captain of the Bonney Pirates. She is one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation " and the only female member of the group.

name: Jibuemon
occupation: Retainer of the Kouzuki Family; Samurai
bio: Jibuemon is a former retainer from Kibi serving under the Kouzuki Shogunate. As a hatamoto, he directly served under the former shogun, Kouzuki Sukiyaki.

name: Jigoku Benten
bio: Jigoku Benten is a kunoichi and a member of the Beasts Pirates. She previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country, Kurozumi Orochi.

name: Jigokukamabuta Megatenpanchiro
bio: Jigokukamabuta Megatenpanchiro was a retainer of Shimotsuki Family under the Daimyo of Hakumai, Shimotsuki Yasuie.

name: Jigoro
bio: Jigoro of the Wind was a master swordsman who was subsequently revived by Gecko Moria as Zombie #850, a General Zombie. He was animated with Zoro's shadow and eventually assigned to guard Hogback.

name: Jigra
bio: Jigra was an organ trader and a member of the Underworld who attempted to attack the Big Mom Pirates. In the anime, he is also part of the Organ Dealing Assassination Group.

name: Jinbe
occupation: Pirate ; Helmsman ; Senior Officer ; Captain (former); Warlord of the Sea (former); Soldier (former); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
bio: "Knight of the Sea" Jinbe is the helmsman of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet. He is the tenth member of the crew and the ninth to join, doing so during the Wano Country Arc.

name: Jiron
bio: Jiron is the deputy commander of the North Army in the Revolutionary Army and the assistant of Karasu.

name: Jobo
bio: Jobo is a citizen of Mock Town.

name: Johanna
bio: Johanna is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph.

name: John
bio: Captain John was a famous pirate captain who was once a member of the infamous Rocks Pirates prior to forming his own crew. He was notable for collecting one of the most significant treasures in the world; his fabled treasure cave and the riches within, which are notably long sought after by Buggy.

name: John Giant
bio: John Giant is a Vice Admiral in the Marine Headquarters, and the first giant to ever enlist in the Marines.

name: Johnny
bio: Johnny along with Yosaku are old friends and former bounty hunting partners of Roronoa Zoro. He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Baratie Arc and the Arlong Park Arc.

name: Jorge
bio: Jorge was the head of the Judicial Ship that sailed to Water 7. He was the one who judged Tom for his support of the Pirate King Gol D. Roger.

name: Jorul
bio: "Waterfall Beard" Jorul was a giant and former co- captain of the Giant Warrior Pirates, along with Jarul. He was known as a hero of the giants and one of the world's oldest warriors.

name: Joseph
bio: Joseph is a masked agent of CP0 and a Longarm tribesman. Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist during the Wano Country Arc.

name: Joshu
bio: Joshu is a cat and Edison's assistant on Egghead.

name: Joy Boy
bio: Joy Boy was a man from the Great Kingdom born 900 years ago at the start of the Void Century, as well as the first pirate in history. An extremely relevant figure in the Void Century, Joy Boy played an important role in the history of Fish-Man Island and left behind a certain item of unimaginable value on the last island of the Grand Line, thus becoming a legendary and remembered figure in the world.

name: Jozu
bio: "Diamond" Jozu is the former 3rd division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates, serving as one of the crew's most prominent members.

name: Judy
bio: Judy is Marie's fiancé. He was shot by Charlos when he tried to rescue her.

name: Jugemu Jugemuko
bio: Jugemu Jugemuko is a young girl from the Hakumai region of the Wano Country. She is the sister of Chokyumei-no Chosuke.

name: Jujiro
bio: Jujiro is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family. After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards, he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima.

name: Juki
bio: Juki is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates, representing the number "ten". Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc.

name: Julius
bio: Julius is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Jumper
bio: Jumper is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates.

name: Junan
bio: Junan is a codfish fish-man and a cashier at Pappag's Criminal Brand store.

name: Jörmungandr
bio: Jörmungandr is a giant serpent from Elbaph mythology. It was manifested into reality from the fear of one of the Walrus School children by Rimoshifu Killingham, using the power of his Devil Fruit.

name: Kabu
occupation: Leader of Yellow Kabu Squad; Pirate
bio: Kabu is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who is the leader of the Yellow Kabu Squad and a member of the Tontatta Pirates.

name: Kadar
bio: Rear Admiral Kadar is a Marine Rear Admiral at the G-2 Marine base from fifteen years ago. His current location and rank are unknown.

name: Kagero
bio: Kagero is a priest and samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family. After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards, he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance for the Raid on Onigashima.

name: Kagikko
bio: Kagikko is a member of the Krieg Pirates and a locksmith.

name: Kaidou
bio: Kaidou of the Beasts, renowned as the world's "Strongest Creature", is the Governor-General of the Beasts Pirates and was formerly one of the Four Emperors who ruled over the New World. He is also the father of Yamato.

name: Kairen
bio: Kairen is a righteye flounder mermaid and one of the top five Mermaid Cafe Dancers.

name: Kairiken
bio: Kairiken is a bounty hunter at Sabaody Archipelago.

name: Kairo Kureyo
bio: Kairo Kureyo is a prisoner on Level 5 of Impel Down.

name: Kaku
bio: Kaku is a masked agent of CP0. He was previously an assassin of CP9, operating undercover in order to obtain the Pluton blueprints from Iceburg.

name: Kakukaku
bio: Kakukaku is a resident of Water 7 who was among the townspeople as they discussed the attempted murder of Iceburg.

name: Kakunoshin
bio: Kakunoshin is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family. After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards, he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima.

name: Kalgara
bio: Kalgara was a warrior of the Shandia who lived on Jaya around 400 years ago. He was renowned among his people as the "Great Warrior of Shandora" and feared as the "Demon of Shandora" by outsiders.

name: Kalifa
bio: Kalifa is an agent of CP0. Before the timeskip, she was an agent of CP9, operating undercover as Iceburg's secretary at the Galley-La Company.

name: Kamakiri
bio: Kamakiri is one of the Shandia warriors who fought to take back Upper Yard from Enel. After the timeskip, he joined the God's Guards under Wyper.

name: Kamakirigirl
bio: Kamakirigirl is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates. During the Raid on Onigashima, she was tamed by the power of the Kibi Kibi no Mi and joined the side of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance.

name: Kamekichi
bio: Kamekichi is a newspaper deliveryman in the Flower Capital who announced reports of Kamazo the Manslayer and Ushimitsu Kozo.

name: Kamijiro
bio: Kamijiro is a lion's head, legs, and tail that are attached to Holed'em's body due to his consumption of a lion SMILE.

name: Kaneshiro
bio: Kaneshiro is the shipwright of the Arlong Pirates and a goldfish fish-man. He was previously a member of the Sun Pirates.

name: Kanezenny
bio: Kanezenny is an elderly farm woman from Nico Robin's past.

name: Kanjuro
occupation: Theatre Performer (former); Spy of the Kurozumi Family; Samurai ; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family (undercover)
bio: Kurozumi Kanjuro, nicknamed "Evening Shower" Kanjuro, was a samurai from the Kuri region of Wano Country and a member of the Kurozumi Family. After losing his parents, he was instructed by Kurozumi Orochi to operate undercover within the Kouzuki Family.

name: Kappa
bio: Kappa is a young shoeshine-boy in Nanohana.

name: Karasu
occupation: North Army Commander of the Revolutionary Army
bio: Karasu is a member of the Revolutionary Army, serving as one of its executive officers and the commander of the North Army.

name: Karin
bio: Karin is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph.

name: Karma
bio: Karma is an octopus fish-man and the captain of the Takotopus Pirates, an infamous New World pirate crew subordinate to the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Karoo
occupation: Pet ; Royal Transport; Captain of the Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops; Pirate (former)
bio: Karoo is Nefertari Vivi's pet super spot-billed duck, a fleet riding bird (one of the fastest modes of transportation available in the Arabasta Kingdom ). Alongside his owner Vivi, Karoo infiltrated the organization known as Baroque Works.

name: Kasa
bio: Kasa is an elderly woman from Raijin Island.

name: Kasagoba
bio: Kasagoba is a marbled rockfish fish-man and was a member of the now disbanded New Fish-Man Pirates prior to their downfall. In the anime, he is named Kasagon.

name: Kashigami
bio: Kashigami was a giant snake that lived on Jaya four centuries ago. It was worshiped by the Shandia as a god until it was slain by Mont Blanc Noland.

name: Kashii
bio: Kashii, together with Oimo, was one of the two giants who guarded the front gate of Enies Lobby for over fifty years until he and Oimo realized they were tricked by the World Government. He is a member of the Giant Warrior Pirates.

name: Katsuzo
bio: Katsuzo was a citizen of Wano Country. He died 41 years before the present day, and his cremated body was used by Kouzuki Oden to cook a pot of oden.

name: Kawamatsu
occupation: Daimyo ; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family; Samurai ; Sumo Wrestler; Highway Robber (former)
bio: Kawamatsu the Kappa is a Japanese puffer fish-man who is a yokozuna-ranked sumo wrestler. As a child, he was shipwrecked in Wano and orphaned soon afterwards.

name: Kaya
bio: Kaya is a young woman who lives in the largest mansion in Syrup Village on the Gecko Islands. She is a close friend of Usopp and is currently studying to become a doctor.

name: Kazekage
bio: Kazekage is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates. He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country, Kurozumi Orochi.

name: Kazenbo
bio: Kazenbo was a flaming ghost-like entity created by Kurozumi Kanjuro, with the power of the Fude Fude no Mi, for the purpose of destroying Onigashima. It was created to symbolize the "burning hatred" of the Kurozumi Family against those who wronged them.

name: Kebi
bio: Kebi was a member of the Sand-Sand Clan and, later, of the Arabasta Rebel Army.

name: Kechatch
bio: Kechatch is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Keith
bio: Keith is a monkey mink and a member of the Guardians who protect the Mokomo Dukedom at night.

name: Kelly Funk
bio: Kelly Funk is an assassin from the Mogaro Kingdom and Bobby Funk's older brother. He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Kiba
bio: Kiba is a giant from Elbaph and the principal of the Walrus School. He is a former member of the Giant Warrior Pirates.

name: Kibagaeru
bio: Kibagaeru was the captain of the Fanged Toad Pirates until he lost to Foxy at the Davy Back Fight and joined his crew but eventually left sometime during the Timeskip. Due to his anime-exclusive actions, he can be considered one of the main antagonists of the Foxy's Return Arc.

name: Kibin
bio: Commodore Kibin is a Marine officer that participated in the Summit War of Marineford. While his canon name and rank are unknown, he was given the name "Kibin" and the rank Commodore in the anime.

name: Kiev
bio: Kiev is a ship dismantler from Water 7. Initially part of the Franky Family, he is now working for the Galley-La Company as part of the Zambai's Company Union.

name: Kikipatsu
bio: Kikipatsu is a member of the Blackbeard Pirates.

name: Kikunojo
occupation: Daimyo of Ringo; Samurai ; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family; Tea House Poster Girl
bio: Kikunojo of the Lingering Snow, more commonly referred to as Kiku, is a samurai from Wano Country and a retainer for the Kouzuki Family, serving as one of Kouzuki Oden's Nine Red Scabbards. She is also the younger sister of Izou and the daughter of the dancing school head of the Hanayanagi School in Ringo.

name: Kikyo
bio: Kikyo is a Kuja warrior from Amazon Lily.

name: Killer
bio: "Massacre Soldier" Killer is a pirate from the South Blue and a combatant of the Kid Pirates. He is one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation ".

name: Kimel
bio: Kimel is a member of the Spade Pirates.

name: Kin'emon
occupation: Samurai ; Great Elder of the Shogunate; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family; Leader of the Nine Red Scabbards; Thief (former)
bio: "Foxfire" Kin'emon is a samurai from the region of Kuri in Wano Country who currently serves the shogunate as a great elder in the Flower Capital. Once a thug in his youth, he became a retainer of the Kouzuki Family and the leader of Kouzuki Oden's Nine Red Scabbards.

name: Kinbo
bio: Kinbo is a boy who lives in Okobore Town of Kuri with his mother Yame and his little brother.

name: Kinderella
occupation: Miss Universe; Queen of the Evil Black Drum Kingdom
bio: Kinderella, also known as Miss Universe, is a woman who married Wapol after he became the head of his own corporation. Two years after that, she became the queen of the Evil Black Drum Kingdom when Wapol became its king.

name: King
bio: King the Conflagration is one of the three All-Stars of the Beasts Pirates and Kaidou's right-hand man. Born as Arber, he is a member of the near-extinct lunarian race from the Red Line, noted for their ability to create fire.

name: Kinga
bio: Kinga is an infamous New World pirate captain who was once a member of the Whitebeard Pirates before forming his own crew subordinate to Whitebeard.

name: Kingbaum
bio: Kingbaum is a tree homie, a member of the Big Mom Pirates, and the master of the Seducing Woods on Whole Cake Island. However, he was forced to serve the Straw Hat Pirates due to them possessing Charlotte Linlin's Vivre Card.

name: Kingdew
bio: Kingdew is the former 11th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Kinoko
bio: Kinoko is a former prisoner on Level 5 of Impel Down and is currently a member of the Buggy Pirates, joining after his escape from Impel Down and the Summit War of Marineford.

name: Kirinkodanuki
bio: Kirinkodanuki is an animal who lives on the Island of Rare Animals. Like all the animals on the island, he is protected by Gaimon.

name: Kirintauros
bio: Kirintauros is a former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard, having served as one of Caesar Clown’s henchmen. He is a giraffe centaur.

name: Kisegawa
bio: Kisegawa is a geisha from the Flower Capital of Wano Country. She once possessed the blueprints of Kaidou's fortress on Onigashima.

name: Kitton
bio: Kitton is a boy who lives in Karakuri Island. He has a grandfather who takes care of him, as well as a cyborg dog named Taroimo.

name: Koala
occupation: Revolutionary Army Officer ; Assistant Fish-Man Karate Instructor; Slave (former)
bio: Koala is a high ranking officer of the Revolutionary Army, serving as the Fish-Man Karate assistant instructor. She started as a slave on Mary Geoise, but was then set free by Fisher Tiger's rampage.

name: Koala Mercenaries
bio: The Koala Mercenaries are a trio of bodyguards who watch over Rain Dinners.

name: Kobe
bio: Kobe is a resident of the Flower Capital in Wano Country and the landlord for the Longhouses. He once possessed the blueprints of Kaidou's fortress on Onigashima.

name: Koby
occupation: Marine Captain ; Master Chief Petty Officer (promoted), Chore Boy (promoted); Pirate Ship Caretaker (former)
bio: Koby the Hero is a Marine Captain, currently serving in the SWORD special forces unit. Alongside fellow SWORD member Helmeppo, he was trained and mentored into prominence under the legendary Vice Admiral Garp.

name: Koda
bio: Koda is a Marine Chef, Kyuji's wife and mother of Moda.

name: Koito
bio: Koito is a young girl residing in Ebisu Town of the Wano Country.

name: Koiwa
bio: Koiwa is a man who lived in the Wano Country 41 years ago.

name: Kojuro
bio: Kojuro is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family. After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards, he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima.

name: Kokoro
bio: Kokoro is an icefish mermaid and the stationmaster for Shift Station, a Sea Train station near Water 7. She was also Tom's secretary during the days of Tom's Workers.

name: Komachiyo
bio: Komachiyo is a komainu that resides in the Kuri region of Wano Country. It has been Kurozumi Tama's best friend since their childhood.

name: Komane
bio: Komane is the deposed princess of the Lulusia Kingdom, being the daughter of the former king Seki.

name: Konbu
bio: Konbu is a child who lived in Punk Hazard's Biscuits Room. He was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates.

name: Kong
bio: Kong is the Commander-in-Chief of the World Government. He was a Fleet Admiral of the Marines at the time of the Battle of Edd War twenty-seven years ago.

name: Kop
bio: Kop is a member of the Franky Family.

name: Koshi Falcon
bio: Koshi Falcon is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates.

name: Kotatsu
bio: Kotatsu is a member of the Spade Pirates.

name: Koushirou
bio: Shimotsuki Koushirou is a member of the Shimotsuki Family and a master swordsman, he was both the teacher of as well as the distant relative of Roronoa Zoro. He is also the father of the late Shimotsuki Kuina and son of Shimotsuki Kouzaburou.

name: Kouzuki Hiyori
bio: Kouzuki Hiyori is the daughter of the late Kouzuki Oden and Kouzuki Toki and the younger sister of Kouzuki Momonosuke. To hide her identity, Hiyori became known as Komurasaki, working as an oiran of the tayū rank, the highest of all.

name: Kouzuki Momonosuke
bio: Kouzuki Momonosuke is the current shogun of Wano Country. A member of the Kouzuki Family, he is the son of the late daimyo of Kuri Kouzuki Oden and his wife Toki, the grandson of the former shogun Sukiyaki, and the older brother of Hiyori.

name: Kouzuki Oden
bio: Kouzuki Oden was the daimyo of Kuri in Wano Country and the son of the former shogun Kouzuki Sukiyaki, being a member of the Kouzuki Family. He was the husband of Kouzuki Toki and the father of Momonosuke and Hiyori.

name: Kouzuki Toki
bio: Kouzuki Toki, née Amatsuki, was the wife of the daimyo of Kuri, Kouzuki Oden and the mother of Kouzuki Momonosuke and Kouzuki Hiyori. She was born around 830 years before the present day.

name: Koza
occupation: Environmental Minister; Rebel Army leader (former); Sand-Sand Clan leader (former);
bio: Koza is Princess Nefertari Vivi's childhood friend. As a child, he was the leader of the Sand-Sand Clan.

name: Krieg
bio: Don Krieg is the admiral of the Krieg Pirates, widely reputed as Foul-Play Krieg for his underhanded methods. At his height, he was also known as the Pirate Fleet Admiral, commanding a fleet of fifty ships (totaling some 5,000 pirates ) throughout the East Blue.

name: Kuina
bio: Shimotsuki Kuina was a childhood friend, relative and rival of Roronoa Zoro. She was the daughter of Shimotsuki Koushirou and the granddaughter of Shimotsuki Kouzaburou making her a descendant of Wano Country's famed Shimotsuki Family.

name: Kujaku
bio: Kujaku is a Marine Rear Admiral stationed at Marine Base G-14 and also a member of SWORD. She is the granddaughter of Marine Vice Admiral Tsuru.

name: Kukai
bio: Kukai is a samurai and member of the Spade Pirates.

name: Kumadori
bio: Kumadori is an agent of CP0. Before the time skip, he was an agent of CP9.

name: Kumagoro
bio: Kumagoro is a resident of the Flower Capital in Wano Country. He once possessed the blueprints of Kaidou's fortress on Onigashima.

name: Kumashi
bio: Kumashi was a stuffed bear zombie of the Thriller Bark Pirates who acted as Perona's servant and the commander-in-chief of the Wild Zombies prior to being purified by Usopp. Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist in the Thriller Bark Arc.

name: Kuni
bio: Kuni is a gangster and a member of the Kyoshiro Family in Wano Country.

name: Kunyun
bio: Kunyun is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates, representing the number "nine". She works under Black Maria.

name: Kureha
occupation: Head- Doctor of the Sakura Kingdom; Leader of the Isshi-100
bio: Dr. Kureha is an elderly doctor who works on Drum Island.

name: Kuro
bio: Kuro of a Hundred Plans is the captain of the Black Cat Pirates. After faking his own capture and execution, he assumed the alias Klahadore and infiltrated Syrup Village's wealthiest family, acting as servant and caretaker to their young daughter Kaya with the intent of seizing her fortune.

name: Kuromarimo
bio: Kuromarimo was the evil magistrate during Wapol's rule on Drum Island, and was the highest-ranking law officer below Wapol. After fleeing Drum Island to escape Blackbeard's attack, Kuromarimo became part of the Bliking Pirates.

name: Kuroobi
bio: Kuroobi is a ray fish-man and an officer of the Arlong Pirates, who was once a member of the Sun Pirates. He is one of the major antagonists of the Arlong Park Arc.

name: Kurosawa
bio: Kurosawa is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family. After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards, he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima.

name: Kurotsuru
bio: Dr. Kurotsuru, also named "Dr.

name: Kurozumi Higurashi
bio: Kurozumi Higurashi was a member of the Kurozumi Family and a major supporter of Kurozumi Orochi. She was killed by Kaidou for her interruption in his fight with Kouzuki Oden.

name: Kurozumi Orochi
bio: Kurozumi Orochi was the former shogun of Wano Country and one of the last members of the Kurozumi Family. Persecuted in his youth due to his grandfather's failed attempt to seize the shogunate from the Kouzuki Family, Orochi encountered some relatives who helped him formulate another attempt to become shogun.

name: Kurozumi Semimaru
bio: Kurozumi Semimaru was a member of the Kurozumi Family and a major supporter of Kurozumi Orochi.

name: Kuzan
occupation: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Tenth Ship); Admiral (former); Vice Admiral (former)
bio: Kuzan, better known by his alias Aokiji, is one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates, serving as the captain of the tenth ship of the fleet. Before joining Blackbeard's crew, he served as a Marine Admiral, having been taught by Monkey D. Garp.

name: Kyo
occupation: Pirate ; Hitman ; Mobster ( 極道 , Gokudō ? )
bio: Kyo, also known as Silver Axe, is a mobster-turned- pirate, a former member of the Rocks Pirates, and a rival of Shiki.

name: Kyros
bio: Kyros is a legendary gladiator who fought in the Corrida Colosseum until he left to become captain of the royal army of Dressrosa. He was later turned into a toy, causing everyone to forget his existence, becoming a One-Legged Soldier, also known as the " Thunder Soldier of Rage ".

name: Kyuin
bio: Kyuin is a former member of the Donquixote Pirates, and the former boss of the SMILE Factory on Dressrosa.

name: Kyuji
bio: Kyuji is a Marine chef, Koda's husband, and Moda's father.

name: Kyukyu
bio: Dr. Kyukyu is a doctor in Water 7.

name: Laboon
bio: Laboon is an Island Whale the Straw Hat Pirates encounter immediately after entering the Grand Line. He is native to the West Blue and is classified as a Type A creature, "Big Friendly", and at the top of both the size and friendliness scale.

name: Lacroix
bio: Vice Admiral Lacroix is a Marine vice admiral and a member of the Giant Squad.

name: Lacuba
bio: Lacuba is a pirate famed as a devious tactician who was captured and taken to the Human Auctioning House.

name: Lady Tree
bio: Lady Tree is a tree homie living in the Seducing Woods on Whole Cake Island. She's also Kingbaum's fiancée.

name: Laffitte
occupation: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Fifth Ship); Navigator ; Sheriff (former)
bio: Laffitte, nicknamed "Demon Sheriff", is the navigator and one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates, serving as the captain of the fifth ship of the fleet. He is also a former West Blue policeman known for countless acts of police brutality, which resulted in his exile from that sea.

name: Lao G
bio: Lao G is an officer of the Donquixote Pirates ' Diamante Army. Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist during the Dressrosa Arc.

name: Laskey
bio: Laskey is a former CP9 agent and the father of current Cipher Pol agents Kalifa and Alpha.

name: Lassoo
bio: Lassoo is Mr. 4's gun that consumed a Devil Fruit through some unknown method which allows it to become a living dog.

name: Lemoncheese
bio: Lemoncheese is the queen of the Bestland Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Leo
occupation: Captain of the Fifth Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet; Captain of the Tontatta Pirates;
bio: "Warrior" Leo is a dwarf from the Tontatta Kingdom and the leader of the " Tonta Corps ", which was later reformed as a pirate crew now known as the Tontatta Pirates, with Leo now acting as the captain. He is the captain of the fifth ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet.

name: Leonero
bio: Leonero is a member of the Spade Pirates.

name: Lilith
bio: Lilith, also designated as Punk-02 ( PUNK-02, Panku-Tsū? ), is one of six satellites of Dr.

name: Lily
bio: Lily was a member of the Bellamy Pirates. She was first seen with Sarquiss on Jaya Island.

name: Lim
bio: Lim is a young woman who lives on Waford as the Sky Priestess. She is a descendant of Rita Suerte.

name: Limejuice
bio: Limejuice is one of the Senior Officers of the Red Hair Pirates.

name: Linaria
bio: "Igniting" Linaria is the captain of the Night Butterfly Pirates, a crew subordinate to the Red Hair Pirates.

name: Lindbergh
occupation: South Army Commander of the Revolutionary Army
bio: Lindbergh, or "Lind" for short, is a cat mink and the commander of the Revolutionary Army's South Army.

name: Lines
bio: Seaman First Class Lines is a former subordinate of Fullbody from his time as a lieutenant.

name: Lionbuta
bio: Lionbuta is an animal who lives on the Island of Rare Animals. Like all the animals on the island, he is protected by Gaimon.

name: Lip Doughty
bio: Lip "Service" Doughty was one of the rookies who had joined the ranks of the Fake Straw Hat Crew. He had a bounty of 88,000,000.

name: Loki
bio: Loki is the prince of Elbaph, being the son of King Harald and Queen Estrid, the younger half-brother of Hajrudin, and the foster son of Ida. An outcast since childhood, Loki was tasked by Harald to kill him to spare Elbaph from the World Government's attempt to control the giants.

name: Lola
bio: Charlotte Lola is the captain of the Rolling Pirates and the 23rd daughter and 53rd child of the Charlotte Family. Her mother is the former Emperor Charlotte Linlin and her father is Linlin's 25th husband, Pound.

name: Lola (Zombie)
bio: Lola was a Wild Zombie created by Dr. Hogback and animated by Gecko Moria's powers, using the shadow of Charlotte Lola.

name: Lonz
bio: Vice Admiral Lonz is a Marine vice admiral who is also part of the Giant Squad.

name: Lord of the Coast
bio: The Lord of the Coast is a Sea King that inhabits the waters of Dawn Island, typically near Foosha Village. He is classified as a Type C creature, "Big Savage".

name: Love
bio: Love is a Baroque Works Millions agent stationed at Whisky Peak.

name: Lu Feld
bio: Lu Feld, known as the "God of Fortune", is the "Loan Shark King". He is a member of the Lu Feld Conglomerate, the former financer of MADS, and an emperor of the Underworld.

name: Lucky Roux
bio: Lucky Roux is one of the Senior Officers, and the cook of the Red Hair Pirates.

name: Lulis
bio: Lulis is a marine angelfish mermaid and one of the Mermaid Cafe Dancers.

name: MAX Marx
bio: MAX Marx was the cook of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Machvise
bio: Machvise is an officer of the Donquixote Pirates ' Diamante Army. Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist during the Dressrosa Arc.

name: Macro
bio: Macro is a pelican eel fish-man and the captain of the Macro Pirates. He first appeared in Hatchan's Sea-Floor Stroll cover story.

name: Madilloman
bio: Madilloman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates.

name: Mag
bio: Mag is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph.

name: Magellan
bio: Magellan is the vice warden of Impel Down. He was formerly the chief warden, but after his failure to stop the jail's one and only mass-breakout, he was replaced by Hannyabal and demoted to vice warden.

name: Magnolia
bio: Magnolia was the mother of Shamrock and Shanks, and the lover of Figarland Garling. A native of God Valley, she was killed during the prelude of the God Valley Incident by Garling.

name: Magra
bio: Magra is a member of the Dadan Family that are active on Mt. Colubo on Dawn Island.

name: Maha
bio: Maha is a masked agent of CP0. Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist during the Wano Country Arc.

name: Maidy
bio: Maidy is a servant of the Nefertari Family, working as a lady's maid in Alubarna Palace.

name: Maki
bio: Maki is a member of the Blackbeard Pirates.

name: Makino
bio: Makino is the owner and bartender of Partys Bar in Foosha Village, Monkey D. Luffy's home town. She is also the mother of an unknown child.

name: Makino's Child
bio: Makino's child is an unnamed baby born to Makino and an unknown man during the two-year timeskip.

name: Makko
bio: Ensign Makko is a senior member of Hina's death squad who was on one of the ships that attacked the Straw Hat Pirates as they fled Arabasta.

name: Manboshi
bio: Manboshi is an opah merman and the third son of the royal Neptune Family on Fish-Man Island.

name: Mani
bio: Mani was a combatant of the Bellamy Pirates.

name: Manjaro
bio: Manjaro is a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew and masqueraded as Zoro. When the crew switched to posing as the Kid Pirates, Manjaro impersonated Heat.

name: Manmayer Gunko
occupation: Knight of God; Devoted Blade of God (former); Princess (former)
bio: Saint Manmayer Gunko is a World Noble and a member of the Knights of God. Previously, she was a Devoted Blade of God serving under the Knights of God 38 years ago during the events of the God Valley Incident.

name: Mansherry
bio: Mansherry is a dwarf and the princess of the Tontatta Kingdom. She is the daughter of Gancho, the king of the Tontatta Kingdom.

name: Marco
bio: Marco the Phoenix is the former 1st division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates. Once starting out as an apprentice on the crew, he eventually came to be Whitebeard's closest confidant and right-hand man.

name: Marcus Mars
occupation: Co-Head of the World Government (Public) ; Warrior God of Environment ( 環境武神 , Kankyō Bushin ? , English versions: "Godhead of Environment")
bio: Saint Marcus Mars is a World Noble and one of the Five Elders who publicly head the World Government, holding the title of Warrior God of Environment. Due to his actions and role, he is one of the secondary antagonists of the Egghead Arc.

name: Margarita
bio: Margarita is the owner of the shadow that was inserted into Victoria Cindry's corpse twelve years ago. She currently works as a maid for Egana.

name: Marguerite
bio: Marguerite is a member of the Kuja tribe living on the island of Amazon Lily. She, along with Aphelandra and Sweet Pea, saved Luffy after he ate mushrooms that completely covered his body.

name: Mari
bio: Mari is the king of the Czacho Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Maria Napole
bio: Maria Napole is a largehead hairtail mermaid and a famous singer considered the pride of Fish-Man Island.

name: Marianne
bio: Marianne, also known as the "Flag-Bearer of Freedom" and more commonly by her alias Miss Goldenweek, is a former officer agent of Baroque Works and the partner of Mr. 3.

name: Marie
bio: Marie is the thirteenth wife of Saint Charlos. Before being enslaved by Charlos, she worked as a nurse in the Sabaody Archipelago, and was the fiancée of Judy.

name: Marilyn
bio: Marilyn is a woman that lives in Skypiea. She was Miss Skypiea forty-two years ago.

name: Marin
bio: Marin is a male slave who was forced to dress as a mermaid by his owner.

name: Marine Headquarters Court
bio: The Marine Headquarters Court consists of three judges and was seen in Jango's cover story.

name: Mario
bio: Mario is a dog that tore off the arm of a toy citizen of Dressrosa.

name: Marlon
bio: Don Marlon was a member of the Rocks Pirates and a gangster from the West Blue. He joined Rocks D. Xebec after losing a Davy Back Fight, but was later killed during the World Government's abduction of Shakuyaku.

name: Marshall D. Teach
occupation: Pirate ; Admiral ; Emperor ; Apprentice (former); Warlord of the Sea (former)
bio: Marshall D. Teach, most commonly referred to by his epithet "Blackbeard", is the admiral of the Blackbeard Pirates, and one of the Four Emperors that rule over the New World. He is the son of the legendary pirate Rocks D. Xebec and his wife Eris, making him a member of the nearly-extinct Davy Family and a descendant of Davy D. Jones, which is only known to a small number of individuals, including his own crew, the Five Elders, and Nerona Imu.

name: Marumieta
bio: Marumieta is the only daughter of Bimine, the mayor of Pucci.

name: Mashikaku
bio: Chief Petty Officer Mashikaku is a subordinate of Smoker and Tashigi. However, it is unknown if he remained with the two after they transferred to G-5 as he is not seen with the G-5 Marines.

name: Masira
bio: "Salvage King" Masira is the boss of the Masira Pirates and the head of a simian ship salvage operation near Jaya Island. His sworn brother is Shoujou and both of them are members of the Saruyama Alliance, headed by Mont Blanc Cricket.

name: Masked Deuce
bio: Masked Deuce is an alias used by the first member of Ace's pirate crew, the Spade Pirates, usually referred to as just "Deuce" or "Deu". He abandoned his real name, which remains unknown, but is known to have come from a prominent East Blue family of medical professionals.

name: Massui
bio: Massui is a Waiter in the Beasts Pirates.

name: Mato
bio: Mato is a notorious giant bartendress from Elbaph.

name: Matryo Princesses
bio: The Matryo Princesses are the princesses of the Roshwan Kingdom. Their names, in order from largest to smallest, are Matryosaka, Matryosuka, Matryoseka, and Matryosoka.

name: Matsuge
bio: Matsuge is a yasa camel who accompanied the Straw Hat Pirates during the Arabasta Arc. He is classified as a Type-A creature, "Big Friendly" and currently works as a member of the Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops.

name: Maujii
bio: Maujii is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom and the aide of Princess Mansherry.

name: Maynard
bio: Maynard the Pursuer is a vice admiral who appears in the Dressrosa Arc. He was registered as a gladiator to compete at the Corrida Colosseum for the Mera Mera no Mi, but was defeated before he could participate.

name: Mayushika
bio: Mayushika is one of the Shandia warriors who fought against Enel.

name: McGuy
bio: "Thunder Lord" McGuy is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: McKinley
bio: McKinley is a member of God Guardians (previously known as the White Berets), Skypiea's police force. He initially serves as a minor antagonist in the Skypiea Arc, but later becomes an (indirect) ally to the Straw Hat Pirates.

name: Meadows
bio: Meadows is a gladiator who competed in the Corrida Colosseum for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Mecha-Shark
bio: The Mecha-Shark is a cyborg shark created by Vegapunk alongside the Sea Beast Weapons.

name: Medaka Mermaid Quintuplets
bio: The Medaka Mermaid Quintuplets are five young Japanese rice fish mermaids who are friends with Camie. Their names are Ichika, Nika, Sanka, Yonka, and Yonka Two.

name: Megalo
bio: Megalo is a shark that lives on Fish-Man Island. He is the beloved pet of princess Shirahoshi and former pet of the Neptune Army.

name: Mero
bio: Mero is a smelt-whiting mermaid and one of the top five Mermaid Cafe Dancers.

name: Merry
bio: Merry is Kaya's butler, and the original designer of the Going Merry. He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Syrup Village Arc.

name: Mezasuzowan Pisuo
bio: Mezasuzowan Pisuo is a member of the Germ Pirates.

name: Michael and Hoichael
bio: Michael and Hoichael are two troublemaker children in the backstreets of Water 7. They idolize Franky, and even dress like him and use his motto as their own: "Mm, super!!", and similarly idolize Paulie.

name: Mihar
bio: "Indoor" Mihar is a member of the Spade Pirates and, subsequently, the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Mikazuki
bio: Mikazuki is the captain and only named member of the Big Helmet Pirates.

name: Mikio Itoo
bio: Mikio Itoo is a background joke character created by Eiichiro Oda, and arguably the first Easter Egg featured in One Piece. He is a caricature of Mikio Ito, a Yokohama-born manga creator whom Oda knew as a fellow assistant to Nobuhiro Watsuki.

name: Mikita
bio: "Courier" Mikita, more commonly known by her alias Miss Valentine, is a former officer agent of Baroque Works who was partnered with Mr. 5.

name: Miles
bio: Miles is a trumpetfish merman and a trumpeter in a swing jazz orchestra from Fish-Man Island.

name: Milky
bio: Milky is a reindeer mink and a member of the Guardians.

name: Millet Pine
bio: Millet Pine was the torturer of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution.

name: Milo
bio: Milo is a citizen of Dressrosa. While he was a toy, he was known as " Onepoco ".

name: Minatomo
bio: Minatomo is a legendary carpenter in Wano Country and the leader of a guild that Franky joined to get access to the blueprints of Kaidou's fortress. He is related to another person, whose name is also Minatomo, who is a descendant of someone who traveled from Wano to East Blue.

name: Minister of the Left
bio: The Minister of the Left is a catfish merman in service of King Neptune. While it is not clear what his job entails, it appears to involve some sort of administrative and military duties.

name: Minister of the Right
bio: The Minister of the Right is a seahorse merman in service to King Neptune. While it is not clear exactly what his job entails, he appears to have some administrative and military duties.

name: Minochihuahua
bio: Minochihuahua is the newest Jailer Beast in Impel Down. He is an Awakened Zoan Devil Fruit user who ate a fruit that allows him to turn into a chihuahua.

name: Minokoala
bio: Minokoala is one of the five Jailer Beasts of Impel Down. He is an Awakened Zoan Devil Fruit user that ate a fruit that allows him to turn into a koala.

name: Minorhinoceros
bio: Minorhinoceros is one of the five Jailer Beasts of Impel Down. He is an Awakened Zoan Devil Fruit user, having eaten a Devil Fruit that allows him to turn into a blue rhinoceros.

name: Minoruba
bio: Minoruba is a bounty hunter on Sabaody Archipelago.

name: Minotaurus
bio: Minotaurus is one of Impel Down's Jailer Beasts. He is an awakened Zoan Devil Fruit user who ate a fruit that allows him to turn into a Holstein cow.

name: Minozebra
bio: Minozebra is one of the five Jailer Beasts of Impel Down. He is an Awakened Zoan Devil Fruit user that ate a fruit that allows him to turn into a zebra.

name: Misery
bio: Misery is a homie created by Big Mom as an attack during the Raid on Onigashima. She is formed from the Maser Saber combination of Prometheus, Hera, and Napoleon.

name: Mishoin Cashible
bio: Mishoin Cashible is a salesman based in Water 7 who rents bulls to ferry people around the canals.

name: Miss Catherina
bio: Miss Catherina is a former Baroque Works Millions agent who was stationed at Whisky Peak alongside her partner, Mr. Beans.

name: Miss Father's Day
bio: Miss Father's Day is a former Frontier Agent of Baroque Works, being half of a sniper duo along with her partner, Mr. 7.

name: Miss Friday
bio: Miss Friday is a vulture and a member of the criminal organization Baroque Works, being a part of the Unluckies ( 13, Anrakkīzu? ) along with Mr.

name: Miss Monday
bio: Miss Monday is the code name of a former frontier agent of Baroque Works and partner to Igaram (Mr. 8 at the time) during his infiltration of Baroque Works.

name: Miss Mother's Day
bio: Miss Mother's Day is the partner of Mr. 6 and a Frontier Agent in the Baroque Works rankings.

name: Miss Saturday
bio: Miss Saturday is the partner of Mr. 12 and a Frontier Agent in the Baroque Works rankings.

name: Miss Thursday
bio: Miss Thursday is the former partner of Mr. 11 and a Frontier Agent of Baroque Works.

name: Miss Tuesday
bio: Miss Tuesday is the partner of Mr. 10 and a Frontier Agent in the Baroque Works rankings.

name: Misty
bio: Misty is a Baroque Works Millions agent stationed at Whisky Peak.

name: Miyagi
bio: Miyagi is a goat mink and one of Inuarashi's subjects, until Carrot took the throne of Mokomo Dukedom.

name: Mizerka
bio: Mizerka is a Shinuchi in the Beasts Pirates. During the raid on Onigashima, she was tamed by the power of the Kibi Kibi no Mi and joined the side of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance.

name: Mizuira
bio: Mizuira was a little girl from Ohara. She was the daughter of Oran and Roji, the niece of Nico Olvia, and the cousin of Nico Robin.

name: Mizuta Madaisuki
bio: Mizuta Madaisuki was the older of the two Mizuta Twins, identical twin brothers of the Rumbar Pirates. He and his brother, Mawaritosuki, were identified by Oda in a SBS question.

name: Mizuta Mawaritosuki
bio: Mizuta Mawaritosuki was the younger of the two Mizuta Twins, identical twin brothers of the Rumbar Pirates. He and his brother, Madaisuki, were identified by Oda in a SBS question.

name: Moai
bio: Moai is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: MocDonald
bio: MocDonald was a Wild Zombie who lived on Thriller Bark.

name: Mocha
bio: Mocha is a little girl who was held captive on Punk Hazard. She was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates.

name: Mochi
bio: Mochi is a Skypiean on Angel Island and Moyle's son.

name: Moda
bio: Moda is a milk maiden from the Lulusia Kingdom that Ace met during his cover story. She is the daughter of Koda and Kyuji.

name: Mohji
bio: Mohji the Beast Tamer is a pirate and the first mate of the Buggy Pirates and a member of the Buggy and Alvida Alliance. He is a pet tamer, usually accompanied by his pet lion Richie.

name: Momonga
occupation: Vice Admiral ; Base Commander of G-1
bio: Vice Admiral Momonga is a Marine officer and the Base Commander of the G-1 Marine Base. He was one of the five Vice Admirals who had led the Buster Call on Enies Lobby.

name: Momoo
occupation: Arlong Pirates' pet (former); Caribou Pirates' steed (former)
bio: Momoo is a giant sea cow from the Grand Line, and the first Sea Beast seen in the series. He is classified as a Type A creature, "Big Friendly".

name: Monda
bio: Monda is a Star Shark and a former pet animal of the Foxy Pirates. He left the crew sometime during the Timeskip.

name: Monet
occupation: Caesar's secretary (Undercover); Doflamingo's spy; Pirate Officer
bio: Monet was a scout and assistant for Caesar Clown and his underlings in the research facility on Punk Hazard. She was, in truth, a member and officer of the Donquixote Pirates and was sent as a deep cover agent by Doflamingo.

name: Monjii
bio: Monjii is a monkey mink.

name: Monjiro
bio: Monjiro is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family. After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards, he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima.

name: Monkey D. Dragon
occupation: Supreme Commander of the Revolutionary Army; Captain of the Freedom Fighters (former)
bio: Monkey D. Dragon, also known as the "Rebellious Dragon", is the supreme commander and founder of the Revolutionary Army (originally the Freedom Fighters ). A former Marine, his disgust with the organization's actions in the God Valley Incident, and its brutality in the Ohara Incident led to him forming the Revolutionary Army to oppose the World Government in its entirety.

name: Monkey D. Garp
bio: Monkey D. Garp, also known as "Garp the Fist", is an extremely famous and powerful Marine Vice Admiral. He is the father of Monkey D. Dragon, the paternal grandfather of Monkey D. Luffy, and the adoptive grandfather of Portgas D. Ace.

name: Monkey D. Luffy
occupation: Pirate Captain ; Emperor ; Senior Captain of the Grand Fleet; Prisoner (former); Chore Boy (temporary, former); Bandit (former)
bio: Monkey D. Luffy, commonly known as "Straw Hat Luffy" or simply "Straw Hat", is the founder and captain of the Straw Hat Pirates. He pursues the legendary treasure of the late Gol D. Roger in order to become the new Pirate King and reach a further, untold dream (currently known to only his crew, family and closest friends).

name: Monster
bio: Monster is one of the Senior Officers and musicians of the Red Hair Pirates. He first appeared playing with his crew at the Partys Bar.

name: Mont Blanc Cricket
bio: Mont Blanc Cricket is an inhabitant of Jaya, living in a small home behind the façade of a castle. He is the distant descendant of Mont Blanc Noland and the "Last Boss" of the Saruyama Alliance.

name: Mont Blanc Noland
bio: Mont Blanc Noland was an admiral in the Lvneel Kingdom and a famous explorer who made multiple trips into the Grand Line. He discovered a City of Gold on Jaya, but found upon returning there with Lvneel's king that it had disappeared, causing him to be executed.

name: Moodie
