bio: Moodie is a woman who Fullbody took to the Baratie.

name: Moon Isaac Jr.
bio: Moon Isaac Jr. was a member of the Roger Pirates and their tactical staff officer until the crew's dissolution.

name: Moqueca
bio: Moqueca is the king of the Samba Kingdom in the South Blue and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Morgan
occupation: Marine Captain (former); Marine Lieutenant Commander (former); Marine Chief Petty Officer (former)
bio: "Axe-Hand" Morgan is a former Marine captain, the father of Helmeppo and the first significant Marine officer to appear in the storyline. After his defeat by Monkey D. Luffy and Roronoa Zoro, he was stripped of his rank for his many abuses of power.

name: Morgans
occupation: World Economy News Paper President; Emperor of the Underworld
bio: "Big News" Morgans is the president of the World Economy News Paper and one of the emperors of the Underworld. His first appearance was during the Whole Cake Island Arc, as one of the more high-profile guests in Big Mom's Tea Party.

name: Morley
occupation: West Army Commander of the Revolutionary Army; Pirate (former); Prisoner of Impel Down (former)
bio: Morley of Fur is a giant and a newkama, as well as the commander of the West Army in the Revolutionary Army. Morley's existence was first alluded by Emporio Ivankov during the Impel Down Arc, as the one responsible for the creation of Newkama Land.

name: Mornin
bio: Mornin is the mayor of Syrup Village, and one of several villagers who used Usopp's antics as a makeshift alarm clock.

name: Mororon
bio: Mororon is the queen of the Tajine Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Mosa
bio: Mosa is a mysterious friend of Loki.

name: Mosh
bio: Mosh is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Motobaro
bio: Motobaro is the pet bison of Duval. He is used by Duval as a steed, and can also swim on water.

name: Mottled
bio: Mottled is a Sea King. It is one of the six Sea Kings that speak to Shirahoshi when she fully manifests the power of Poseidon.

name: Motzel
bio: Mr. Motzel is a gourmand and one of the known customers of the Baratie.

name: Mountain God
bio: The Mountain God, respectfully called Yama-san by Kouzuki Oden and his retainers, is a giant boar that lived in the forests of Wano Country as late as thirty years ago. In what became known as the Mountain God Incident, it was cut down by Kouzuki Oden during its attack on Flower Capital, but it ultimately survived the ordeal.

name: Mountain Ricky
bio: Mountain Ricky is a former member of the Foxy Pirates. He fought George Mach before the third round of the Davy Back Fight.

name: Mouseman
bio: Mouseman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates. He resides in Bakura Town.

name: Mousse
bio: Mousse was the daughter of Kalgara and Herb and was considered the most beautiful of the Shandia women on the island of Jaya four hundred years ago.

name: Mouthto Mouthyan
bio: Mouthto Mouthyan is a citizen of Dressrosa.

name: Moyle
occupation: Member of the Divine Squad; Slave
bio: Moyle is a Skypiean and the father of Mochi. He originally worked for Gan Fall in the Divine Squad, but after Enel took over, he and the other members were forced to work in God's Army until they were betrayed and almost killed.

name: Mozambia
bio: Vice Admiral Mozambia is a Marine officer who attended the meeting with the Seven Warlords of the Sea to discuss Crocodile's replacement.

name: Mozu and Kiwi
bio: Mozu and Kiwi, also known as the Square Sisters due to their square-like hairstyle, are two women from Water 7 who were part of the Franky Family. They were both very loyal to Franky, going with him everywhere and tending to imitate every pose he made.

name: Mr. 10
bio: Mr. 10 is the partner to Miss Tuesday and a Frontier Agent in the Baroque Works rankings.

name: Mr. 11
bio: Mr. 11 was a Frontier Agent for Baroque Works and the partner of Miss Thursday.

name: Mr. 12
bio: Mr. 12 is the partner of Miss Saturday and a Frontier Agent in the Baroque Works rankings.

name: Mr. 13
bio: Mr. 13 is an otter and a member of the criminal organization Baroque Works, being a part of the Unluckies ( 13, Anrakkīzu?

name: Mr. 6
bio: Mr. 6 is the partner of Miss Mother's Day and the top Frontier Agent in the Baroque Works rankings.

name: Mr. 7
bio: Mr. 7 is a former Frontier Agent of Baroque Works, being half of a sniper duo along with his partner, Miss Father's Day.

name: Mr. 9
bio: Mr. 9 is the code name of a former Frontier Agent and bounty hunter of Baroque Works, and Miss Wednesday's former assigned partner during her infiltration.

name: Mr. Beans
bio: Mr. Beans is a former Baroque Works Millions agent who was stationed at Whisky Peak alongside his partner, Miss Catherina.

name: Mr. Love
bio: Mr. Love is one of Baroque Works ' Billions [ citation needed ] who posed as a member of the Rebel Army.

name: Mr. Mellow
bio: Mr. Mellow is one of the only identified members of Baroque Works ' Billions.

name: Mr. Momora
bio: Mr. Momora was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution.

name: Mr. Shimizu
bio: Mr. Shimizu was a Baroque Works Millions agent stationed at Whisky Peak.

name: Muchana
bio: Muchana is a doctor who currently works in Impel Down's medical room.

name: Muginn
bio: Muginn is a giant raven that lives in the Land of Gods.

name: Mugren
bio: Colonel Mugren was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Mukkashimi Tower
bio: Mukkashimi Tower is a spectator at the Corrida Colosseum.

name: Mummy
bio: Mummy is a sorcerer who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Mummy Mee
bio: Mummy Mee is one of the houseparents, alongside Daddy Dee, of a World Government-affiliated orphanage situated on the Conomi Islands.

name: Muret
bio: Muret was the doctor of the Bellamy Pirates.

name: Muti
bio: Muti is Koala's mother.

name: Nakaiwa
bio: Nakaiwa is a man who lived in the Wano Country 41 years ago.

name: Nako
bio: Dr. Nako is a doctor from Cocoyasi Village.

name: Nami
occupation: Navigator ; Senior Officer ; Thief; Pirate Officer (Arlong Pirates, former); Kunoichi (temporary)
bio: "Cat Burglar" Nami is the navigator of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet. She is the third member of the crew and the second to join, doing so during the Orange Town Arc.

name: Namur
bio: Namur is a fish-man and the former 8th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Nanday
bio: Nanday is the infant son of Mr. 9 and Miss Monday.

name: Nangi
bio: Nangi is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates, representing the number "seven". Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc.

name: Napoleon
bio: Napoleon the Bicorne is a homie taking the form of a bicorne hat that is worn by Big Mom. He can also become a sword homie that Big Mom uses in combat.

name: Nash
bio: Nash is a giant shield homie that is owned by Goldberg of the New Giant Warrior Pirates.

name: Nashi
bio: Nashi is the king of the Ringo Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Natto
bio: Natto is a former member of the Sand-Sand Clan and, later, of the Arabasta Rebel Army.

name: Needle God
bio: The Needle God is a giant hedgehog that lives in the Land of Gods, within Bigstein Castle.

name: Nefertari Cobra
bio: Nefertari Cobra was the 12th king of the Arabasta Kingdom, the former patriarch of Nefertari Family, husband of the late Nefertari Titi and father of Nefertari Vivi. He was related to Nefertari D. Lili, one of the First Twenty monarchs who founded the World Government, and secretly bore her initial D.

name: Nefertari D. Lili
bio: Nefertari D. Lili was the queen of the Arabasta Kingdom during the time of the Void Century, being one of the twenty monarchs credited with the founding of the World Government. However, Lili was the only one who chose not to become a World Noble and move to Mary Geoise; but before she could return to her home country, she mysteriously vanished.

name: Nefertari Titi
bio: Nefertari Titi was the queen of the Arabasta Kingdom, Nefertari Cobra's wife, and Nefertari Vivi's mother.

name: Nefertari Vivi
occupation: Princess of Arabasta; Pirate (former); Bounty Hunter (former); Frontier Agent (former); Sand-Sand Clan Vice-Leader (former)
bio: Nefertari Vivi is the princess of the Arabasta Kingdom. She is the daughter of Nefertari Cobra and Titi, and along with the rest of her family, she bears the initial D.

name: Neggy
bio: Neggy is the queen of the Gingapore Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Negikuma Maria
bio: Negikuma Maria is a resident of Drum Island, and friend of Dalton.

name: Nekomamushi
occupation: Yakuza Boss ; Ruler of Mokomo Dukedom (former); Guardian of the Whale Forest (former); Retainer; Samurai ; Pirate Apprentice (former)
bio: Master Nekomamushi is a feline mink and the former guardian of the Whale Forest on Zou. He was one of the two rulers of the Mokomo Dukedom, dubbed the "Ruler of Night", holding the position from 6:00 PM to 6:00 AM.

name: Nekozaemon
bio: Nekozaemon was a cat created by Kurozumi Kanjuro using the power of the Fude Fude no Mi. It was created to aid him, Kin'emon, and Bariete scale Zunesha's leg to reach Zou, though it ultimately failed in its goal.

name: Neoki
bio: Neoki is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region.

name: Neptune
occupation: King of the Ryugu Kingdom; Prince (former)
bio: King Neptune is a coelacanth merman and the king of the Ryugu Kingdom on Fish-Man Island. He is also the current patriarch of the Neptune Family, father of Fukaboshi, Ryuboshi, Manboshi, and Shirahoshi, and the husband of the late Queen Otohime.

name: Nerine
bio: Nerine is a member of the Kuja from Amazon Lily.

name: Nero
bio: Nero the Sea Weasel was the newest agent of CP9 and part of the team escorting Nico Robin to Enies Lobby. He was one of the antagonists during the Puffing Tom's voyage in the Water 7 Arc.

name: Nerona Imu
bio: Saint Nerona Imu is the King of the World who occupies the Empty Throne, giving him sole authority over the World Government. One of the First Twenty responsible for the creation of the World Government and the only one alive today, his status has been kept an absolute secret from the world at large for over 800 years since the Void Century.

name: Nezumi
bio: Captain Nezumi is a Marine captain of the 16th Branch in the East Blue. Highly corrupt, he covered up the vast majority of Arlong's actions in the Conomi Islands in exchange for bribe money.

name: Nico Olvia
bio: Nico Olvia was an archaeologist from Ohara who studied the Poneglyphs two decades ago, the mother of Nico Robin, and the older sister of Oran and paternal aunt of Mizuira. While sailing with a group of fellow archaeologists, Olvia was captured by the Marines for conducting forbidden research.

name: Nico Robin
occupation: Archaeologist ; Senior Officer ; Geisha (temporary); Assassin (former); Baroque Works Vice President (former); Rain Dinners manager (former); Revolutionary (former, temporarily); Slave (former)
bio: Nico Robin, also known by her epithet "Devil Child" and the "Light of the Revolution", is the archaeologist of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet. She is the seventh member of the crew and the sixth to join, doing so at the end of the Arabasta Arc.

name: Nigeratta
bio: Nigeratta is a man from Nico Robin's past.

name: Nightcrab Girl
bio: Nightcrab Girl is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates.

name: Nika
bio: Nika is the name of a legendary warrior revered as the Sun God by slaves from ancient times and whose existence is tied to Elbaph mythology and folklore. He was first mentioned by Who's-Who, who heard about the legend from a prison guard during his imprisonment by the World Government.

name: Ninjin
bio: Ninjin is a former member of the Usopp Pirates, along with Piiman and Tamanegi, before Usopp joined the Straw Hat Pirates. He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Syrup Village Arc.

name: Ninth
bio: Ninth is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Nitro
bio: Nitro is a jelly homie that is often seen with Charlotte Pudding.

name: Noble Croc
bio: The Noble Croc is a crocodile homie that lives in the Seducing Woods on Whole Cake Island.

name: Nodoi Wakan
bio: Nodoi Wakan is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region.

name: Nojiko
bio: Nojiko is the owner of a mikan farm in Cocoyasi Village and the adoptive older sister of Nami. They were raised together by their adoptive mother, Bell-mère.

name: Nokokuwa Police
bio: Nokokuwa Police is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates and part of the Armored Division led by Sasaki. During the Raid on Onigashima, he was tamed by the power of the Kibi Kibi no Mi and joined the side of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance.

name: Nokotti
bio: Nokotti is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region. She acted as the gyōji during the Sumo Inferno held by Queen.

name: Nola
bio: Nola, known to many as the Master of the Sky, is a giant snake who lives on Upper Yard in Skypiea. Having lived for over four centuries, the snake was once the companion of Kalgara and Mont Blanc Noland back when Upper Yard was still part of Jaya.

name: Noriko
bio: Noriko is a nori maker who lives in Ebisu Town.

name: Norinosuke
bio: Norinosuke is a self-proclaimed shaman from the Flower Capital of the Wano Country and the father of Beasts Pirates officer Holed'em.

name: Nubon
bio: Nubon is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared on Green Bit.

name: Nugire Yainu
bio: Nugire Yainu was the shipwright of the Black Cat Pirates and the crew member who was killed by the Marines three years prior to Kuro enacting his plan.

name: Nure-Onna
bio: Nure-Onna is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates who works under Black Maria.

name: Nyasha
bio: Nyasha is a giant cat owned by the Vinsmoke Family that pulls their royal carriage.

name: Oars
occupation: Special Zombie ; Leader of clan of evil giants (former)
bio: Oars the Continent-Puller, also known as the "Devil", was an infamous ancient giant. Around 500 years, he wreaked havoc on the seas by conquering countries and hauling away entire islands, which he used to create a "nation of villains".

name: Oars Jr.
bio: Little Oars Jr. (also referred to as Oars III on his flag) is the captain of the Little Pirates, a descendant of Oars, and a former subordinate of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Ochoku
occupation: Pirate Guru; Admiral of Pirate Island (former)
bio: Ochoku is a former member of the Rocks Pirates. Following his time with the crew he became the ruler of Hachinosu, before being overthrown by Blackbeard during the Rocky Port Incident.

name: Octopako
bio: Octopako is an octopus fish-woman whom Hatchan tried to win over during his cover story, Hatchan's Sea-Floor Stroll.

name: Ohm
bio: "Skybreeder" Ohm is one of four priests of the former God Enel and a high-ranking member of God's Army. Together with his giant dog steed Holy, he subjected God's enemies to the Ordeal of Iron on Upper Yard.

name: Oide
bio: Oide is a little girl who lives in Sphinx. She is the owner of Tama.

name: Oimo
bio: Oimo is a giant from Elbaph and a member of the Giant Warrior Pirates under Dorry and Brogy. He has a grandson attending the Walrus School on Elbaph; Olav.

name: Oiwa
bio: Oiwa is a man who lived in the Wano Country 41 years ago.

name: Okame
bio: Okame was a member of the Sand-Sand Clan and, later, of the Arabasta Rebel Army.

name: Okome
bio: Okome is the first mate and the only known member of the Hokahoka Pirates.

name: Olav
bio: Olav is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph. He is the grandson of Oimo.

name: Oli
bio: Crone Oli is a pirate captain subordinate to the Red Hair Pirates.

name: Omasa
bio: "Blood-Writing" Omasa is a yakuza boss who was in charge of the Udon region in Wano Country. He was imprisoned in Udon by the Beasts Pirates, but was freed when Luffy took over the prison.

name: Onigumo
bio: Vice Admiral Onigumo is a Marine officer, and one of the five vice admirals who led the Buster Call on Enies Lobby. His name was revealed in the third databook.

name: Onimaru
bio: Onimaru is a komagitsune who was once the companion of the late daimyo of Ringo, Shimotsuki Ushimaru. After the death of his master, he joined forces with Kawamatsu in collecting weapons for the final battle against Kaidou and protecting them from robbers.

name: Oran
bio: Oran was the husband of Roji, the father of Mizuira, the younger brother of Nico Olvia, and the maternal uncle and foster parent of Nico Robin.

name: Orlumbus
occupation: Captain of the Seventh Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Pirate ; Admiral ; Adventurer (former)
bio: "Massacre Ruler" Orlumbus is a former adventurer from the Standing Kingdom and the admiral of the Yonta Maria Grand Fleet. He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Ossamondo
bio: Ossamondo is a member of the Spade Pirates.

name: Otohime
bio: Queen Otohime was a goldfish mermaid, the queen of the Ryugu Kingdom, the wife of king Neptune, and the mother of Fukaboshi, Ryuboshi, Manboshi, and Shirahoshi. Otohime was a political activist who worked hard for union and peace between fish-men plus merfolk and humans, dreaming of having her people emigrate from the Sea Floor to the surface.

name: Ottoland
bio: Ottoland is one of the Franky Family's Kairiki Destroyers.

name: Outlook III
bio: Outlook III is a noble of the Goa Kingdom. He is the husband of Didit, the biological father of Sabo, and the adoptive father of Sterry.

name: Packy
bio: Koze and Packy were members of the Yes Pirates.

name: Pagaya
bio: Pagaya is Conis ' father and a native to Skypiea who fixed the waver that Nami rides.

name: Page One
bio: Page One is a former member of the Tobiroppo, the strongest Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates. He is the son of the former Warlord of the Sea Hanafuda and younger brother of fellow former Tobiroppo Ulti.

name: Palms
bio: Palms is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Pandaman
bio: Pandaman is a joke character created by Eiichiro Oda, and one of the most prominent easter eggs in One Piece. Originally designed for a Kinnikuman character creation contest, Pandaman has gone on to make cameo appearances in many manga chapters, anime episodes, films, and more.

name: Pandora
bio: Pandora is a sun homie that was created by Carmel, who placed a portion of her soul into a fire on Elbaph with the power of the Soru Soru no Mi.

name: Pankuta Dakeyan
bio: Pankuta Dakeyan is a prisoner in Impel Down.

name: Pansy
bio: Pansy is a member of the Kuja tribe.

name: Papaneel
bio: Papaneel is a barracuda fish-man who lived on Fish-Man Island sixteen years ago.

name: Papas
bio: Papas is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Pappag
bio: Pappag is a starfish who is Camie's pet and teacher. He is the creator of the Criminal fashion line and is mentoring Camie to be a fashion designer.

name: Part
bio: Part is a member of the Bonney Pirates. He was once a resident of the Sorbet Kingdom, having been a friend of Bartholomew Kuma and Ginny since young adulthood.

name: Pascia
bio: Pascia is a female dancer, who was to be sold at the Auction House.

name: Patty
bio: Patty is one of the main cooks at the Baratie, currently serving as the restaurant's head pâtissier.

name: Paulie
occupation: Vice President of Galley-La ; Dock One Foreman (promoted); Shipwright
bio: Paulie is the current vice president of the Galley-La Company in Water 7. Before being promoted, he was one of the five Dock One foremen, specializing in rigging, knots, and masts.

name: Pavlik
bio: Pavlik is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Peachbeard
bio: Peachbeard is the epithet of the captain of the Peachbeard Pirates, who are subordinates of the Emperor Blackbeard.

name: Pearl
occupation: Commander of the Krieg Pirates ' second unit
bio: Pearl the Iron Wall is the commander of the Krieg Pirates ' second unit. Due to his actions, he can be considered the tertiary antagonist of the Baratie Arc.

name: Pedro
occupation: Captain of the Guardians; Pirate Captain (former); Explorer (former)
bio: Pedro of the Treetops was a jaguar mink and captain of the Guardians. He was the former captain of the Nox Pirates who sailed in search of a Poneglyph, and he earned a bounty of 382,000,000 in the process, but his journey was cut short in Totto Land.

name: Peepley Lulu
bio: Peepley Lulu is one of the five foremen of the Galley-La Company's Dock 1 in Water 7. His specialties as a shipwright are pitch, block and tackle, and blacksmithing.

name: Pekkori
bio: Pekkori is the village mayor of Harahettania, the Land of Poverty, situated on Namakura Island in Paradise. He directed the ritual in which he and his people "summoned" Brook, though they were trying to summon the devil.

name: Pekoms
bio: Pekoms is a combatant of the Big Mom Pirates and a lion mink. He is partnered with Tamago, and both are responsible for collecting the monthly payment of sweets from Fish-Man Island in exchange for Big Mom's protection.

name: Pell
bio: Pell the Falcon is one of the two head guards in the Arabasta Kingdom that serve under Igaram, the other being Chaka. He is said to be the strongest fighter in all of Arabasta.

name: Pellini
bio: Pellini is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared on Green Bit.

name: Penguin
bio: Penguin is a member of the Heart Pirates.

name: Peppoko
bio: Peppoko is a member of the Alvida Pirates and the triplet brother of Heppoko and Poppoko.

name: Perona
occupation: Pirate ; Wild Zombies and Surprise Zombies Commander
bio: "Ghost Princess" Perona is a member of the Thriller Bark Pirates and the former commander of the Wild Zombies and Surprise Zombies, prior to Thriller Bark's collapse. She was introduced as one of the Mysterious Four, the highest-ranking officers of Thriller Bark; however, she was sent to Kuraigaina Island by Bartholomew Kuma before the defeat of Gecko Moria's army.

name: Peterman
bio: Peterman is the head of a kidnapping gang called the Hound Pets, located in Sabaody Archipelago, and a minor antagonist of the Sabaody Archipelago Arc.

name: Petermoo
bio: Petermoo was the gunner of the Roger Pirates.

name: Pica
bio: Pica is one of the top three officers of the Donquixote Pirates. He occupies the Spade seat of the Donquixote Family and is the leader of the crew's Pica Army subdivision.

name: Pickles
bio: Pickles, also known as the "Tackle Machine", is a former combatant of the Groggy Monsters of the Foxy Pirates. Due to his actions, he is a major antagonist of the Long Ring Long Land Arc.

name: Pierre
bio: Pierre is a Sky Dot Bird belonging to Gan Fall.

name: Piiman
bio: Piiman is a former member of the Usopp Pirates, along with Ninjin and Tamanegi, from before Usopp joined the Straw Hat Pirates. He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Syrup Village Arc.

name: Pike
bio: Pike is a member of the G-5 branch of the Marines.

name: Pinky
bio: Monstrous Bird Pinky is a giant bird that appeared in the Orange Town Arc. He is classified as a Type C creature, "Big Savage".

name: Piper
bio: Piper is a giant owl owned by Gerd.

name: Pirate Bear
bio: The Pirate Bear, nicknamed Paw-san, is a bear who can be recruited by the Straw Hat Pirates in Grand Line Dream Adventure Log.

name: Pirate Penguin
bio: The Pirate Penguin, nicknamed Penkichi, is a penguin who can be recruited by the Straw Hat Pirates in Grand Line Dream Adventure Log.

name: Pisaro
bio: Pisaro is the musician of the Arlong Pirates and an ocean sunfish fish-man. He was previously a member of the Sun Pirates.

name: Pluming
bio: Saint Pluming is a World Noble.

name: Poker
bio: Poker is a Shinuchi in the Beasts Pirates. During the raid on Onigashima, he was tamed by the power of the Kibi Kibi no Mi and joined the side of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance.

name: Polo Gram
bio: Polo Gram is the captain of the Polo Pirates.

name: Pomp
bio: Pomp is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Pomsky
bio: Pomsky is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine that took part in the Egghead Incident. He serves as a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc.

name: Poppoko
bio: Poppoko is a member of the Alvida Pirates and the triplet brother of Heppoko and Peppoko.

name: Poppy
bio: Poppy is a member of the Kuja tribe.

name: Porche
bio: Porche is a combatant of the Foxy Pirates. She is considered an idol by the crew and is loved by all of the men.

name: Porchemy
bio: Porchemy was a member of the Bluejam Pirates until he was killed by his captain Bluejam for losing to Ace and Sabo.

name: Poro
bio: Poro is a bookstore owner from Orange Town.

name: Portgas D. Ace
occupation: 2nd Division Commander ; Pirate ; Captain (former); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former); Thief (former); Bandit (former)
bio: Portgas D. Ace, born as Gol D. Ace and nicknamed "Fire Fist" Ace, was the captain of the Spade Pirates before being recruited into the Whitebeard Pirates and becoming its 2nd division commander. The biological son of the late Pirate King Gol D. Roger and Portgas D. Rouge, Ace was put in the care of Monkey D. Garp and Curly Dadan after Roger's death, which is where he became the sworn brother of Monkey D. Luffy and Sabo.

name: Portgas D. Rouge
bio: Portgas D. Rouge was the mother of Portgas D. Ace and the lover of Gol D. Roger.

name: Potato
bio: Potato is a member of the Bonney Pirates. He was once a resident of the Sorbet Kingdom.

name: Potaufeu
bio: Potaufeu is a king and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Potsun
bio: Dr. Potsun is an Arabasta doctor who runs an isolated clinic in the desert.

name: Pound
bio: Pound is Big Mom's 25th ex-husband and the father of Charlotte Chiffon and Lola. He is also the grandfather of Capone Pez and father-in-law of Capone Bege and Gotti.

name: Prince Grus
bio: Prince Grus is a Marine Rear Admiral stationed at Marine base G-14 and a member of SWORD. His fellow SWORD members also refer to Grus by the title of Prince which differs from his surname.

name: Prometheus
bio: Prometheus the Sun is a sun homie that Big Mom summons from her right hand. He is a special kind of homie, as he received a soul fragment from Big Mom herself, and serves as one of her personal weapons alongside Napoleon and Hera, and formerly Zeus.

name: Pudding Pudding
bio: Pudding Pudding was a Marine commodore in the 77th Branch of the Marines.

name: Pudos
bio: Pudos is a Waiter in the Beasts Pirates who worked as a guard in the Prisoner Mine. He was injured by Kawamatsu after trying to attack Monkey D. Luffy.

name: Puppu
bio: Puppu is the captain of a pirate crew who attempted to pillage Nanohana in Arabasta.

name: Pururu
bio: "Trembling" Pururu is the " princess " of the Bourgeois Pirates, a pirate crew subordinate to the Red Hair Pirates.

name: Pythagoras
bio: Pythagoras, also designated as Punk-04 ( PUNK-04, Panku-Fō? ), is one of the six satellites of Dr.

name: Queen
occupation: All-Star ; Scientist ; De Facto Ruler of Udon (former)
bio: Queen the Plague is an All-Star of the Beasts Pirates as one of Kaidou's three closest confidants. He was formerly the ruler of the Udon region in Wano Country.

name: Quincy
bio: Quincy is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Rabbitman
bio: Rabbitman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates.

name: Rabiyan
bio: Rabiyan is a flying carpet homie that is often seen with Charlotte Pudding.

name: Ragnir
occupation: Loki's warhammer ; guardian of the Ryu Ryu no Mi, Model: Nidhöggr (former)
bio: Ragnir ("Iron Thunder") is a giant warhammer brought to life by a Zoan-type Devil Fruit, which allows it to transform into a giant squirrel. After having spent centuries serving as the guardian of Elbaph's national Devil Fruit treasure, the Ryu Ryu no Mi, Model: Nidhöggr, Ragnir judged Prince Loki as worthy to eat it 14 years ago and subsequently became his personal weapon.

name: Raideen
bio: Raideen is a former member of the Giant Warrior Pirates. Following the crew's disbandment, he returned to Elbaph, where he trained Hajrudin and remains to this day.

name: Raijin
bio: Raijin is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates. He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country, Kurozumi Orochi.

name: Raise Max
bio: Raise Max, also known as the "Legendary Gambler", is a non-canon member of the Revolutionary Army who appeared in One Piece Film: Gold.

name: Raizo
occupation: Daimyo ; Ninja ; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family; Samurai ; Member of the Kouzuki Family Oniwabanshu (Former); Bandit (Former)
bio: Raizo of the Mist is a ninja from Wano Country and one of the Nine Red Scabbards who served as Kouzuki Oden's retainers. He was born 55 years ago, but traveled 20 years forward in time at the age of 35.

name: Raki
bio: Raki is one of the Shandia warriors who fought to take back Upper Yard from Enel.

name: Rakuda
bio: Rakuda is a resident of the Flower Capital in Wano Country. He once possessed the blueprints of Kaidou's fortress on Onigashima.

name: Rakushitemo Terusubehainaika
bio: Dr. Rakushitemo Terusubehainaika is a scientist and a member of the Germ Pirates.

name: Rakuyo
bio: Rakuyo is the former 7th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Ramba
bio: Ramba is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Ramen
bio: Ramen is the king of the Kano Country and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Rampo
bio: Rampo is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared on Green Bit. He is one of the two vice-chiefs of the Tonta Corps along with Bomba, under Gancho and Leo.

name: Ran
bio: Ran is a member of the Kuja Pirates.

name: Randolph
bio: "Crane Rider" Randolph is a rabbit homie and a member of the Big Mom Pirates.

name: Rangram
bio: Rangram was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Ratel
bio: Ratel is a Marine captain who led an invasion of Sphinx during Marco's absence.

name: Rebecca
bio: Rebecca is the daughter of Scarlett and Kyros, the niece of Viola and the granddaughter of Riku Doldo III. She is the former crown princess of Dressrosa, who forfeited her title to live with her father and currently serves as a lady-in-waiting to her aunt, Viola.

name: Reck
bio: Reck is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Red King
bio: Red King is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine that took part in the Egghead Incident. He serves as a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc.

name: Redwolf
bio: Redwolf is a Gifter of the Beasts Pirates.

name: Reforte
bio: Reforte is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Renona Topakka
bio: Renona Topakka was a pastel-green wrasse mermaid and the mother of Kawamatsu.

name: Richie
bio: Richie is Mohji's pet lion, and a recurring member of the Buggy Pirates in all their various incarnations. He is classified as a Type C creature, "Big Savage".

name: Rika
bio: Rika is a young girl from Shells Town, and the daughter of Ririka. She currently serves as a waitress at the 153rd Marine Branch.

name: Riku Doldo III
bio: Riku Doldo III is the recrowned king of Dressrosa after the defeat of Donquixote Doflamingo, who dethroned him a decade ago. The current patriarch of the Riku Family, Doldo is the father of the late Scarlett and Viola and the grandfather of Rebecca.

name: Rimoshifu Killingham
bio: Saint Rimoshifu Killingham is a World Noble and a member of the Knights of God. Due to his actions and role, he is a major antagonist in the Elbaph Arc.

name: Rindo
bio: Rindo is a member of the Kuja Pirates.

name: Rint
bio: Rint was one of the archaeologists of Ohara.

name: Ripley
bio: Ripley is a giant from Elbaph and a biology teacher at the Walrus School. She is the mother of Colon and common-law wife of Scopper Gaban.

name: Ripper
bio: Ripper is a Marine Commander who heads the 153rd Branch. Formerly a subordinate of Captain Morgan, he assumed control after Morgan was defeated by the Straw Hat Pirates.

name: Ririka
bio: Ririka is a bartender who runs a local bar in Shells Town. She is Rika's mother.

name: Risky Brothers
bio: The Risky Brothers were a duo of Wild Zombie squirrels that served under Perona. They were animated from the shadows of two pirates by the same name.

name: Rivers
bio: Rivers was the gunner of the Bellamy Pirates.

name: Road
bio: Road is a giant from Elbaph who is the navigator of the New Giant Warrior Pirates and was formerly an S-Class ranked mercenary for Buggy's Delivery. In addition, he rules over a personal diorama full of entrapped humans and giant animals as its " Sun God ".

name: Rob Lucci
bio: Rob Lucci, also known as "Massacre Weapon", is a masked agent of CP0. Originally, he was introduced as part of CP9, reputed as the assassin unit's strongest member in history.

name: Robson
bio: Robson is Wapol's pet, and personal transport. He is a White Walkie, also known as "Wooly Hippo".

name: Roche
bio: Roche was one of the archaeologists of Ohara.

name: Rocks D. Xebec
bio: Rocks D. Xebec, born Davy D. Xebec, was the captain of the legendary Rocks Pirates. Born on God Valley, he was a member of the Davy Family and the father of Marshall D. Teach, one of the current Four Emperors.

name: Rockstar
bio: Rockstar is a member of the Red Hair Pirates, being relatively new in the crew two years ago.

name: Roddy
bio: Roddy is a bull mink and a Guardian of the Whale Forest.

name: Roji
bio: Roji was the wife of Oran, the mother of Mizuira, the sister-in-law of Nico Olvia, and the maternal aunt of Nico Robin.

name: Rokkaku
bio: Lieutenant Junior Grade Rokkaku was one of Axe-Hand Morgan's officers at the 153rd Marine Branch. He currently serves under Commander Ripper.

name: Rokki
bio: Rokki is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates, representing the number "six".

name: Rolling Logan
bio: Rolling Logan is an army commander of the Majiatsuka Kingdom. He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Ronja
bio: Ronja is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph.

name: Roronoa Zoro
occupation: Master Swordsman ; Pirate ; Crew Combatant ; Senior Officer ; Rōnin (temporary); Bounty Hunter (former)
bio: Roronoa Zoro, also known as "Pirate Hunter" Zoro, is the master swordsman and combatant of the Straw Hat Pirates, one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet, and is publicly recognized as the right-hand man and number two of his crew's captain, Monkey D. Luffy. Formerly a bounty hunter, he is the second member of Luffy's crew and the first to join it, doing so in the Romance Dawn Arc.

name: Roshio
bio: "Executioner" Roshio is a pirate captain who has a bounty of 42,000,000.

name: Ross
bio: Ross is a former combatant of the Bellamy Pirates.

name: Rosward Charlos
bio: Saint Rosward Charlos is a World Noble, the son of Saint Rosward Rosward, and the older brother of Saint Shalria. Due to his actions, he can be considered one of the main antagonists of the Sabaody Archipelago Arc, and a minor antagonist during the Levely Arc.

name: Rosward Rosward
bio: Saint Rosward Rosward is a World Noble and member of the Rosward Family. He is the father of Charlos and Shalria.

name: Rosward Shalria
bio: Saint Rosward Shalria is a World Noble, the daughter of Saint Rosward Rosward, and the younger sister of Saint Charlos. Alongside the rest of her family, Shalria is one of the main antagonists of the Sabaody Archipelago Arc.

name: Rowing
bio: Rowing was the scholar of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Roxanne
bio: Roxanne is a Baratie regular who was friendly with Sanji.

name: Royder
bio: Royder is a reporter who witnessed and reported on the events of the Summit War of Marineford from Sabaody Archipelago.

name: Run
bio: Run the Machete is an ex-pirate and former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard, having served as one of Caesar Clown’s henchmen. He is a spider centaur.

name: Rush
bio: Rush is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Russian
bio: Russian was Senor Pink's wife and the mother of Gimlet.

name: Ryuboshi
bio: Ryuboshi is an oarfish merman and the second son of the royal Neptune Family on Fish-Man Island.

name: Ryuma
bio: Ryuma was a member of the General Zombies serving the Thriller Bark Pirates. His body came from the legendary Wano Country samurai Shimotsuki Ryuma, which was brought back to life after Gecko Moria infused it with Brook's shadow.

name: Ryunosuke
bio: Ryunosuke was a "Rising Dragon" created by Kurozumi Kanjuro using the power of the Fude Fude no Mi. It was created to aid Kurozumi Kanjuro, Kin'emon, Trafalgar Law, and the Straw Hat Pirates in scaling the leg of Zunesha to reach Zou, and received its name from the Straw Hats.

name: S-Bear
bio: S-Bear is one of the Seraphim and a Lunarian-based clone of Bartholomew Kuma. Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist in the Egghead Arc.

name: S-Hawk
bio: S-Hawk is one of the Seraphim and a Lunarian-based clone of Dracule Mihawk. Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist in the Egghead Arc.

name: S-Shark
bio: S-Shark is one of the Seraphim and a Lunarian-based clone of Jinbe. Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist in the Egghead Arc.

name: S-Snake
bio: S-Snake is one of the Seraphim and a Lunarian-based clone of Boa Hancock. Due to her actions and role, she is a supporting antagonist in the Egghead Arc.

name: Saber
bio: Saber is a member of the Spade Pirates. Despite being commonly seen at Ace's side, he was allegedly not a commanding officer.

name: Sabo
occupation: Chief of Staff ( 参謀総長 , Sanbō Sōchō ? ) of the Revolutionary Army; Noble (former); Pirate (former); Thief (former); Bandit (former)
bio: "Flame Emperor" Sabo is the Revolutionary Army's chief of staff, recognized as the No. 2 of the entire organization under Supreme Commander Monkey D. Dragon.

name: Sadi
occupation: Chief Guard ( 獄卒長 , Gokusotsu Chō ? )
bio: Sadi is a chief guard of Impel Down. She always wants to be addressed as Little Sadi.

name: Sai
occupation: Captain of the Third Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; 13th Leader of the Happo Navy; Martial Artist (VIZ: Fighter)
bio: Sai, also known as Don Sai, is a member of the Chinjao Family and the 13th leader of the Happo Navy, as well as the captain of the third ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet. He is also a martial artist who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi, where he met Monkey D. Luffy, whom he eventually pledged his loyalty to.

name: Saikoro
bio: Saikoro is a tanuki owned by Wakasa and Hiroshi that lives in Bakura Town in Wano Country.

name: Saitank
bio: Saitank is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates ' Armored Division. During the Raid on Onigashima, he was tamed by the power of the Kibi Kibi no Mi and joined the side of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance.

name: Sakazuki
bio: Sakazuki, formerly known by his Admiral alias Akainu, is the current Fleet Admiral of the Marines, succeeding the previous Fleet Admiral, Sengoku. During the first half of the series, he was one of the three Admirals, and was the last one out of the three to debut.

name: Saldeath
occupation: Chief Guard ( 牢番長 , Rōban Chō ? )
bio: Saldeath is one of the Chief Guards of Impel Down. He is the commander of the Blue Gorillas.

name: Salome
bio: Salome is Boa Hancock’s personal Snake Weapon.

name: Sam
bio: Sam-san is a drunk man from Cocoyasi Village. On many occasions, he wanders around unknowingly when he is drunk.

name: Samosa
bio: Samosa is a king and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Samurai Batts
bio: Samurai Batts is a visitor on Kyuka Island.

name: Sancrin
bio: Sancrin the Thief is a member of the Longarm Tribe and Brook's former manager.

name: Sandayu
bio: Sandayu is a bodyguard who worked for the oiran Komurasaki.

name: Sanji
occupation: Cook ; Senior Officer ; Sous Chef (former); Prince (former); Cart Vendor (temporary)
bio: "Black Leg" Sanji is the cook of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet. He is the fifth member of the crew and the fourth to join, doing so at the end of the Baratie Arc.

name: Sanjuan Wolf
occupation: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Seventh Ship); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
bio: Sanjuan Wolf is an enormous giant, known as "Colossal Battleship" for his size, and and one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates, serving as the captain of the seventh ship of the fleet.. He was one of the legendary criminals imprisoned within the sixth level of the great underwater prison Impel Down until he was freed and recruited by Marshall D. Teach.

name: Sapi
bio: Sapi is a fish salesman from Loguetown who sold Sanji the blue-finned elephant tuna.

name: Sarahebi
bio: Sarahebi is a Gifter of the Beasts Pirates who works under Black Maria. She was also a school teacher in the Flower Capital.

name: Sarai
bio: Sarai was a member of the Takotopus Pirates 30 years ago.

name: Sarfunkel
bio: Sarfunkel is an inhabitant on the Island of Rare Animals. She is described as a barrel woman.

name: Sarie Nantokanette
occupation: Queen of the Goa Kingdom; Princess of the Goa Kingdom (former)
bio: Sarie Nantokanette is the queen of the Goa Kingdom and Sterry's wife.

name: Sarquiss
bio: "Big Knife" Sarquiss is the former first mate of the Bellamy Pirates, with a bounty of 38,000,000 on his head. His epithet originates from the large dagger he always wields, which bears a strong resemblance to a massive kukri.

name: Saru
bio: Saru is the pet dog of two of the World Nobles, Saint Rosward and Saint Shalria.

name: Sarutobi
bio: Sarutobi is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates. He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country, Kurozumi Orochi.

name: Sasaki
bio: "Overflowing" Sasaki is a bluespine unicornfish fish-man and one of the Tobiroppo, the strongest six Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates. He also leads the crew's Armored Division.

name: Satchels Maffey
bio: Saint Satchels Maffey is a World Noble and a member of the Knights of God. 38 years ago, she took part in the God Valley Incident, being the reason that Shanks and Shamrock were split up.

name: Satori
bio: Satori of the Forest is one of four former priests of Enel's God's Army, operating the Ordeal of Balls to punish criminals during Enel's reign. He is also the oldest triplet brother of Hotori and Kotori.

name: Sauce
bio: Sauce is the king of the Jambalaya Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Scales
bio: Scales is a Sea King. It is one of the six Sea Kings that speak to Shirahoshi when she fully manifests the power of Poseidon.

name: Scarlett
bio: Scarlett was the first daughter of the Riku Family and the former crown princess of Dressrosa until falsifying her own death. She was Viola's elder sister, Kyros ' wife, and Rebecca's mother.

name: Schollzo
bio: Schollzo is a member of the Franky Family.

name: Scimitarta
bio: Scimitarta is a member of the Endurance Curry Pirates.

name: Scopper Gaban
bio: Scopper Gaban, also known as the "Mountain-Eater", is a legendary retired pirate and former navigator of the Roger Pirates. His fame is said to rival that of his crewmates Gol D. Roger and Silvers Rayleigh, being known as the "Left Hand of the Pirate King".

name: Scorpionlady
bio: Scorpionlady is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates and a member of the crew's Armored Division. During the Raid on Onigashima, she was tamed by the power of the Kibi Kibi no Mi and joined the side of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance.

name: Scotch
bio: "Iron Boy" Scotch is a member of the Beasts Pirates working as the guardian of one of the former Emperor Kaidou's favorite islands.

name: Scratchmen Apoo
bio: Scratchmen Apoo, also known as "Roar of the Sea", is the captain of the On Air Pirates and was formerly an informant for the Beasts Pirates, led by Kaidou of the Four Emperors. He is a member of the Longarm Tribe and one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation ", being one of the eleven Supernovas who came to Sabaody Archipelago two years ago with a bounty of 198,000,000.

name: Sea Boar
bio: The Sea Boar is a sea creature that debuted in Hatchan's Sea-Floor Stroll.

name: Seagull Guns Nozdon
bio: Seagull Guns Nozdon is a former member of the Roger Pirates.

name: Seamars
bio: Captain Seamars is the captain of the Space Pirates who appears in Enel's cover story.

name: Seira
bio: Seira is a bluestriped angelfish mermaid and one of the top five Mermaid Cafe Dancers.

name: Seki
bio: Seki is the deposed king of Lulusia Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely. He is the father of Princess Komane.

name: Sengoku
occupation: Inspector General; Fleet Admiral (former); Admiral (former); Admiral (former) ; Vice Admiral (former)
bio: Sengoku the Buddha is a former Fleet Admiral of the Marines, succeeding Kong and preceding Sakazuki. He retired from his leadership position after the Summit War of Marineford, but remained in the Marines as an Inspector General.

name: Sennorikyuru
bio: Sennorikyuru is the master of tea ceremonies and is considered the best cook of Wano Country.

name: Senor Pink
bio: Senor Pink is an assassin and officer of the Donquixote Pirates ' Diamante Army. He was also the husband of Russian and the father of Gimlet.

name: Sentomaru
occupation: Marine Officer (former); Captain of the Science Unit (former); Dr. Vegapunk 's bodyguard (former)
bio: Sentomaru is a former Marine Officer and the former captain of the Marines' Science Unit, as well as Dr. Vegapunk's former bodyguard.

name: Serizawa
bio: Serizawa is a dyer and instructor who taught Bellamy in the cover page serial The Stories of the Self-Proclaimed Straw Hat Grand Fleet.

name: Seto
bio: Seto was one of the Shandia who lived on Jaya four hundred years ago. He was the husband of Kalgara's daughter Mousse, making him an ancestor to Wyper.

name: Shachi
bio: Shachi is a member of the Heart Pirates.

name: Shaka
bio: Shaka, also designated as Punk-01 ( PUNK-01, Panku-Wan? ), is one of the six satellites of Dr.

name: Shakuyaku
occupation: Bartender; Pirate Captain (former); First Mate (former); Empress of Amazon Lily (former)
bio: Shakuyaku, most commonly known by her nickname Shakky, is the bartender of Shakky's Rip-off Bar on the Sabaody Archipelago (formerly on Hachinosu over 40 years ago). She lives with her husband Silvers Rayleigh.

name: Sham
bio: Sham is an officer of the Black Cat Pirates. Along with his partner Buchi, he is also the protector of the crew's ship, the Bezan Black, and together they are known as the Nyaban Brothers.

name: Shanba
bio: Shanba is an inhabitant of Torino Kingdom. He was first seen at the time of Chopper's arrival.

name: Shandia Chief
bio: The Shandia chief is the leader of the Shandia tribe.

name: Shanks
occupation: Chief ; Emperor ; Apprentice (former); Devoted Blade of God (former);
bio: "Red-Haired" Shanks, commonly known as just "Red Hair", is the chief of the Red Hair Pirates and one of the Four Emperors that rule over the New World. Born in God Valley to the Figarland Family of the World Nobles, Shanks is the son of Figarland Garling and the younger twin brother of Shamrock.

name: Sharinguru
bio: Captain Sharinguru is a Marine captain who helped in the Buster Call on Enies Lobby.

name: Sheepshead
occupation: Shinuchi of the Gifters ( ギフターズ真打ち , Gifutāzu Shin'uchi ? )
bio: Sheepshead is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates who was in charge of the Gifters on Zou.

name: Shelly
bio: Shelly is Tonjit's hooorse and an animal of Long Ring Long Land.

name: Shepherd Ju Peter
occupation: Co-Head of the World Government (Public) ; Warrior God of Agriculture ( 農務武神 , Nōmu Bushin ? , English versions: "Godhead of Agriculture")
bio: Saint Shepherd Ju Peter is a World Noble of the Shepherd Family and one of the Five Elders who publicly head the World Government, holding the title of Warrior God of Agriculture. He is one of the secondary antagonists of the Egghead Arc.

name: Shepherd Sommers
bio: Saint Shepherd Sommers is a World Noble and a member of the Knights of God. Due to his actions and role, he is a major antagonist in the Elbaph Arc.

name: Shiki
occupation: Pirate Captain / Admiral ; Prisoner of the Great Prison (former); Mobster ( 極道 , Gokudō ? )
bio: Shiki the Golden Lion, also known as the "Flying Pirate", is the admiral and helmsman of the Golden Lion Pirates. He is also a former member of the Rocks Pirates and the first known prisoner to have ever escaped from Impel Down.

name: Shikon Kettai
bio: Shikon Kettai is a member of the Germ Pirates.

name: Shimotsuki Kouzaburou
bio: Shimotsuki Kouzaburou was a member of the Shimotsuki Family and a swordsmith who crafted the Great Grade Blades, Wado Ichimonji and Enma. He was born in Wano Country, but illegally departed from there 55 years ago and eventually settled down in what became Shimotsuki Village in the East Blue.

name: Shimotsuki Ryuma
bio: Shimotsuki Ryuma was a legendary, world-famous samurai hailing from the Shimotsuki Family of Wano Country, who lived during Wano's "Country of Gold" era around 400 years ago. He was revered for his mastery of swordsmanship that earned him the title Sword God, as well as his feat of slaying a dragon.

name: Shimotsuki Ushimaru
bio: Shimotsuki Ushimaru was a member of the Shimotsuki Family, and the last daimyo of Ringo in Wano Country before the takeover of Kurozumi Orochi as shogun 20 years ago. He was a direct descendant of the legendary samurai Shimotsuki Ryuma and the great-uncle of Roronoa Zoro through his older sister Furiko.

name: Shimotsuki Yasuie
bio: Shimotsuki Yasuie, also known as " Yasu the Hedgehog ", Tonoyasu, or just Yasu, was a member of the Shimotsuki Family and a taikomochi who lived in Ebisu Town near the capital of Wano Country. He was the adoptive father of Toko.

name: Shin Detamaruka
bio: Shin Detamaruka is a citizen of Dressrosa and a former dancer. She is the grandmother of Shin Jaiya.

name: Shin Jaiya
bio: Shin Jaiya is a citizen of Dressrosa. She is the granddaughter of Shin Detamaruka.

name: Shine
bio: Shine is a Marine Chief Petty Officer who works under the command of Hina.

name: Shinobu
occupation: Kunoichi ; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family ; Member of the Kouzuki Family Oniwabanshu (Former)
bio: Shinobu is a kunoichi from Wano Country and a retainer of the Kouzuki Family, having once served in the Oniwabanshu of the Kouzuki Shogunate and trained under Kin'emon as his protégée. She is also the younger sister of Shinosuke.

name: Shinosuke
bio: Shinosuke is a ninja who serves the Kouzuki Family. He is Shinobu's older brother.

name: Shioyaki
bio: Shioyaki is a salmon fish-man who was a member of the Arlong Pirates and the head of banquets.

name: Shirahoshi
bio: Princess Shirahoshi, famous in the world as the Mermaid Princess, is a giant smelt-whiting mermaid and the princess of the Ryugu Kingdom, as the youngest of King Neptune's children and the only daughter in the Neptune royal family. Having been locked up and raised inside an impregnable tower for most of her childhood thanks to the constant threat of Vander Decken IX, Shirahoshi wishes to know more about the outside world, following the will of her late mother, Queen Otohime.

name: Shiryu
occupation: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Second Ship); Head Jailer (former); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
bio: Shiryu of the Rain is one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates, serving as the captain of the second ship of the fleet. He was originally introduced as the ex-Head Jailer of Impel Down, who had himself been imprisoned on Level 6 death row for his excessive, murderous violence against prisoners.

name: Shishilian
bio: "Full Power" Shishilian is a lion mink and the captain of the Inuarashi Musketeer Squad, as well as one of the Three Inuarashi Musketeers leading the squad.

name: Shoujou
bio: "Sonar King" Shoujou is the big boss of the Shoujou Pirates, the head of underwater sonar operations around Jaya's coast, the sworn brother of Masira, and a follower of Mont Blanc Cricket, as part of the Saruyama Alliance. He and Masira were both fans of Liar Noland, the fairy tale concerning Cricket's ancestor, Mont Blanc Noland.

name: Shu
bio: Captain Shu was one of the Marine captains that helped in the Buster Call on Enies Lobby.

name: Shura
bio: "Sky Rider" Shura is one of the four former priests of the Upper Yard, who punished criminals with the Ordeal of String during Enel's reign. He rode a giant flying bird named Fuza.

name: Shyarly
occupation: Proprietor of the Mermaid Cafe; Fortune teller (former)
bio: Madam Shyarly is a shortfin mako shark mermaid living on Fish-Man Island. She is the proprietor of the Mermaid Cafe and Arlong's younger half-sister.

name: Sicily
bio: Sicily is a Marine Rear Admiral.

name: Sig
bio: Sig is a member of the Giant Warrior Pirates. He serves as a minor ally during the Egghead Arc.

name: Silvers Rayleigh
bio: Silvers Rayleigh, also known as the "Dark King", is a legendary retired pirate who formerly served as the first mate of the Roger Pirates, being known as the "Right Hand of the Pirate King". He is one of the major figures from the time when Gol D. Roger, the "Pirate King", was still alive.

name: Sind
bio: Sind is a child who was held captive in the Biscuits Room on Punk Hazard. He was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates.

name: Skaldi
bio: Skaldi is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph.

name: Skull
bio: Skull is a member of the Spade Pirates and, subsequently, the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Slime
occupation: Pet , Bio-Chemical weapon of mass destruction
bio: Smiley, more commonly known as Slime, was a pet of Caesar Clown. It was created by gathering and compressing the poisonous H2S gas that had spread throughout Punk Hazard and using Vegapunk's process of Zoan Devil Fruit animation to bring it to life.

name: Smoker
occupation: Vice Admiral ; ; Base Commander of G-5; Commander of G-5 Unit 01; Commodore (former); Captain (former)
bio: Smoker the White Hunter is a Marine vice-admiral and the commander of G-5 Branch's Unit 01, as well as the overall Base Commander of the G-5 Marine base. Originally a ranking captain in Loguetown, Smoker became fixated on Monkey D. Luffy's Straw Hat Pirates for escaping his previously-unbroken authority, and—with his loyal subordinate Tashigi —quit his post to pursue them into the Grand Line.

name: Smooge
bio: "Rebar" Smooge is an ex-prisoner and former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard, having served as one of Caesar Clown’s henchmen.

name: Snakeman
bio: Snakeman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates.

name: Sodom
bio: Sodom is one of the two gigantic King Bulls (sea horse in the most literal sense) owned by the Franky Family, the other being Gomorrah.

name: Solitaire
occupation: Shinuchi ; Vice Warden of the Prisoner Mine
bio: Solitaire is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a vice warden of the Prisoner Mine in the Udon region of Wano Country.

name: Some
bio: O-Some is a geisha who works in Wano Country's Flower Capital.

name: Sonieh
bio: Sonieh was the leader of 50-men mechanic team in the Foxy Pirates. He left the crew sometime during the Timeskip.

name: Sora
bio: Sora is a coris mermaid and one of the Mermaid Cafe Dancers.

name: Soro
bio: Soro was Helmeppo's pet wolf and the main reason that Roronoa Zoro was arrested by the Marines at Shells Town. He is classified as a Type C creature, "Big Savage".

name: Spacey
bio: First Lieutenant Spacey is one of the automata created on Karakuri Island by Tsukimi.

name: Spandam
occupation: CP0 Chief (former); CP9 Chief (former); CP5 Chief (former)
bio: Spandam is the former chief of CP9 and CP5. He is the son of Spandine, who was also his predecessor as the chief of CP9.

name: Spandine
bio: Spandine is the father of Spandam and was CP9's chief 22 years ago during the Ohara Incident. He led the "investigation" in Ohara and was responsible for summoning the Buster Call.

name: Spartan
bio: Spartan is a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum who was going to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi, before being defeated by Luffy.

name: Spector
bio: Spector is the owner of the Tropical Hotel.

name: Speed
bio: Speed is a former Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates stationed in Bakura Town. She has since become a subordinate to Kurozumi Tama due to the latter's Devil Fruit powers and became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance.

name: Speed Jiru
bio: Speed Jiru is the former 14th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

name: Spencer
bio: Spencer was a member of the Roger Pirates and their intelligence officer until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Splatter
bio: Splash and Splatter are two newkama pirate twins. They both willingly donated blood to Sanji when he was dying of severe blood loss.

name: Spoil
occupation: Chairman of Thriller Bark Victim's Association
bio: Spoil is the chairman of the Thriller Bark Victim's Association.

name: Squard
bio: "Maelstrom Spider" Squard is an infamous New World pirate and the captain of the Maelstrom Spider Pirates. Squard and his crew were allies of the Whitebeard Pirates and participated in the Summit War of Marineford.

name: Stainless
bio: Vice Admiral Stainless is a Marine officer who participated in the Summit War of Marineford. In the anime, he was initially named Kaizeruhige.

name: Stalker
bio: Lieutenant Junior Grade Stalker is a Marine on Vice Admiral Momonga's ship.

name: Stansen
bio: Stansen is a giant from Elbaph and shipwright. A childhood friend of Hajrudin's, they sailed together in their youth.

name: Sterry
occupation: King of the Goa Kingdom; Noble (former)
bio: Sterry is the king of the Goa Kingdom and the husband of the queen, Sarie Nantokanette. He was adopted by Sabo's family at eight years of age, having originally been born in a separate noble family.

name: Stevie
bio: Stevie is one of the two sea train organizers in Water 7, along with Bushon.

name: Strawberry
bio: Vice Admiral Strawberry is a Marine officer, and one of the five vice admirals who led the Buster Call assault on Enies Lobby.

name: Streusen
bio: "Gourmet Knight" Streusen is the executive chef of the Big Mom Pirates, and is also the co-founder of the crew alongside Big Mom herself. Prior to meeting Linlin, he was the chef of a pirate crew that has since fallen apart.

name: Stroganoff
bio: Stroganoff is the king of the Beef Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Stronger
bio: Stronger is the horse that Doc Q rides on. Because Doc Q is seemingly always sick, he rides on Stronger all the time, since the doctor tends to collapse if left unsupported for some time; however, Stronger is just as sick as he is.

name: Stussy
occupation: Spy; Cipher Pol Agent (undercover, former); Empress of the Underworld
bio: Stussy is MADS ' first-ever successful clone, having been modeled after Miss Buckingham Stussy. She is a masked agent of CP0, although she is actually a spy employed by Dr.

name: Su
bio: Su is a Cloud Fox and pet of Conis.

name: Sugamichi and Warazane
bio: Sugamichi and Warazane are two land-dwelling catfish ridden by Fujin and Raijin, respectively.

name: Sugar
bio: Sugar is a special officer of the Donquixote Pirates ' Trebol Army. She was one of the most integral components of Doflamingo's plan in keeping Dressrosa in line, as any dissenters were turned into toys by her Hobi Hobi no Mi powers.

name: Sukare Karehosui
bio: Sukare Karehosui is a member of the Germ Pirates and the younger sister of Sukare Tainen.

name: Sukare Tainen
bio: Sukare Tainen is the captain of the Germ Pirates and the older brother of Sukare Karehosui.

name: Suke
bio: Suke is a gangster who is a member of the Kyoshiro Family in Wano Country.

name: Sukoshiba Kanishitoru
bio: Sukoshiba Kanishitoru is a guard working in Impel Down.

name: Sukune
bio: Sukune is a yokozuna-ranked sumo wrestler from Wano Country. He is the older brother of Urashima.

name: Suleiman
bio: Suleiman the Beheader is a war criminal who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi. He eventually joined the Beautiful Pirates, serving under Cavendish.

name: Sunbell
bio: Sunbell is a fish-man and former member of the Roger Pirates.

name: Surume
bio: Surume is a kraken and famous giant creature which dwells in the deepest parts of the ocean. He was enslaved by the New Fish-Man Pirates, but later became the pet of Monkey D. Luffy, who was the one who gave Surume his name.

name: Suzume
bio: Suzume is a rooster living in the Tower of Justice.

name: Sweet Pea
bio: Sweet Pea is a member of the Kuja tribe living on the island Amazon Lily. During the timeskip, she became a member of the Kuja Pirates.

name: T Bone
occupation: Marine Vice Admiral ; Marine Rear Admiral (promoted); Marine Captain (promoted); Knight (former)
bio: "Ship Cutter" T Bone was a Marine Vice Admiral. As a Marine Captain two years ago, he was a minor antagonist during the Water 7 Arc and confronted the Straw Hat Pirates on the Sea Train route to Enies Lobby.

name: Tabuhachiro
bio: Tabuhachiro is a samurai and an ally of the Kouzuki Family. After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards, he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima.

name: Tacos
bio: Tacos is the king of the Shishano Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Taka
bio: O-Taka was the wife of Hyougoro. She was killed by Kurozumi Orochi's forces 20 years ago.

name: Takao
bio: Takao, also known as O-Taka, is a kamuro living in the Flower Capital of Wano Country who attended to the oiran Komurasaki alongside Toko.

name: Take
bio: Take is a carp fish-man and is a member of the Arlong Pirates. He is the commander of parties.

name: Tama
bio: Kurozumi Tama, commonly known as O-Tama, is a girl from the region of Kuri in Wano Country. She is a kasa weaver working under Tenguyama Hitetsu, as well as a kunoichi in training under the apprenticeship of Shinobu.

name: Tamachibi
bio: Tamachibi is a child Dr. Kureha healed while she was in Cocoa Weed.

name: Tamago
bio: Baron Tamago (also known as Viscount Hiyoko and Count Niwatori in his second and third form respectively) is a knight-ranked combatant of the Big Mom Pirates, who originates from the Longleg Tribe. He and his partner Pekoms were responsible for collecting the monthly payment of sweets from Fish-Man Island in exchange for Big Mom's protection.

name: Tamagon
bio: Tamagon is a ship dismantler from Water 7. Initially part of the Franky Family, he is now working for the Galley-La Company as part of the Zambai's Company Union.

name: Tamanegi
bio: Tamanegi is a former member of the Usopp Pirates, along with Ninjin and Piiman, before Usopp joined the Straw Hat Pirates. He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Syrup Village Arc.

name: Tamikebao
bio: Tamikebao is a retainer of the Kurozumi Family and a checkpoint guard at the dock between the Flower Capital and Kuri regions of Wano Country.

name: Tanaka
bio: Tanaka-san is the security guard of Gran Tesoro and an executive member of Gild Tesoro's crew. He appeared in One Piece Film: Gold as well as its filler arc and TV special.

name: Tank Lepanto
bio: Tank Lepanto is the commander of Dressrosa's Self-Defense Army. He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi.

name: Tansui
bio: Tansui is a member of the Macro Pirates and a former member of the Sun Pirates. He is an arowana fish-man.

name: Tarara
bio: Tarara is a dwarf from the Tontatta Kingdom.

name: Tararan
occupation: General Zombie ; Commander of the Spider Mice
bio: Tararan was a General Zombie and the Commander of the Spider Mice on Thriller Bark. He was the one that had caught the Thousand Sunny in his webs, forcing the Straw Hat Pirates to enter the island.

name: Taro
bio: Taro was a member of the Roger Pirates.

name: Taroimo
bio: Taroimo is a cyborg dog from Karakuri Island.

name: Tashigi
occupation: Captain ; Ensign (former); Master Chief Petty Officer (former)
bio: Captain Tashigi is a Marine officer serving under Vice Admiral Smoker in the base of G-5, as well as a member and Captain of G-5 Branch's Unit 01. She was originally introduced as a Master Chief Petty Officer in Loguetown but was promoted to Ensign after the events in Arabasta.

name: Tate
bio: Tate is a nurse who worked for the Whitebeard Pirates as part of the crew's medical division.

name: Tea IV
bio: Tea IV is the king of the Eigis Kingdom on the Grand Line and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely.

name: Tegata Ringana
bio: Tegata Ringana is a doctor on Dressrosa.

name: Tenguyama Hitetsu
bio: Kouzuki Sukiyaki is the former shogun of Wano Country. He is the father of the late daimyo of Kuri, Kouzuki Oden, as well as the grandfather of current shogun Kouzuki Momonosuke and Hiyori.

name: Tenjo-Sagari
bio: Tenjo-Sagari is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates who works under Black Maria.

name: Tensei
occupation: Director of the Marine Bureau of Investigation
bio: Tensei, also known by his Marine alias Kurouma, is the director of the Marine Bureau of Investigation.

name: Terracotta
bio: Terracotta is Igaram's wife and the royal head chef who appeared very late in the Arabasta Arc. She is also the royal seamstress.

name: Terry
bio: Terry is a bartender at a pub in Mock Town. He is not named in the manga, but his name was given in the databooks.

name: Terry Gilteo
bio: Terry Gilteo is an intelligence controller of the Revolutionary Army and was stationed at their headquarters on Baltigo.

name: Thalassa Lucas
bio: Thalassa Lucas is the former king of the Ilisia Kingdom, a country in West Blue.

name: Thatch
bio: Thatch was the 4th division commander, as well as the head chef of the Whitebeard Pirates. He was murdered by Marshall D. Teach for his Devil Fruit.

name: Thormann
bio: Thormann is a member of the Giant Warrior Pirates. He serves as a minor ally during the Egghead Arc, and, after being converted into a demon, a minor antagonist during the Elbaph Arc.

name: Tibany
bio: Tibany is an okama from Momoiro Island. He and the other okama chased after Sanji and attempted to convert him into an okama.

name: Tilestone
bio: Tilestone is one of the five foremen of Dock One of the Galley-La Company in Water 7. Tilestone is the last of the foremen to be formally introduced in the story, although he is present from the first scene Galley-La is shown in.

name: Tokijiro
bio: Tokijiro is a resident of the Flower Capital in Wano Country. He once possessed the blueprints to Kaidou's fortress on Onigashima.

name: Tokikake
bio: Tokikake, better known by his alias Chaton, is a Marine vice admiral.

name: Toko
bio: Toko is a girl who lives in the Flower Capital of Wano Country and is under the care of Kouzuki Hiyori. She is the adopted daughter of the late former daimyo of Hakumai, Shimotsuki Yasuie, and thus a member of the Shimotsuki Family.

name: Tom
bio: Tom was a long-horned cowfish fish-man known as the greatest shipwright in the world, particularly for building the Roger Pirates ' ship, the Oro Jackson. He was also the older brother of Den, a fellow fish-man shipwright.

name: Tomatito
bio: Tomatito is a musician who lives in Dressrosa.

name: Tomozo
bio: Tomozo is a shopkeeper in the Wano Country's Flower Capital who operated 41 years ago.

name: Tonjil
origin: Grand Line ( Long Ring Long Land )
bio: Tonjil is Tonjit's grandson and Tonsfer's brother.

name: Tonjit
origin: Grand Line ( Long Ring Long Land )
bio: Tonjit is an elderly nomad belonging to a tribe that lives on Long Ring Long Land.

name: Tonsfer
origin: Grand Line ( Long Ring Long Land )
bio: Tonsfer is Tonjit's granddaughter and Tonjil's sister.

name: Tony Tony Chopper
bio: Tony Tony Chopper, also known as "Cotton Candy Lover" Chopper, is the doctor of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet. He is the sixth member of the crew and the fifth to join, doing so at the end of the Drum Island Arc.

name: Topknot
bio: Topknot is a Sea King. It is one of the six Sea Kings that speak to Shirahoshi when she fully manifests the power of Poseidon.

name: Topman Warcury
occupation: Co-Head of the World Government (Public) ; Warrior God of Justice ( 法務武神 , Hōmu Bushin ? , English versions: "Godhead of Justice")
bio: Saint Topman Warcury is a World Noble and one of the Five Elders who publicly head the World Government, holding the title of Warrior God of Justice. Due to his actions and role, he is one of the secondary antagonists of the Egghead Arc.

name: Torasaburo
bio: Torasaburo was a tiger created by Kurozumi Kanjuro using the power of the Fude Fude no Mi. It was created to aid him, Kin'emon, and Bariete scale Zunesha's leg to reach Zou, fading away after it achieved its goal.

name: Tori
bio: Tori is a member of the Blackbeard Pirates.

name: Tosa
bio: Tosa is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine that took part in the Egghead Incident. He serves as a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc.

name: Toto
bio: Toto is Koza's father and Goro's older brother, who lives in Yuba.

name: Totts
bio: Totts is a member of the Bonney Pirates. He was once a resident of the Sorbet Kingdom, having been a friend of Bartholomew Kuma and Ginny since childhood.

name: Toyama Tsujigiro
bio: Toyama Tsujigiro is a Wano Country government official who lives in the Flower Capital. He is also a serial killer who attacked strangers at night.

name: Trafalgar D. Water Law
occupation: Pirate Captain ; Doctor ; Warlord of the Sea (former)
bio: Trafalgar D. Water Law, more commonly known as just Trafalgar Law and by his epithet as the "Surgeon of Death", is a pirate from the North Blue and the captain and doctor of the Heart Pirates. He is one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation ".

name: Trebol
occupation: Pirate Executive Officer; Staff Officer; Sugar 's Bodyguard
bio: Trebol is one of the top three officers of the Donquixote Pirates, acting as a Staff Officer. He occupies the Club seat of the Donquixote Family and is the leader of the crew's Trebol Army subdivision.

name: Tristan
bio: Tristan is a squirrel mink and one of Inuarashi's subjects, until Carrot took the throne of Mokomo Dukedom.

name: Tritobu
bio: Tritobu is the prince of the Nagagutsu Kingdom. He accompanied his father Furrari to the Levely.

name: Tritoma
occupation: Empress of Amazon Lily ; Pirate Captain
bio: Tritoma is a former empress of the Kuja tribe, succeeding Shakuyaku and preceding Boa Hancock. She died years ago, as a victim of Love Sickness.

name: Tsugaru Umi
bio: Tsugaru Umi is a woman who trained Nico Robin to perform as a geisha. She lives in the Flower Capital of the Wano Country.

name: Tsukimi
bio: Dr. Tsukimi was an old man who appeared in Enel's cover story.

name: Tsumonsieur Kamaya
bio: Tsumonsieur Kamaya is a former CP9 agent.

name: Tsunagoro
bio: "Broken Hat" Tsunagoro is a yakuza boss who was in charge of the Hakumai region in Wano Country. He was imprisoned in Udon by the Beasts Pirates, but was freed when Luffy took over the prison.

name: Tsunokkov
bio: Tsunokkov is a former prisoner of Impel Down and resident of Newkama Land in Level 5.5. He is one of Emporio Ivankov's dancers.

name: Tsuru
bio: Tsuru, known as the "Great Staff Officer", is a renowned Marine Vice Admiral, as well as the grandmother of Kujaku.

name: Tsurube
bio: "Careless" Tsurube was a retainer of the Kurozumi Family who burned to death after accidentally falling into the boiling oil prepared for Kouzuki Oden's execution.

name: Tsurue Monnosuke
bio: Tsurue Monnosuke is the machi-bugyō of the Flower Capital.

name: Tsurujo
bio: Tsurujo, commonly known as O-Tsuru, is a tea house owner from the Wano Country, as well as the wife of Kin'emon.

name: Turco
bio: Turco is a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew and masqueraded as Franky. When the crew switched to posing as the Kid Pirates, Turco impersonated Wire.

name: Tyrannosaurus
bio: Tyrannosaurus is Iceburg's pet mouse.

name: UK
bio: UK is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Ubau
bio: Ubau was the God of Skypiea roughly 400 years ago. His desire to live on the Vearth the Shandia had called home initiated a war between the Skypieans and Shandia that would last over 400 years.

name: Ucy
bio: "Brutal Bull" Ucy is a fighting bull that regularly competed as a gladiator in Dressrosa's Corrida Colosseum, where he was befriended (and named) by Monkey D. Luffy. He serves as an ally to Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc.

name: Uholisia
bio: Uholisia is the daughter of Chichilisia, the leader of the Niho Navy. She is the wife of 25 men and Sai's former fiancée.

name: Ukon
bio: Ukon is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family. After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards, he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima.

name: Ulti
bio: Ulti is a former member of the Tobiroppo, the six strongest Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates. She is the elder sister of fellow former Tobiroppo Page One, and the daughter of a former Warlord of the Sea, Hanafuda.

name: Ultraking
bio: Ultraking was the assistant-manager of Rain Dinners in Rainbase during the Arabasta Arc.

name: Umit
occupation: Shipping Magnate ( 海運王 , Kaiun-ō ? , Viz: "Shipping King") ; Emperor of the Underworld
bio: "Deep-Sea Currents" Umit is a magnate who presides Umit Shipping and one of the emperors of the Underworld.

name: Underbite
bio: Underbite is a Sea King. It is one of the six Sea Kings that speak to Shirahoshi when she fully manifests the power of Poseidon.

name: Uni
bio: Uni is a member of the Heart Pirates.

name: Unigaro
bio: Unigaro was a Wild Zombie who lived on Thriller Bark.

name: Urashima
bio: Urashima is a yokozuna-ranked sumo wrestler of Wano Country's Flower Capital. He is also of samurai class, thus giving him an elevated social status.

name: Uraya Mashikatta
bio: Uraya Mashikatta is a pirate.

name: Urbain
bio: Urbain is a giant that Kouzuki Oden encountered in his travels.

name: Urban
bio: Urban is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine Vice Admirals that took part in the Egghead Incident. He serves as a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc.

name: Urouge
bio: Urouge, nicknamed the Mad Monk, is a pirate hailing from a sky island and high priest of the Fallen Monk Pirates. He is one of twelve pirates referred to as the " Worst Generation ", and prior to the two-year timeskip had a bounty of 108,000,000.

name: Usagihebi
bio: Usagihebi is an animal who lives on the Island of Rare Animals. Like all the animals on the island, he is protected by Gaimon.

name: Usakkov
occupation: Dancer, Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
bio: Usakkov is a former prisoner of Impel Down and resident of Newkama Land in Level 5.5. He is one of Emporio Ivankov's dancers.

name: Ushiano
bio: Ushiano is a cattle mink, the deputy commander of the Revolutionary Army's West Army, and the assistant of Morley.

name: Usopp
occupation: Sniper ; Senior Officer ; Toad Oil Salesman (temporary)
bio: "God" Usopp is the sniper of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet. He is the fourth member of the crew and the third to join, doing so at the end of the Syrup Village Arc.

name: Usunoro
bio: Usunoro is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates and part of the Armored Division led by Sasaki.

name: Uta
bio: Uta is a world-famous diva and the adopted daughter of the Emperor Red-Haired Shanks, being a musician in his crew. In the filler Uta's Past Arc, she met and befriended Monkey D. Luffy in Foosha Village when they were both children.

name: Utan Divers
bio: The Utan Divers are a group of divers who composes the Shoujou Pirates on Shoujou's ship, the Utan Sonar. They each have a specific Diver Number.

name: Uwattsura
bio: Uwattsura is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a chief guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region.

name: Uzu
bio: Uzu is a child who was held captive in Punk Hazard's Biscuits Room. He was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates.

name: Uzuki Namida
bio: Uzuki Namida is a samurai and a member of the Uzuki Family who was formerly imprisoned in the Udon Prisoner Mine.

name: Uzuki Tempura
bio: Uzuki Tempura was a samurai who, as a member of the Uzuki Family, served as the daimyo of the Udon region until he was imprisoned and killed by Kaidou 20 years ago.

name: Van Augur
occupation: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Third Ship); Sniper
bio: Van Augur, nicknamed "The Supersonic", is the sniper, and one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates, serving as the captain of the third ship of the fleet. Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Jaya Arc, a supporting antagonist in the Impel Down and Marineford Arcs, a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc, and a major antagonist in the Final Saga.

name: Vander Decken IX
bio: Vander Decken IX is a Japanese bullhead shark fish-man, the eighth descendant of the legendary Vander Decken, and the captain of the Flying Pirates. He is the secondary antagonist of the Fish-Man Island Arc.

name: Vasco Shot
occupation: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Eighth Ship); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
bio: Vasco Shot, monikered "Heavy Drinker", is one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates, serving as the captain of the eighth ship of the fleet. He was originally one of several legendary criminals given a life sentence on Impel Down's Level 6, before being freed by Marshall D. Teach and joining him.

name: Vegapunk
bio: Dr. Vegapunk was the leading scientist of the SSG in the employment of the Marines.

name: Vergo
occupation: Pirate Elite Officer; Vice Admiral (undercover); Head of G-5 (undercover); Marine Captain (undercover, former)
bio: "Demon Bamboo" Vergo was one of the four elite officers and the first to occupy the Heart seat of the Donquixote Pirates under the codename Corazon. He was a Marine vice admiral, and head of G-5, who made his debut at Punk Hazard.

name: Very Good
bio: Very Good is a Marine Captain and one of the Marines who helped to attack the Straw Hat Pirates during the Buster Call at Enies Lobby.

name: Victoria Cindry
bio: Victoria Cindry was once a famous stage actress who died after falling off the stage twelve years ago. Having been infatuated with her, Dr.

name: Vincent
bio: Vincent is the prince of the Sankan Kingdom.

name: Vinsmoke Ichiji
bio: Vinsmoke Ichiji, also known as "Sparking Red", is the eldest son and second child of the Vinsmoke Family. He is a prince of the Germa Kingdom and a commander in its military arm, Germa 66.

name: Vinsmoke Judge
occupation: King of the Germa Kingdom; Supreme Commander of Germa 66; Scientist ; ; Mercenary
bio: Vinsmoke Judge, also known as Garuda, is the king of the Germa Kingdom, the supreme commander of the Germa 66, and the patriarch of the Vinsmoke Family, being Sanji's biological father.
