Judge is also a skilled scientist specialized in engineering and genetics, being responsible for the creation of most of Germa 66' technological advancements, including modifying his own children into super soldiers and developing the Raid Suit that supports their enhanced abilities.

name: Vinsmoke Niji
bio: Vinsmoke Niji, also known as "Dengeki Blue", is the second son and third child of the Vinsmoke Family. He is a prince of the Germa Kingdom and a commander in its military army, Germa 66.

name: Vinsmoke Reiju
bio: Vinsmoke Reiju, also known as "Poison Pink", is the eldest child and only daughter of the Vinsmoke Family. She is the princess of the Germa Kingdom and a commander in its military army, Germa 66.

name: Vinsmoke Sora
bio: Vinsmoke Sora was the queen of the Germa Kingdom, the wife of Vinsmoke Judge and the mother of Vinsmoke Reiju, Vinsmoke Ichiji, Vinsmoke Niji, Sanji and Vinsmoke Yonji who died sometime during Sanji's childhood.

name: Vinsmoke Yonji
bio: Vinsmoke Yonji, also known as "Winch Green", is the fourth son and youngest child of the Vinsmoke Family. He is a prince of the Germa Kingdom and a commander in its military arm, Germa 66.

name: Viola
occupation: Princess of Dressrosa ; Pirate Officer (former); Assassin (former); Dancer;
bio: Viola is the second daughter of the Riku Family and the current crown princess of Dressrosa after her niece Rebecca abdicated her position. She is the younger sister of the late Scarlett.

name: Vista
bio: "Vista of the Flower Swords" is the former 5th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates. He is one of the most prominent members of his crew.

name: Vitan
bio: Vitan is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Vito
bio: "Monster Gun" Vito is a member of the Fire Tank Pirates, working as the crew's advisor. He debuts as a supporting antagonist during the Zou Arc.

name: Wadatsumi
bio: "Large Monk" Wadatsumi is a giant tiger blowfish fish-man and a member of the Sun Pirates. He was formerly a member of the Flying Pirates under captain Vander Decken IX before they were defeated.

name: Wakasa
bio: Wakasa is a resident of Bakura Town in Wano Country who runs a restaurant alongside Hiroshi; the two of them own a tanuki named Saikoro which the sumo wrestler Urashima forced to be cooked and served to him.

name: Wallace
bio: Wallace is a weedy stingfish fish-man and a member of the Spade Pirates.

name: Wallem
bio: Wallem is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Wanda
bio: Wanda is a canine mink of the Inuarashi Musketeer Squad, previously also acting as a Kingsbird to both Inuarashi and Nekomamushi. She is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Zou and Wano Country Arcs.

name: Wany
bio: Wany is Wanda's crocodile-boar steed.

name: Wanyudo
bio: Wanyudo is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates, serving as Black Maria's weapon.

name: Wanze
bio: Wanze is an agent of CP7 and a cook, specializing in making ramen noodles. He was one of the antagonists during the Sea Train voyage in the Water 7 Arc.

name: Wapol
occupation: King of the Evil Black Drum Kingdom; President of Wapol Konzern; King of Drum Kingdom (former); Pirate ; Captain (former)
bio: "Tin-Plate" Wapol is the king of the South Blue's Evil Black Drum Kingdom and chairman of an international toy conglomerate. Originally king of the Grand Line's Drum Island, Wapol fled when the Blackbeard Pirates attacked (spending some time as the "captain" of his own, improvised pirate crew ) and was permanently deposed by the Straw Hat Pirates soon after.

name: Warashi
bio: Warashi is one of the Shandia warriors who fought against Enel.

name: Waruno Furishiro
bio: Waruno Furishiro is a man who manages weapon production orders on behalf of Kurozumi Orochi in the Flower Capital of Wano Country.

name: Wellington
bio: Wellington is a North Blue pirate from around fourteen to sixteen years ago.

name: Wheel
bio: Wheel is the prince of the South Fire Kingdom. He accompanied his father Jeep to the Levely.

name: Whitey Bay
bio: "Ice Witch" Whitey Bay is an infamous New World pirate captain who was once a member of the Whitebeard Pirates before forming her own crew subordinate to Whitebeard.

name: Who's-Who
occupation: Shinuchi ; Pirate ; Captain (former); Prisoner (former); Cipher Pol Agent (former)
bio: Who's-Who, also known as Who of the Droplets, is a pirate who acted as one of the Tobiroppo, the strongest six Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates, prior to Kaidou's fall from power after the Raid on Onigashima. Over a decade ago, he served as an agent of CP9 before his failure to guard the Gomu Gomu no Mi led to his dismissal from service and imprisonment.

name: Wicca
bio: Wicca is a female dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom beneath Green Bit. She, along with other members of her kind often pose as Dressrosa's fairies and take their "offerings".

name: Wire
bio: Wire is a member of the Kid Pirates.

name: Wolf
bio: Wolf is a giant from Elbaph who works as the gym teacher at the Walrus School.

name: Woop Slap
bio: Woop Slap is the mayor of Monkey D. Luffy's hometown, Foosha Village.

name: Wyper
bio: "Berserker" Wyper is the former leader of the Shandia warriors that fought to take Upper Yard back from Enel. He is the direct descendant of Kalgara.

name: X Drake
occupation: Captain of SWORD ; Pirate (undercover); Captain (undercover); Shinuchi (undercover, former); Marine Rear Admiral (former)
bio: "Red Flag" X Drake (pronounced as "Diez Drake") is the captain of the Marine Secret Special Unit SWORD. In order to go undercover as a pirate, he publicly defected from his position as rear admiral and founded the Drake Pirates.

name: Yama
bio: Yama is a Birkan and the commander of the Divine Soldiers under Enel. He is a supporting antagonist during the Skypiea Arc.

name: Yamakaji
bio: Vice Admiral Yamakaji is a Marine officer, and one of the five vice admirals who led the Buster Call on Enies Lobby.

name: Yamanba
bio: Yamanba is a Gifter of the Beasts Pirates who works under Black Maria.

name: Yamato
bio: Yamato is the son of Kaidou. Born as Kaidou's daughter and groomed from a young age to be his heir, Yamato instead developed a profound admiration for the legendary samurai Kouzuki Oden.

name: Yame
bio: O-Yame is a woman who lives in Okobore Town of Kuri with her two sons, Kinbo and an unnamed infant.

name: Yamenahare
bio: Yamenahare is a citizen of Pucci and the manservant to Marumieta, the daughter of Pucci's mayor, Bimine.

name: Yamon
bio: Yamon was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Yarisugi
bio: Yarisugi is a Marine Commodore of G-5 Unit 06.

name: Yasopp
bio: Yasopp, known as "Chaser", is one of the Senior Officers and the sniper of the Red Hair Pirates. He is also the father of Usopp and the widower of Banchina.

name: Yatappe
bio: "Snake-Eyes" Yatappe is a yakuza boss who was in charge of the Kibi region in Wano Country. He was imprisoned in Udon by the Beasts Pirates, but was freed when Luffy took over the prison.

name: Yazaemon
bio: Yazaemon is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates. He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country, Kurozumi Orochi.

name: Yeti Cool Brothers
bio: The Yeti Cool Brothers are Rock and Scotch, a pair of giant assassins who were employed by Caesar Clown. They are members of a mysterious type of giant.

name: Ylva
bio: Ylva is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph. She is the great-great-granddaughter of Jarul.

name: Yokan
bio: Yokan is a doctor assigned to treat the injured at sumo matches in Bakura Town.

name: Yokozuna
bio: Yokozuna is a Sumo Frog that Tom's Workers kept as a pet, friend and mascot up until Tom's execution. He is a supporting character throughout the Water 7 Saga.

name: Yomo
bio: Pastor Yomo is a sheep mink and one of Inuarashi's Musketeers.

name: York
bio: York, also designated as Punk-06 ( PUNK-06, Panku-Shikkusu? ), is one of the six satellites of Dr.

name: Yorki
bio: "Calico" Yorki was the captain of the Rumbar Pirates. 52 years ago, he and the rest of his crew traveled from the West Blue to Reverse Mountain, bringing along Laboon and leaving him at Twin Cape in Crocus ' care.

name: Yosaku
bio: Yosaku along with Johnny are old friends and former bounty hunting partners of Roronoa Zoro. He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Baratie Arc and the Arlong Park Arc.

name: Yoshimoto
bio: Mr. Yoshimoto is the owner of the restaurant Spice Bean.

name: Yotsubane
bio: Yotsubane is one of the Shandia warriors who fought against Enel.

name: Yu
bio: Yu is a little girl who accidentally bumped into Smoker and got ice cream on his uniform.

name: Yui
bio: Yui was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Yuki
bio: Yuki was a young girl over 100 years ago. She was responsible for starting the century-long duel between Dorry and Brogy.

name: Yurikah
bio: Yurikah is the captain of the Tulip Pirates that attacked Mirrorball Island in Jango's cover story.

name: Z
occupation: Neo Marines Supreme Commander Marine Instructor (former) Marine Admiral (former)
bio: Z ("Zed"), also known by his birth name and former epithet "Black Arm" Zephyr, was the Supreme Commander of the Neo Marines as well as a former Marine Admiral and instructor before his resignation. He served as the main antagonist of One Piece Film: Z, in which he and his forces clashed with the Straw Hat Pirates as they were caught in midst of his Grand Reboot plan to destroy the New World.

name: Zabo
bio: Zabo was a man that illegally trespassed into Upper Yard and was subsequently punished by Enel during his escape.

name: Zadie
bio: Zadie was one of the archaeologists of Ohara.

name: Zala
occupation: Spiders Cafe Owner ; Assassin (Former); Officer Agent (Former)
bio: "Poison Spider" Zala, better known by her alias Miss Doublefinger, was the second highest ranking female officer agent in the secret organization known as Baroque Works. As an officer agent, she was partnered with Mr.

name: Zambai
bio: Zambai is a ship dismantler from Water 7, who was a member of the Franky Family and Franky's right hand man. After the timeskip, he, Kiev, and Tamagon have joined the Galley-La Company as Zambai's Company Union.

name: Zangirimaru
bio: Zangirimaru is a former prisoner of Udon's prisoner mines. In the anime credits and closed captions, he was named Jo.

name: Zanki
bio: Zanki is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates, representing the number "three".

name: Zeff
occupation: Head Chef of Baratie , Pirate Captain (former)
bio: Zeff is the head chef and owner of the Baratie, as well as the adoptive father and mentor of Sanji. Once the feared "Red-Leg" Zeff, captain of the Cook Pirates, his notoriety ended in a storm that annihilated both his crew and ship.

name: Zeo
bio: Zeo is a Japanese wobbegong fish-man and the self-proclaimed " Noble of the Fish-Man District ". He was an officer of the New Fish-Man Pirates before their downfall and disbandment.

name: Zepo
bio: Zepo was a polar bear mink, Bepo's older brother, and a member of the Nox Pirates. He was killed by Big Mom in Totto Land five years ago after he spun her Soul Pocus Roulette.

name: Zeus
occupation: Partner ( 相棒 , Aibō ? , Viz: "Sidekick") ; Living Weapon; Servant (former)
bio: Zeus the Thundercloud is a homie that is fused with Nami's Sorcery Clima-Tact. Before merging with the Clima-Tact, he was owned by Big Mom, who would summon him from her left hand.

name: Zodia
bio: Zodia is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Zotto
bio: Zotto is a Marine Lieutenant and a subordinate of Vice Admiral Momonga.

name: Zucca
bio: Zucca is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard.

name: Zunesha
bio: Zunesha is a Naitamie-Norida elephant that was affiliated with Joy Boy 800 years ago. It now wanders through the New World and carries the island of Zou on its back as punishment for an unspecified crime it committed in the past.

name: Zururin
bio: Zururin is a catfish fish-man who encountered Queen Otohime as a child 16 years ago.

name: Époni
bio: Époni is a nurse in service to the royal household of the Germa Kingdom. She was primarily charged with caring for the late queen, Vinsmoke Sora.
